name: Live Training Team @ NDTC
subject: [You’re Invited] Feast your eyes...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| on these upcoming live trainings...
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YZEmZvpCqAzeDifQRHlxvliPL2YWQK7ofl1Nqbo6VEQ)
Peter — With Thanksgiving coming up, we’re _thankful_ that we have some fun live trainings to offer!! 🦃 **⇨ First, check out**[**Running an Effective Political Campaign Debrief**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..J_T7m7sSxKY3WztmHt_RVq34sH-KzioFJKEUORvnfTM)**on Tuesday, November 16 at 8pm ET.** In order to move forward, your campaign needs to evaluate what went right, wrong, and anything in between during the last campaign cycle. Join our experts to understand how you can learn from your mistakes to build a successful campaign for the future. | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..J_T7m7sSxKY3WztmHt_RVq34sH-KzioFJKEUORvnfTM)
---
**⇨ Then, we have**[**Running an Effective Campaign Debrief for your Democratic Party**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..o52gNwfhbFh-HH1fDmQIs9h1P9hjZ4z1urPLQPPvw8Y)**on Wednesday, November 17 at 8pm ET.**
The best way to succeed in the future is by learning from the past! Running an effective campaign debrief is important, especially after a fast-paced campaign season.
On Wednesday, you will learn why it’s important to debrief your campaign strategy, how to recognize components of an effective debrief, and apply best practices to planning your own debrief.
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..o52gNwfhbFh-HH1fDmQIs9h1P9hjZ4z1urPLQPPvw8Y)
---
**⇨ And finally, join NDTC Founder & CEO Kelly Dietrich for a**[**Kelly Q &A: Now What? Your Post-Election Action Plan**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTExMTQyMV9SVSZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.y0eU4hprRMoB_Axb_M5oam5X5CDLjfZg3WEqhGGcGUw)**on Thursday, November 18th at 1pm ET.**
2022 is right around the corner, and if you’re thinking about working on a campaign, it’s never too early to get prepared!
In this interactive Q&A, Kelly will walk you through how to plan your next steps and move into 2022 with a clear goal and vision.
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTExMTQyMV9SVSZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.y0eU4hprRMoB_Axb_M5oam5X5CDLjfZg3WEqhGGcGUw)
---
Hope to see you soon!

— NTDC Live Trainings Team

Friends,
**We are approaching another important deadline for our campaign. The Mid Month deadline is here and we need you to chip in one more time!**

If we are able to raise $875 in the final hours we can reach our goal and continue the momentum from the most recent elections. We cannot afford to give the Democrats any hope! [**RUSH ANY AMOUNT TODAY**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=8bb7ebded4da4beb92b0e055e0b4393d&_e=_uL-RvEGUIJyGDL5AwtwGUdxDwO3N6rpRKKY4pp3nKNs7PxQwi2Ji3CkjmDjECQxQXtvvrPM323ftEoG-hupvdjE29uL4L9pXoCDSg5SRLrUZGX_NiViXKzERJyjmNeu0v-LWfNwamCNaeLbzcunTx9WOts7i95lAhIymr0Tlo6HoxBHTY31IfvQ04BUmuI1kverrVf51lOHuRZfUyO3G0DLuhhLmneQmMuM3cAwCkL7-gCp4Nj3oqwebFL3NOzcMtEpAFgTP1-OF3VFARPK9Tk0upr3PGj8Wvy3I72xoZX73UkvFQ38YkVYb7b8qI0w6l6Tpgwk9rCbxmFeeZdPW0-20GIH0UukPsJW3LGEmqUiw3yhO8wU6zk06ogrxDQt4E_o6MjI4iD9JbeSQefYppYKgYRjMmVGYn3xVuweMU-UtHo8vromuqiBzrRQA0L0SdUHJWFFrioKvlbMLxAkX4NcUOCuu0FwhT52uaXDY4iMItlA7dYK-Ix605bPJ7ZQ)
---
[**HELP US CRUSH OUR GOAL**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=8bb7ebded4da4beb92b0e055e0b4393d&_e=_uL-RvEGUIJyGDL5AwtwGUdxDwO3N6rpRKKY4pp3nKNs7PxQwi2Ji3CkjmDjECQxQXtvvrPM323ftEoG-hupvdjE29uL4L9pXoCDSg5SRLrUZGX_NiViXKzERJyjmNeu0v-LWfNwamCNaeLbzcunTx9WOts7i95lAhIymr0Tlo6HoxBHTY31IfvQ04BUmuI1kverrVf51lOHuRZfUyO3G0DLuhhLmneQmMuM3cAwCkL7-gCp4Nj3oqwebFL3NOzcMtEpAFgTP1-OF3VFARPK9Tk0upr3PGj8Wvy3I72xoZU3z8NyIoRHrONNqq8uIv3svK9FHmSSKxOSbQVw-bTmQbf52YkeqmnItmqRWD8MxkSuDOnA6k1C4FKcvaIL-Bq0ngIQM3fBsfffUOxO4-HmQ-NAPro2DC9N-rF5ts6C35WDwTB7bO-zYJWjHN_pRN2UtehVHkAW-T3CGAM0KAgKZZ5Hcfw0jfinDLtk81_NJoz_SYrJFiBpZ95ie_OvHgwX)
---

If Democrats are able to keep their fundraising lead, they are one step closer to ruining Virginia. They will force CRT onto our children. The Radical Left will turn Virginia into their own Socialist playground if we let them.

There is no time to waste. I know we have asked a lot of you, but we depend on your support! [**ACT NOW**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=8bb7ebded4da4beb92b0e055e0b4393d&_e=_uL-RvEGUIJyGDL5AwtwGUdxDwO3N6rpRKKY4pp3nKNs7PxQwi2Ji3CkjmDjECQxQXtvvrPM323ftEoG-hupvdjE29uL4L9pXoCDSg5SRLrUZGX_NiViXKzERJyjmNeu0v-LWfNwamCNaeLbzcunTx9WOts7i95lAhIymr0Tlo6HoxBHTY31IfvQ04BUmuI1kverrVf51lOHuRZfUyO3G0DLuhhLmneQmMuM3cAwCkL7-gCp4Nj3oqwebFL3NOzcMtEpAFgTP1-OF3VFARPK9Tk0upr3PGj8Wvy3I72xoZUmaModMcu8ahrbX_aYWVftrgGUPEaYlOsuocKM2YQniFyUueo79BZAJwstdvhwn-T58pn0Qvgfk9OajbsjnZrUDGSDnyFOpspBOtLP3tUICQ2v8F1Gg9uFUTn_Zn7Z46hRk4eOK6SvqfYwA_kEmjSTODwrM0DtS11uCsdsLBOXshjdPBE9Rw8rsQbuFjdZ6TLJ1SlOUf7XUEW3Gp3gnsIq)

name: Eddie Gallagher, Navy SEAL Chief (Ret.)
subject: This political prosecution of Kyle Rittenhouse must end now!!
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765458:J5Bw8F2MN:m:1:3298722022:03CE776D2357D7435621690088BC12FE:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. **

After nearly 20 years of decorated service as a Navy SEAL, I was arrested and charged with the murder of an ISIS terrorist in Iraq. I was facing not only life in prison, but an endless campaign of slander and misinformation from our corrupt media.

Thankfully my family fought back publicly and fearlessly, caught the attention of President Trump, and I was freed from the brig and allowed to properly prepare for trial. I was found not guilty and allowed to keep my trident, but our life was a living hell for a long time.

**Now, Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs and I refuse to sit back.** As I've watched his trial, it's become crystal clear that Kyle acted in self-defense.

**[I'm emailing you now because through FreeKyleUSA, Kyle's mother Wendy has been furiously working to raise money for his legal defense, and they urgently need our help. Will you make a donation right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765458:J5Bw8F2MN:m:1:3298722022:03CE776D2357D7435621690088BC12FE:r)**
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765458:J5Bw8F2MN:m:1:3298722022:03CE776D2357D7435621690088BC12FE:r)
|
---
More and more nowadays, if you're considered a political enemy of the powers-that-be, the rule book gets thrown out and anything goes.

The media, politicians, tech companies and other powerful interests band together to try and crush you financially and personally. The "narrative" takes precedence over the truth, and people's lives can be forever ruined.

**That is not the America that I dedicated my life to defend.**

It shouldn't have to be this way, but I know from my own experience that if enough people stand up and push back, justice can still prevail. And right now, justice means a "not guilty" verdict and Kyle Rittenhouse getting his life back.

**It can happen, but his legal defense is incredibly costly and he needs the support of millions of patriotic Americans across this country.**

**[I'm calling on you to help because believe it or not, your donation will make a difference. So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now, and let's pray that Kyle gets the justice he deserves.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765458:J5Bw8F2MN:m:1:3298722022:03CE776D2357D7435621690088BC12FE:r)**

The truth, and our God-given right of self-defense still mean something in this country, and we have the power, today, to stand up for both.

Thank you for your time.

Steadfast,
Eddie Gallagher
Navy SEAL Special Operations Chief (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765458:J5Bw8F2MN:m:1:3298722022:03CE776D2357D7435621690088BC12FE:r)
| | | _Copyright(C) 2021 Free Kyle USA, All rights reserved._Free Kyle USAPO Box 5322Reno, NV 89513

name: Derrick Van Orden
subject: Will you help send a SEAL to Washington, D.C?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765445:6Yn46F2JN:m:1:3253819041:E4E94A36A9405CC09E40E3BBEEF9A3BC:r)
---
_SEND A TRUMP-ENDORSED NAVY SEAL TO CONGRESS_
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765445:6Yn46F2JN:m:1:3253819041:E4E94A36A9405CC09E40E3BBEEF9A3BC:r "EXPRESS DONATE $5")
---
Hey there, it's Derrick Van Orden.

I'm a retired Navy SEAL, Afghanistan War Veteran & Trump-endorsed conservative running to beat Pelosi. I'm a Navy SEAL, so I'm not someone who usually reaches out like this, **[but I'm asking if you will help with just $5?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765445:6Yn46F2JN:m:1:3253819041:E4E94A36A9405CC09E40E3BBEEF9A3BC:r "but I'm asking if
you will help with just $5?")**

I wanted to take a minute to introduce myself and ask you to join my team of grassroots supporters. Because if I am going to fight back against the Radical Left's attacks, I need people like you, Fellow Conservative, in my corner.

I first answered the call to serve my country at 18 when I enlisted in the US Navy. And after 26 years of military service including multiple combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, I am ready to continue serving this great country in Congress.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765445:6Yn46F2JN:m:1:3253819041:E4E94A36A9405CC09E40E3BBEEF9A3BC:r)
---
_SEND A TRUMP-ENDORSED NAVY SEAL TO CONGRESS_
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765445:6Yn46F2JN:m:1:3253819041:E4E94A36A9405CC09E40E3BBEEF9A3BC:r "EXPRESS DONATE $5")
---
But my race will be one of the toughest for Republicans anywhere this time around. Because here's the thing: liberal mega donors already spent millions attacking me in 2020 and are ready to do the same again this year.

Listen, I'm no politician, just an everyday American who loves this country and has dedicated my life to serving it. And right now, America needs more patriots in congress who will put America first, not themselves.

**[I hate to ask, but I need your help to stand up to the Radical Left and fight for our country. There is simply too much at stake and failure is not an option.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765445:6Yn46F2JN:m:1:3253819041:E4E94A36A9405CC09E40E3BBEEF9A3BC:r "I hate to ask,
but I need your help to stand up to the Radical Left and fight for our country. There is simply too much at stake and failure is not an option.
")
**_SEND A TRUMP-ENDORSED NAVY SEAL TO CONGRESS_
---
| | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765445:6Yn46F2JN:m:1:3253819041:E4E94A36A9405CC09E40E3BBEEF9A3BC:r "EXPRESS DONATE $5")
---
So if you agree that we need more members of congress who put the country over themselves, then help send a Navy SEAL like me to Washington. Because America is on the line in this election, and we can't afford to sit on the sidelines.

Thank you,

Derrick Van Orden
Senior Chief Petty Officer, US Navy (ret.)
_ Derrick Van Orden is a U.S. Navy Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy._
---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765446:6Yn46F2JN:m:1:3253819041:E4E94A36A9405CC09E40E3BBEEF9A3BC:r "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP 'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58765446:6Yn46F2JN:m:1:3253819041:E4E94A36A9405CC09E40E3BBEEF9A3BC:r "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**

---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

| | Hey folks, I hope I’m catching some of you as you’re sitting down for your morning coffee. I wish I could sit down with each of you over a cup of joe and discuss which issues matter most to you and your families, but writing this email to you as mine is brewing is the next best thing. I’m up early because I love mornings in Robeson County. The sun peaking over the trees, the cool breeze -- and it’s also the perfect time for me to look over our fundraising numbers before the day gets started. And, to be honest, folks, our numbers aren’t quite where I’d hoped they’d be. name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle needs us NOW, Peter
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58766758:JRNqLF2N1:m:1:3253819041:E51F3442B11819400CBFFAE358714897:r)
---
Peter,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this, Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58766758:JRNqLF2N1:m:1:3253819041:E51F3442B11819400CBFFAE358714897:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58766758:JRNqLF2N1:m:1:3253819041:E51F3442B11819400CBFFAE358714897:r)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58766758:JRNqLF2N1:m:1:3253819041:E51F3442B11819400CBFFAE358714897:r)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58766758:JRNqLF2N1:m:1:3253819041:E51F3442B11819400CBFFAE358714897:r)

name: American Victory on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Socialism rising?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768206:Jr5hrF2_N:m:1:3298722022:9F29125B7D8A0604B2E2C8C67BC0C6EE:r) Dear Peter,
Two years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"
To say "everyone" is a gross exaggeration. But it's clear that socialism has made--and continues to make--inroads in America, especially among the young.
Today, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of that support and the amount of opposition to socialism. With your input, we can form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of liberty in our country.
**Please give your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768206:Jr5hrF2_N:m:1:3298722022:9F29125B7D8A0604B2E2C8C67BC0C6EE:r)**
With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand mainstream Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.
A recent poll showed that 70% of Millennials are either somewhat likely or extremely likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.
**Why is this?**
For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.
For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.
This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels.
_The New York Times_ ' "1619 Project" is a prime example of this. The mainstream media praised this effort to subvert the proper teaching of American history, and its lead essayist even won a Pulitzer Prize.
In the face of such well-financed efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach efforts have never been more urgently needed**.
By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** , your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.
We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence and underlying the Constitution.
As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."
If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today.
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768206:Jr5hrF2_N:m:1:3298722022:9F29125B7D8A0604B2E2C8C67BC0C6EE:r)**
In the face of recent successes by the Left, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: $1,000,000 to stop Twitter Censorship {READ}
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768467:Ja1wAF2QN:m:1:3298722022:680FA8EDF054FA9CDBE02C2E75D3B6E4:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

clean_body: Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents. And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - and we need your help to win. Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up. From: California Secretary of State Communications Department To: Twitter Date: Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: From user @DCDraino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Sharing with you a personal behind-the-scenes look at life at home in Gwinn
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
I want you to understand more about who I am and get a glimpse of what I do as a candidate, a public health officer, husband, and friend. This is my 'Day in the Life' at home in Gwinn and Marquette. I just returned from several days pounding the pavement on the campaign trail. **“Day in the Life” – Dr. Bob shares a personal behind-the-scenes look at life at home** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38631609/316359342/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmFhNGI2YS0xMTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K70DV7wqiPv0kLiT8pQTz6fdbyNLZFM-y2mDYbclP70=) **_Dr. Bob Lorinser, a candidate for US Congress in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula, shares a personal glimpse of a day after pounding the pavement on the campaign trail._** [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38631610/316359343/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmFhNGI2YS0xMTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K70DV7wqiPv0kLiT8pQTz6fdbyNLZFM-y2mDYbclP70=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38631611/316359344/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmFhNGI2YS0xMTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K70DV7wqiPv0kLiT8pQTz6fdbyNLZFM-y2mDYbclP70=) Good morning, Friend. I want voters to understand more about who I am and get a glimpse of what I do as a candidate, a public health officer, husband, and friend. This is my 'Day in the Life' at home in Gwinn and Marquette. I just returned from several days pounding the pavement on the campaign trail. **6 am - 8 am —** I wake up with a cup of coffee reading about economics from the Wall Street Journal, foreign policy from Foreign Affairs, COVID-19 from multiple sources, and news from the Washington Post, the New York Times, the Wall Street Journal. I quickly channel surf between two very different networks and am not disheartened with the biases. **8 am - 12 noon —** I meet with medical providers about improving school-based community clinics to meet the needs of rural students. There are too many obstacles for rural Michiganders accessing health care. I'm disappointed in my opponent's lack of attention to the needs of this great district. **12 noon - 1 pm** — Peggy, my wife of 40 years, and I enjoy each others' company over lunch (leftover chili). **1- 2 pm** — I'm analyzing data about acceptable school mitigating efforts during the current COVID-19 surge. My #1 priority is the health of our community, taking feedback from parents, students, and the community, and making sure science remains the core part of the discussion. **2 - 4:30 pm** — Call time. I'm connecting with constituents – people who agree and disagree with me on issues. I'm eager to listen, learn from, and understand the issues facing hard-working families. **4:30 pm - 5 pm** — I'm reading Jack Bergman's position on a critical environmental issue, questioning his sources, unimpressed with the lack of facts to support his opinion. Wouldn't it be excellent to see a debate with Jack and myself hosted by expert independent fact-checkers alongside the moderators? I'm excited about the opportunity to debate. Unfortunately, I don't think Jack Bergman has the courage. He **hasn't participated** in a town hall since his first term. **5 - 8 pm** — I'm out to dinner and playing Euchre with four friends; friends across the entire political spectrum, engaging in lively and civil debates regarding:
* Criminal Justice
* Racism
* Economy
* Education
* Politics

I question whether or not our current Representative in Congress could say something like this. I spent three hours with four friends whose political passions don't align with mine, and we had a wonderful evening. We discussed, bantered, shared opinions, agreed, and disagreed. We challenged each other's facts and questioned solutions. We laughed, and at other times we didn't. My friends and I didn't solve all of America's problems, but we did maintain one of our most fundamental values: civility. We remained friends. In a divided America, there is nothing better for healing than conversation. No yelling, no name-calling, no insults. **9 pm - 10 pm —** I've arrived home. I'm doing household chores and discussing the next day's planned events with Peggy. We share family updates about our children and grandchildren. I kissed her goodnight. I am reflecting on call-time ("dialing for dollars"). I'm proud that many individual donors currently fund this campaign. This district is geographically gigantic, and campaigning here takes a lot of resources.**[I am frustrated that our country hasn't addressed campaign finance reform because I'd much rather utilize my time to talk one-on-one with voters. Unfortunately, winning requires the necessary evil of asking for money.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38631612/316359345/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmFhNGI2YS0xMTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K70DV7wqiPv0kLiT8pQTz6fdbyNLZFM-y2mDYbclP70=)** I'm not a fan. I barely can let someone else pick up the tab at dinner. But, I'm getting used to it and am very humbled by the financial support. Thank you. I need you. **10 pm - 1 am —** I've got 100 emails to read. Some need replies. I'm doing more research on essential issues and writing this blog to tell you who I am. **1 am —** I have an idea. As we continue the listening tour, I also want to partake in public town halls and invite concerned constituents from all walks of life, from every party affiliation. I want Democrats, Republicans, and Independents to join me and see for themselves why they should vote for a candidate who puts the lives of Northern Michiganders and Yoopers first. I'll discuss this tomorrow with my staff. **1:15 am** — Lights out. Earlier in the week, I was on the campaign trail in Northern Michigan. I met with business leaders, economic developers, working families, and Veterans at events in three counties. I visited Kirtland Community College and was impressed with their vision, providing students with affordable educational and vocational training. I listened to business owners’ difficulty attracting employees and their frustrations with the supply chain shortage. I listened to workers describe their struggles to make ends meet. Everyone here needs better representation right now. As I run for Congress, I strive to represent each of you. I will respect you. I will listen. We can discuss, we can agree or disagree. I will be forthcoming and open. I will do my best to make our district, State, and Nation a better place to live, work and play. So help me, God. This is why I am running for Congress. Goodnight from Gwinn, Michigan. – Dr. Bob | |
---

name: RightUSA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Socialism rising?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768805:6rWz1F2HN:m:1:3253819041:7E7C5EED56236EE584606D0641B3B6EF:r) Dear Peter,
Two years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"
To say "everyone" is a gross exaggeration. But it's clear that socialism has made--and continues to make--inroads in America, especially among the young.
Today, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of that support and the amount of opposition to socialism. With your input, we can form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of liberty in our country.
**Please give your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768805:6rWz1F2HN:m:1:3253819041:7E7C5EED56236EE584606D0641B3B6EF:r)**
With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand mainstream Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.
A recent poll showed that 70% of Millennials are either somewhat likely or extremely likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.
**Why is this?**
For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.
For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.
This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels.
_The New York Times_ ' "1619 Project" is a prime example of this. The mainstream media praised this effort to subvert the proper teaching of American history, and its lead essayist even won a Pulitzer Prize.
In the face of such well-financed efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach efforts have never been more urgently needed**.
By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** , your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.
We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence and underlying the Constitution.
As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."
If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today.
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58768805:6rWz1F2HN:m:1:3253819041:7E7C5EED56236EE584606D0641B3B6EF:r)**
In the face of recent successes by the Left, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Dear Peter, Two years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" To say "everyone" is a gross exaggeration. But it's clear that socialism has made--and continues to make--inroads in America, especially among the young. Today, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of that support and the amount of opposition to socialism. With your input, we can form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of liberty in our country. Please give your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below: With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand mainstream Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders. A recent poll showed that 70% of Millennials are either somewhat likely or extremely likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections. Why is this? For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom. This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels. The New York Times ' "1619 Project" is a prime example of this. The mainstream media praised this effort to subvert the proper teaching of American history, and its lead essayist even won a Pulitzer Prize. In the face of such well-financed efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, Hillsdale 's educational outreach efforts have never been more urgently needed. By responding to the National Survey on Socialism , your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence and underlying the Constitution. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. In the face of recent successes by the Left, we must remember: it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. **But Letitia needs supporters like you by her side, and we're still falling short of our 1,000-donor goal by midnight tonight. So we just checked our records, and your name is missing:**

His opponent, Greg Abbott, is just awful. He’s been the face of so many of the destructive and backward policies of the Republican Party in Texas for the last few years.
On voting. On abortion. On COVID. On LGBTQ rights. On all of it. And if Beto is able to defeat Abbott in 2022, it could change everything.
It could stop harmful voting rights laws in their tracks, end their abortion ban, and allow for immigration policies that put people front and center.
A Blue Texas could also reshape our politics for generations to come. 38 electoral votes is no joke.
This may all seem “pie in the sky,” but I believe in Beto. I really do. We’ve all seen the hope he brings to Texans. And I want to ensure he has the resources to run again and win. If anyone can accomplish this tall Texas-sized task, Beto can.
**With your help – I think he has a real shot. Will you pitch in right now to Beto and my campaigns to help make a Blue Texas a reality?**

This is one of our best chances ever to flip Texas Blue – potentially changing the course of politics in America. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = His opponent, Greg Abbott, is just awful. He’s been the face of so many of the destructive and backward policies of the Republican Party in Texas for the last few years. On voting. On abortion. On COVID. On LGBTQ rights. On all of it. And if Beto is able to defeat Abbott in 2022, it could change everything. It could stop harmful voting rights laws in their tracks, end their abortion ban, and allow for immigration policies that put people front and center. A Blue Texas could also reshape our politics for generations to come. 38 electoral votes is no joke. This may all seem “pie in the sky,” but I believe in Beto. I really do. We’ve all seen the hope he brings to Texans. And I want to ensure he has the resources to run again and win. If anyone can accomplish this tall Texas-sized task, Beto can. With your help – I think he has a real shot. Will you pitch in right now to Beto and my campaigns to help make a Blue Texas a reality? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Let’s do this. Thanks for your support. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Tyranny has no home here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People don’t need the government to tell them how to live their life.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2uxsk--fgxr-4qqlpo8&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uxsk-1kt1v-4qqlpo3/)
---

If there is one thing I know that you and I agree on, it’s the _bravery_ and _selflessness_ that our medical workers and first responders showed throughout the COVID-19 pandemic.

With grocery store shelves empty, jobs lost, people faced to stay at home for months on end, these folks had to put themselves on the front lines every single day. They put themselves, and their families, at risk, and they did it without blinking an eye.

Their bravery has been unmatched throughout the trials of COVID-19. Their stories have inspired us, and we hold them, their families, and the value of their hard work and dedication in our hearts.

---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uxsk-1kt1w-4qqlpo4/)
---

But now, Democrats have decided that those who dare disagree with their political ideology should be forced out of jobs they spent years dedicated to. Jobs that required long stretches away from family and loved ones, jobs that put them at risk — jobs that were challenging, even under the best of circumstances.

Every day doctors, nurses, medical professionals and first responders are being forced out of positions for refusing to fall in line with government mandates. This isn’t America.

As President Trump’s Secretary of State, I had the privilege of traveling the world, and I can tell you from personal experience that this type of behavior is the type previously only seen in third-world countries where the governments are controlled by dictators and families are forced to act at the whims of whoever controls the levers of power.

We had a word for it — tyranny.

**We cannot let tyranny win. Full stop.**

Americans know best how to conduct their daily lives, and that includes making important medical decisions on their own behalf in consultation with their doctor. People don’t need the government to tell them how to live their life.

**We can put a stop to this madness, but it’s going to take all of us working together to defeat the radical, Big Government Democrats who are trying to restrict our freedom. **

That’s why I started an organization to support principled conservative candidates all across America who are unapologetically American and refuse to give an inch to the Democrats. If we are going to be successful, **[I’m asking you to make a donation to help Republicans WIN BIG in the upcoming election.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uxsk-1kt1x-4qqlpo5/ "I’m asking you to make a donation to help Republicans WIN BIG in the upcoming election.") **

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uxsk-1kt1y-4qqlpo6/)
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uxsk-1kt1z-4qqlpo7/)
---
Taking a stand for your country is worth every penny. We cannot sit on the sidelines and let tyranny win. Instead, we must champion our American values and fight for our freedoms.

**[Are you with me?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uxsk-1kt20-4qqlpo4/ "Are you with me?")**

Never Give An Inch,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uxsk-1kt21-4qqlpo5/)
---
Mike Pompeo
---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uxsk-1kt22-4qqlpo6/ "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uxsk-1kt23-4qqlpo7/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2uxsk-1kt24-4qqlpo8/ "DONATE NOW")
---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I may lose re-election because of the swamp......
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772515:6H1ulF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:FE64878EE39A55CE40ABB93A31C94FE4:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772515:6H1ulF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:FE64878EE39A55CE40ABB93A31C94FE4:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772515:6H1ulF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:FE64878EE39A55CE40ABB93A31C94FE4:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772515:6H1ulF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:FE64878EE39A55CE40ABB93A31C94FE4:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772515:6H1ulF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:FE64878EE39A55CE40ABB93A31C94FE4:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772515:6H1ulF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:FE64878EE39A55CE40ABB93A31C94FE4:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772515:6H1ulF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:FE64878EE39A55CE40ABB93A31C94FE4:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772515:6H1ulF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:FE64878EE39A55CE40ABB93A31C94FE4:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772515:6H1ulF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:FE64878EE39A55CE40ABB93A31C94FE4:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772515:6H1ulF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:FE64878EE39A55CE40ABB93A31C94FE4:r)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I'm being frank here..
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I am now less than 48 hours away from my FIRST deadline of November and I cannot afford to show any weakness. Here is what the media are saying about my race:
|
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772672:JoDflF2Nu:m:1:3299561967:CB15253FB125C3257FB08E54FD22A029:r)
---

**PLEASE, Patriot, I NEED YOUR HELP!**

---
| | [DIRECTLY HELP MARCO HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772672:JoDflF2Nu:m:1:3299561967:CB15253FB125C3257FB08E54FD22A029:r "DIRECTLY HELP MARCO HERE")
---

I am now less than 48 hours away from my FIRST deadline of November and I cannot afford to show any weakness. Here is what the media are saying about my race:**CNN:**
_Florida is in the Top 10 of Senate Seats Most Likely to Flip_

**FOX NEWS:**
_Florida Senate Race Could be the Most Expensive in History_

**POLITICO:**
_Florida will be the Marquee Senate Race of the Year_

**ROLL CALL:**
_Marco Rubio is One of the Most Vulnerable Senators _

---
| | [DIRECTLY HELP MARCO HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772672:JoDflF2Nu:m:1:3299561967:CB15253FB125C3257FB08E54FD22A029:r "DIRECTLY HELP MARCO HERE")
---

This is why I need your help, Patriot. Everyone in the country has their eyes set on Florida and if we FAIL to keep Florida red, it will spell disaster for years to come. Do I need to remind you about my opponent's radical agenda?

❌A champion of Biden's Build Back Socialist agenda
❌Called plans to defund the police "very thoughtful"
❌In favor of abolishing the filibuster so she can help pass far-left legislation
❌Wants to use taxpayer dollars to pay for abortions
❌Supports banning voter ID

**[So, please, Patriot, I just need your help before it's too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772672:JoDflF2Nu:m:1:3299561967:CB15253FB125C3257FB08E54FD22A029:r "So,
please, Patriot, I just need your help before it’s too late.")**

---
| | [DIRECTLY HELP MARCO HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772672:JoDflF2Nu:m:1:3299561967:CB15253FB125C3257FB08E54FD22A029:r "DIRECTLY HELP MARCO HERE")
---

Thank you,
Marco Rubio

---

---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Patriot, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58772673:JoDflF2Nu:m:1:3299561967:CB15253FB125C3257FB08E54FD22A029:r "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Jake announces Finance Committee of prominent Georgians
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Nov. 15, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org
Jake announces Finance Committee of prominent Georgians Jake Evans today announced ten Georgia leaders to head up the Finance Committee for his campaign for the Sixth Congressional District. Former state House Speaker Mark Burkhalter from North Fulton will serve as Finance Committee Chairman. "With Jake's hard work and commitment, this campaign has already built more support and brought in more money than any other candidate in this race," said Burkhalter. "Our country is going in the wrong direction and change begins right here. Jake is the candidate who is not only best situated to win, but also has the strongest skills and convictions to fight for our conservative values. We're proud to work hard on his behalf to get him elected to Congress because we know that's what's best for our community and country." The Finance Committee includes: Committee Chairman Mark Burkhalter: Former Speaker of Georgia House & prominent North Fulton community leader Committee Vice Chairman Bob Barr: Former Congressman for Georgia's 7th Congressional District and former U.S. Attorney Mike Marshall: Founder & Chairman of Georgia Capital, LLC Aaron McWhorter: Founder & CEO of North Georgia Turf Gene Anderson: Managing Principal of G.H. Anderson & Company Peter Quinones: Founder & CEO of MetroAtlanta Ambulance Service Salim Khambawala: Founder & CEO of Dixie Amusement LLC Allen Yee: Corporate Counsel & community leader Alan R. Redding, MD: Co-Founder & CEO of Redding Allergy & Asthma Specialists COL., Eric Welsh: Principal Partner & Co-Founder, WBMV "Baylie and I are humbled and beyond appreciative of the support from these great Americans," Jake said. "Each of them has contributed so much to Georgia, and the respect and stature they have in their communities will do so much to build momentum that will carry us to victory."
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Nov. 15, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org Jake announces Finance Committee of prominent Georgians Jake Evans today announced ten Georgia leaders to head up the Finance Committee for his campaign for the Sixth Congressional District. Former state House Speaker Mark Burkhalter from North Fulton will serve as Finance Committee Chairman. "With Jake's hard work and commitment, this campaign has already built more support and brought in more money than any other candidate in this race," said Burkhalter. "Our country is going in the wrong direction and change begins right here. Jake is the candidate who is not only best situated to win, but also has the strongest skills and convictions to fight for our conservative values. We're proud to work hard on his behalf to get him elected to Congress because we know that's what's best for our community and country." The Finance Committee includes: Committee Chairman Mark Burkhalter: Former Speaker of Georgia House & prominent North Fulton community leader Committee Vice Chairman Bob Barr: Former Congressman for Georgia's 7th Congressional District and former U.S. Attorney Mike Marshall: Founder & Chairman of Georgia Capital, LLC Aaron McWhorter: Founder & CEO of North Georgia Turf Gene Anderson: Managing Principal of G.H. Anderson & Company Peter Quinones: Founder & CEO of MetroAtlanta Ambulance Service Salim Khambawala: Founder & CEO of Dixie Amusement LLC Allen Yee: Corporate Counsel & community leader Alan R. Redding, MD: Co-Founder & CEO of Redding Allergy & Asthma Specialists COL., Eric Welsh: Principal Partner & Co-Founder, WBMV "Baylie and I are humbled and beyond appreciative of the support from these great Americans," Jake said. "Each of them has contributed so much to Georgia, and the respect and stature they have in their communities will do so much to build momentum that will carry us to victory." == == == | | | | Jake Evans for Congress | P.O. subject: look at SNL mocking me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Peter -- My gun giveaway is so popular, the radical left is
mocking me on SNL.

But their lame attempts at personal attacks
doesn't intimidate me. In fact, I'm more emboldened than ever!

That's why I hope you'll enter to win my 50
cal rifle before tonight's midnight deadline!

Let's send a message to the snarky Hollywood
celebs that you're standing with me and against them!

The Democrats wage war against our 2nd
Amendment.

And every single day in the halls of
Congress, I'm fighting to stop them.

In fact, I believe in our 2nd Amendment so
much, I'm giving away this 50 Cal rifle!
Deadline tonight! Enter to win my 50 Cal
Rifle!

This is the same type of gun the Democrats
would love to ban if they ever get the votes.

You and I have seen firsthand just how far
the Democrats are willing to go to strip you of our gun rights
while BLM and Antifa thugs riot in our cities and destroy entire
communities.

But you have every right to defend yourself
and your home. And I will always fight for that right!

That's why I'm giving away this 50 Cal Rifle.

Enter to win before tonight's Deadline!

Someone's gotta win. It might as well be you!

WATCH & ENTER TO WIN MTG's 50 CAL:

-- Marjorie Taylor
Greene

Congresswoman (R-GA)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38640853/316402986/2022723758?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211115_AM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODQ4ODk3Mi0yYjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EhU_xHSkIMSeAs-KwUrAs83UKVUWTHLv1sR6mSNLtFg=) **Our Democratic slate is stronger than ever.** In 2022, we will build on our work from 2018 and mobilize an electorate that has been frozen in their own homes, burdened with rising property taxes, and sold a vision that puts partisan politics before Texas parents, business owners, and our collective prosperity. name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: $1 today is worth more than $1 next year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Folks, New Hampshire was the closest Senate race in the country in 2016. Maggie won her race, beating a far-right GOP incumbent and flipping this seat by 1,017 votes -- less than half a point. In campaigns, we call that a field margin, where the winner of a close race depends on getting on the ground early and talking to every voter we can. In 2022, all eyes will be on New Hampshire. With the Senate majority riding on this seat and Mitch McConnell already spending big to try to flip the majority, we’re in for another close race. That’s why it’s so important for us to reach our early fundraising targets like today's mid-month goal. name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Right now.
body:
We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z77sv9gh2vj9185dp6604q0m7lnd9i0o461umdb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjie4ob4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onk66p3cd75e1ob2cdgeprj3cpkeco6cp3lcqqe2sb566q71dtkeopb1cr16eon1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dj66aqbacb7m8omccbgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
| | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcd5cmvcruohqocrr65hos8ki1t0j7vtfrq633fg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjie4ob4cth2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now with trial underway, it has been falling apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this - Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I 'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg2jms3c1vk8bfutlco9c8jkshnbl3lq8lojmm38_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjie4ob4cth2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf8sb3o0bahjolhq6f3qv60jco8te2u56p14t8t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjie4ob4cth2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We 're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3lqqmr483of6bh0kckmcsin25g7d240l0j4jueg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjie4ob4cth2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z543j8p6p5afd7eon3733v7kd16uojbingedpaho_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjie4ob4cth2bs)

Governor Greg Abbott is a prime example of an elected official who prioritizes himself and his wealthy friends over his constituents and their families.

We’ve seen it in Abbott’s failure to address Texas’ crumbling power grid, leading to catastrophic power outages and the death of hundreds of Texans in the winter of 2021. We saw it when he banned mask requirements in public schools, making Texas a national leader in child Covid deaths. And we saw it when he signed an unconstitutional law that bans most abortions in Texas. _**Derek, Texas deserves better.**_

But beating Republican incumbent Greg Abbott won’t be easy, especially since Abbott and his party have gone to great lengths to make voting more difficult than it ever should be. We’re going to need a huge amount of grassroots resources to build the kind of people-powered movement that can reach and mobilize millions of Texas voters.

[**This race is our best chance to take Texas back for working people and families. That’s why we’re asking if you’ll split a contribution between Beto and Common Good and become a founding donor today to help unseat Greg Abbott and elect Beto O’Rourke to serve the people of Texas as their next Governor.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38642192/316411135/-410225223?refcode=20211114_Beto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGM1OWFhMC0yZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45HV-5VmPkAuej4IgsdAZ2tc8T25eDqUXILuHJs54VE=)

With voting rights, reproductive justice, and so much more on the line in Texas, this race couldn’t be more important.

Thank you for doing your part,

Beto for Texas

Arlington, VA 22215

We don't have to guess what Mitch McConnell will do if he wins back the Senate gavel. After all, this is the same Senate GOP leader that stood before the cameras in 2019 and promised to be the 'Grim Reaper' and stop all progress on the Biden agenda and other key priorities for the American people if he was majority leader again.
So this is a critical time. We are less than 12 months away from November 8, 2022. We can't let Mitch McConnell and his scorched earth agenda make a comeback in the US Senate. We need to be ready to stop him right here in Maryland.
[Will you chip in right now and help us as we prepare to defend this Maryland Senate seat from Mitch and protect our fragile Senate majority? Your donation of $20, or whatever you are able to give, can have a tremendous impact:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38642706/316413409/-1808413249?amount=10&refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MCL_211115_1_1&refcode2=b5b808b2-2f46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&contactdata=h%2FoecCSt4Pd0gQG7tmdx98LF4d6zbsb2yuqi9155DmpdYBhgGtxbZHsdrFMY2RmV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWI4MDhiMi0yZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6LxEWWAKsLxj4FGsZq5aOEX7cwHxLiaw9yAFPZqOGLU=)

Chris

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38643104/316415663/1927938479?refcode=20211115_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTU2ZDI4Ni0zMjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cp8t-d5KO0pQDxOJ3kLDmjjmx7MkalwvuXiPoXGZSIs=)
Friends — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to contribute to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here’s the truth: We’re less than one year out from Election day. And when the clock strikes midnight, our mid-November deadline comes to an end. But this goal is important for a few more reasons. First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack. Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022. And our official race ranking just changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up. But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win. It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone. So here’s where I ask: [**Can you please split a contribution to Seth Moulton and our campaign before the mid-month fundraising deadline comes to an end at midnight tonight? I would not ask if it weren’t so important. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38643105/316415664/1927938479?refcode=20211115_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTU2ZDI4Ni0zMjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cp8t-d5KO0pQDxOJ3kLDmjjmx7MkalwvuXiPoXGZSIs=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38643106/316415665/-1534947712?refcode=20211115_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTU2ZDI4Ni0zMjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cp8t-d5KO0pQDxOJ3kLDmjjmx7MkalwvuXiPoXGZSIs=)
Thank you, —Mark
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38643107/316415666/-1534947712?refcode=20211115_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTU2ZDI4Ni0zMjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cp8t-d5KO0pQDxOJ3kLDmjjmx7MkalwvuXiPoXGZSIs=)

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Vaccine Mandate Victory
body:
Fellow Patriot:

When Joe Biden announced his unconstitutional
national vaccine mandate, CPI and our partners were ready for the
fight.

Just days later, we won the first round when the
U.S. Court of Appeals blocked Biden's mandate pending further
litigation.

Let me tell you how it happened.

As you know, Joe Biden doesn't have the power to
force private citizens to get vaccinated for Covid. OSHA doesn't
have that authority, either. Congress never gave it to them. The
so-called "mandate" is a lawless, tyrannical abuse of power.

Conservatives have seen this movie before. Biden is
running the same playbook his old boss, Barack Obama, used when
he issued his illegal DACA amnesty order in 2012. Only with DACA,
it took nine years for a court to declare its illegality. This
time, it took two weeks.

The difference? CPI.

Even before Biden issued his mandate, one CPI
partner organization - Russ Vought's Center for Renewing America
- detailed why it was illegal, unconstitutional, and could be
resisted.

At the same time, another CPI partner, Stephen
Miller's America First Legal, drafted lawsuits to challenge the
mandate in federal court. They are the ones who beat Biden in
Court.

This is what we mean when we say CPI's job is to
make all conservatives better at theirs. The Left has always had
coordination between activists, communicators, experts, and
policymakers. Conservatives never did: until CPI.

Now, not only are conservative policy thinkers
coordinating strategy with legal foundations, but conservative
members of Congress have taken the fight to Capitol Hill,
opposing all legislation funding the enforcement of OSHA's
mandate.

Meanwhile, all of our partners are using CPI's
state-of-the-art recording studios to get their message out to
the country, bypassing the woke, socialist filters of the
mainstream media.

Help CPI continue to support conservatives in the
fight for America's future with a tax-deductible donation!
It used to be, this was how the Left fought, and why
they won. Conservatives were fractured, disorganized, and
fighting for scraps of airtime from the Fake News propagandists.

CPI's team - hardened by years of battles with the
Left and fueled by the rising MAGA movement - understands that in
the fight for America's future, the best defense is a good
offense.

Please help CPI continue to train, equip, and united
conservatives with a one-time or recurring donation!

CPI has not just changed the game. Thanks to the
support of freedom-loving Americans like you, we're winning it.

For Freedom,

Jim DeMintCPI Chairman

CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE300 Independence
Ave SEWashington, DC 20003(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282
FaxCPI.org

DONATE

Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is an
IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to
Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is tax-deductible to the
extent allowed by law.
