subject: Standing in the way of progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz
body:
We need a governor who fights to make life better for working families. We need a progressive governor who fights for what she believes in.
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38643324/316416985/1058120998?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20211115_f_s_baker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzA0ZjdhMS0zNDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z47NBogqmt33rKiH_bect_pbVIovI7eUSRNyg896zb8=&emci=0a0834ac-2846-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f704f7a1-3446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684840)
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38643325/316416986/1058120998?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20211115_f_s_baker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzA0ZjdhMS0zNDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z47NBogqmt33rKiH_bect_pbVIovI7eUSRNyg896zb8=&emci=0a0834ac-2846-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f704f7a1-3446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684840)
---
| | Team, This past week showed just how clear a choice we have in our next election. In the Senate, I voted to take important steps toward a Green New Deal for Massachusetts: investing $450 million in new green infrastructure and winning another $7.5 million in green jobs training for students of color. **Meanwhile, what'd Governor Baker do? Stand in the way of progress again.** He kicked off the week stoking cynicism about Michelle Wu’s public transit plans, pitting cities and towns against each other rather than uniting our commonwealth to achieve better infrastructure for everyone. Then the Baker Administration proposed a plan to slow-walk converting our state’s homes to green energy heating — pushing most of the changes “to years closer to the end of the decade.” Aka: on someone else’s watch. **We need a governor who fights to hit our most important goals — not leave them for someone else to figure out. We need a progressive governor who fights for what she believes in.** [_**If you agree, would you support this campaign with a $5 contribution today? Your support will help us beat Governor Baker and make Massachusetts a place where working families can thrive. Make your contribution today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38643326/316416987/1115169997?refcode=em_20211115_f_s_baker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzA0ZjdhMS0zNDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z47NBogqmt33rKiH_bect_pbVIovI7eUSRNyg896zb8=) Time and time again, Governor Baker has blocked and delayed change when we’ve brought it to his desk. I had to stand with progressive colleagues in the Legislature to overcome his rejection of climate change legislation (twice!) and his veto of the ROE Act, which enshrined Roe v. Wade in Massachusetts law. And we had to drag him to the altar on education funding reform, criminal justice and police reform, and LGBTQ rights. As Maya Angelou said, “When someone shows you who they are, believe them.” Imagine what we could do with a Governor who didn’t try to stop progress at every turn. Imagine what we could accomplish with a Governor who leads, instead of slow-walking commonsense solutions. **I’m asking for your help as I fight to bring leadership back to the Governor’s Office. clean_body: We need a governor who fights to make life better for working families. We need a progressive governor who fights for what she believes in. | | | | | Team, This past week showed just how clear a choice we have in our next election. In the Senate, I voted to take important steps toward a Green New Deal for Massachusetts: investing $450 million in new green infrastructure and winning another $7.5 million in green jobs training for students of color. Meanwhile, what'd Governor Baker do? Stand in the way of progress again. He kicked off the week stoking cynicism about Michelle Wu’s public transit plans, pitting cities and towns against each other rather than uniting our commonwealth to achieve better infrastructure for everyone. Then the Baker Administration proposed a plan to slow-walk converting our state’s homes to green energy heating — pushing most of the changes “to years closer to the end of the decade.” Aka: on someone else’s watch. We need a governor who fights to hit our most important goals — not leave them for someone else to figure out. We need a progressive governor who fights for what she believes in. = Time and time again, Governor Baker has blocked and delayed change when we’ve brought it to his desk. I had to stand with progressive colleagues in the Legislature to overcome his rejection of climate change legislation (twice!) and his veto of the ROE Act, which enshrined Roe v. Wade in Massachusetts law. And we had to drag him to the altar on education funding reform, criminal justice and police reform, and LGBTQ rights. As Maya Angelou said, “When someone shows you who they are, believe them.” Imagine what we could do with a Governor who didn’t try to stop progress at every turn. Imagine what we could accomplish with a Governor who leads, instead of slow-walking commonsense solutions. I’m asking for your help as I fight to bring leadership back to the Governor’s Office. Will you support this campaign with a $5 contribution today? = Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, . | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58773879:J8QwGF2Nr:m:1:3299561967:B2404B0396A9156A928439D7098BB177:r)
---
Patriot,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now with trial underway, it has been falling apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this - Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58773879:J8QwGF2Nr:m:1:3299561967:B2404B0396A9156A928439D7098BB177:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58773879:J8QwGF2Nr:m:1:3299561967:B2404B0396A9156A928439D7098BB177:r)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58773879:J8QwGF2Nr:m:1:3299561967:B2404B0396A9156A928439D7098BB177:r)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58773959:JwqbIF2Nr:m:1:3298722022:D9024E0E84347F3B5519977A55B419DB:r)
---
Peter,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now with trial underway, it has been falling apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this - Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58773959:JwqbIF2Nr:m:1:3298722022:D9024E0E84347F3B5519977A55B419DB:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58773959:JwqbIF2Nr:m:1:3298722022:D9024E0E84347F3B5519977A55B419DB:r)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58773959:JwqbIF2Nr:m:1:3298722022:D9024E0E84347F3B5519977A55B419DB:r)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58773959:JwqbIF2Nr:m:1:3298722022:D9024E0E84347F3B5519977A55B419DB:r)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Sen. Grassley has accepted Trump's endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
We can defeat hate and flip Iowa blue, but I need your help...
| | |
---
Hey, Peter. I'm reaching out to humbly ask for your support in my race for Iowa's Senate seat. **My opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), recently announced his reelection campaign and was just endorsed by Donald Trump at a MAGA rally in Iowa last month.** I know that together we can defeat him and flip Iowa blue, but right now I need your help ahead of my mid-month fundraising deadline.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38644349/316422527/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk385-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTg2YThkZC0zNjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_U8PYzMV2lFwxO4n8NohhuRGtGW_n29uWY9B7K88uY=)
We know Sen. Grassley will be heavily backed by Mitch McConnell and his allies, and we need a surge of grassroots resources to flip Iowa blue. [**Can you help us get back on track by making a contribution of $5 or more right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38644350/316422535/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk385-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTg2YThkZC0zNjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_U8PYzMV2lFwxO4n8NohhuRGtGW_n29uWY9B7K88uY=)
Peter, our Senate majority is as thin as it can possibly be –and Democratic control of the Senate is the only reason we’ve been able to pass critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan and infrastructure investment to help working families in Iowa. Meanwhile, Sen. Grassley has lived in Washington for decades and turned his back on the interests of everyday Iowans. It’s long past time for new leadership.
But we can only win – and protect our Democratic Senate majority in the process – if we muster enough grassroots support to compete with a deeply entrenched incumbent like Sen. Grassley, who now has the unwavering support of Donald Trump. **[So please, can you help us hit this important mid-month fundraising goal by rushing a contribution of $5 or more right now? Every dollar you give will ensure we have the resources to flip Iowa blue and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38644351/316422538/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk385-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTg2YThkZC0zNjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_U8PYzMV2lFwxO4n8NohhuRGtGW_n29uWY9B7K88uY=)**
Thank you,

Abby
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38644352/316422539/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk385-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTg2YThkZC0zNjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_U8PYzMV2lFwxO4n8NohhuRGtGW_n29uWY9B7K88uY=)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/03f888b0-733d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/f186a8dd-3646-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTg2YThkZC0zNjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_U8PYzMV2lFwxO4n8NohhuRGtGW_n29uWY9B7K88uY=&id=117985518) | | Paid for by Abby for Iowa

body:

| Peter,

Tonight at midnight, our re-election campaign will reach our mid-quarter deadline before we need to report our quarterly fundraising totals to the FEC. With National Republican groups targeting Abigail and our district, your contributions help to ensure we have the resources to defend Abigail's track record in Congress. As you know, Abigail has worked tirelessly to improve life for Central Virginians - advocating for accessible healthcare and lower prescription drug costs, just to name a few of her efforts. In 2018 and 2020, Abigail won by fewer than 2 points, and we know 2022 will be just as tight a race. Outside spending groups are doing all they can to flip Abigail's seat, but your commitment strengthens our defenses.

To make sure we win re-election and keep the House blue, we're striving to run as strong a campaign as possible - and your support makes that goal possible. **We know our community of dedicated, driven supporters has Abigail 's back and believes in all she does for Central Virginia.**

[_**Your support fuels our campaign - will you join our efforts by contributing today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/_HnPfOJmCuLfAVDcObLanVURqPS7xxLNnfetu12IAdo=/oTWrwbCagZTixS-KmU-a1f5EAW5XfrOtrr5d-uQNkBg=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211115-1-EM&amount=25)

Whitney Holt

With National Republican groups targeting Abigail and our district, your contributions help to ensure we have the resources to defend Abigail's track record in Congress. | | | | | | | | As you know, Abigail has worked tirelessly to improve life for Central Virginians - advocating for accessible healthcare and lower prescription drug costs, just to name a few of her efforts. In 2018 and 2020, Abigail won by fewer than 2 points, and we know 2022 will be just as tight a race. Outside spending groups are doing all they can to flip Abigail's seat, but your commitment strengthens our defenses. To make sure we win re-election and keep the House blue, we're striving to run as strong a campaign as possible - and your support makes that goal possible. We know our community of dedicated, driven supporters has Abigail 's back and believes in all she does for Central Virginia. | Grateful, as always, Whitney Holt * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States | = | = | = ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit =. If you wish to receive fewer emails, =. =

Team, We’re already halfway through November, moving closer to the end of 2021 and less than a year away from the 2022 election. And unfortunately, grassroots fundraising has really died down this month. **This race for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District is one of the most important in the country.** If we’re going to defend our Democratic majority in the House and continue passing life-changing legislation like the historic infrastructure package, we need to flip this seat blue. Gabe is just the right leader to defeat far-right extremist Yvette Herrell and deliver results for southern New Mexico. He’s committed to making healthcare more affordable, acting on climate and protecting our environment, and strengthening voters’ and workers’ rights. But if he’s going to go up against Herrell next November and win, we need the resources to keep building our campaign between now and then. name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re trying to draw me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7pfpnkd5uepanglk03m51om251srhnqcfa6nba8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u4o66stnm3incp1kc5gr8t5jedq30s3mepqb1ptim1p7acr7coqm0oric5gj4o77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0slmcopb9d9l61r6aphgm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or6cdie9pr4cli649fg)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcms57l4a5eguk414f04qat8b2etsvcsjg7lad58_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjieep35chh2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh8jpf8ni5ll3j6ulg0n4ecsf452fq635v03j550_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjieep35chh2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo7ebtbjh4p5ormee69hq5jcdv95ptv2ohltcmk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjieep35chh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7ulsg43qevl5eh6fgeb8g3g7abusbrjgtql8lv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjieep35chh2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4p96f8qkplaaguu4hf68m0act1alpoahlt9op4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjieep35chh2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk1rlhc1gtesq6b29v1polseke0g88rtund10oog_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjieep35chh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoprqoe637f2a6dvbtvug4itqlnlr39dmhiqo4ag_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjieep35chh2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9msvpf81lrqmt1t9kdgh8m7dqrk2m85gi3luttg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cjieep35chh2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! | Fellow American, They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again. RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points. The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties. whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years. My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic. Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down. No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built. Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by: Forcing critical race theory into our schools. Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts. Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY. That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that ** You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country. I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people! **The good news is that experts agree we have a real chance at flipping Arizona blue and electing a Democratic governor – the very thing The Washington Post says we NEED in order to defeat GOP extremism. **Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling our battleground governor's race a TOSS-UP – and considering that POLITICO already called this the most competitive open-seat race in the country, this rating is a HUGE deal.
**But the bad news is that we're currently way below our mid-month goal**** – while our new extremist opponent is steadily rising in the polls****. If we don't raise another $6,481 before our mid-month deadline, Trump's handpicked candidate could surge ahead at the WORST moment. [So please, friend, will you chip in toward our mid-month goal to help defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38645193/316426061/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk298-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjM3ZmI1YS0zYTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GUQhifLViX3l9mESaDY9Q2KRT7T42PPeSqO7PQyaLrQ=)**

We have the strategy in place – but to overcome our Trump-backed opponent and the GOP megadonors, we have to hit every single goal between now and Election Day, including this one.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38645378/316427030/1329859415?refcode=EM_FR_211115climate_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmY5YzdiZS0zYjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mFKnCYpjdLTjF2YpbtS4KAWPzimTt64H9c486QKmyp0=) Peter,

_Our planet is running out of time,_ but we’re taking significant steps towards healing it. The United Nations Climate Change Conference (COP26) just ended, and **leaders from around the world have stepped up to curb climate change.**

More than 200 countries came together, pledging to cut methane emissions, dedicating trillions to clean energy, and committing to halt and reverse deforestation worldwide. These are the historic investments we need to stop climate change.

_But, our work isn’t done._ As former President Barack Obama put it, **we need young people to “stay angry”!** To meet our pledges, we need leaders dedicated to solving climate change.

We must protect seats like Shontel's to hold the Democratic majority in the House, or Republicans like Jim Jordan will take over leadership and stop our progress. Our planet depends on us. Together we can lead the world into the green future we need.

Onward,

Shontel Brown for Congress

As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. body:
A selfie video would be helpful | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d5206d0a5a0c/i-need-your-voice?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Today, we're launching our "Why I Support Dr. Scott Jensen 'Selfie' Video" effort! Do you support our campaign? Can you tell us why? Simply record yourself and tell us why you support our movement and [**submit the video here!**](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=28b4325060&e=33b11688c1)

We'll pick the 5 best videos at the end of the week on Friday and send the winners a [**"Heal Minnesota" Christmas ornament!**](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e7e2a0e926&e=33b11688c1)
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=194ed6968d&e=33b11688c1)
---
| This campaign continues to gain grassroots momentum! We just need your voice to contribute. Grab your phone, hit record, and let us know why you're ALL IN on our campaign to Heal Minnesota. Whether it's just you or your family, we want to see your "Jensen Supporter Selfie" video! Once submitted, we may use it on social media to show the rest of the state that Tim Walz is in deep trouble. [Submit your](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=314ead41b6&e=33b11688c1)[ selfie video](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=9963f57063&e=33b11688c1) and show the power of grassroots momentum!

Let's do this!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Minnesota Governor

body:
Team --

I promise to keep this short -- tomorrow at midnight our campaign is facing an important mid-month deadline. This is one of the last fundraising deadlines of the year, and what we raise now will set the pace for our campaign ahead of the primary in 2022.

**[Can we count on you to chip in $3, $10, or whatever you can toward Karen's campaign for mayor?](https://act.myngp.com/el/doW-GzCUjl9qPnStDrn-edjLeVOgE6DJsePIc2BCyzw=/5cpJDcR5lNeEpQpU3Saq8YJkbGinK542bjmOPHjBDLI=?ms=em21_211115_mm2_fndd_gq_geoost___JH_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211115_mm2_fndd_gq_geoost___JH_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211115_mm2_fndd_gq_geoost___JH_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211115_mm2_fndd_gq_geoost___JH_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

Thanks for all you do,

Jamarah Hayner
Campaign Manager
Karen Bass for Mayor

P.S. See, it was short! I always keep my promises -- have a great rest of your weekend.

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: the whole country is counting on us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Your donation can help tip the scale in our favor, so it would mean the world to me if you contributed
| | |
---
Hi, friend –

Our campaign isn't run by millionaires or special interests; it's powered by people like you. **The hard truth is this: Florida will be the most expensive 2022 Senate race – and I can't win without you and a strong team behind me. **
When our fundraising numbers went public last month, the strength of our grassroots movement shocked the political establishment. I'm proud of that, our $28 average gift – and you, friend. I want better for Florida and our country, and we're building a wave of grassroots support strong enough to win against Marco Rubio's far-right megadonors.
But if there's one thing I learned from the GOP's wins in Virginia this month, it's that our fight to flip Florida blue is still an uphill battle. Together we're gaining ground: Recent polls have me neck and neck with Marco Rubio. But every dollar and every fundraising goal will make or break this race – **and we're still $13,881 short of our critical Mid Month goal. **
The whole nation is looking at us, friend. Florida is one of Democrats' best pickup opportunities and could determine Senate control. With everything from defending voting rights to protecting reproductive freedoms hinging on who controls the Senate, missing tonight's goal isn't an option.
Asking you for money like this isn't my favorite part of this race, friend – but it's critical to the movement we're building. The whole country is counting on us to help defend the Senate, and your donation can help tip the scale in our favor, so it would mean the world to me if you contributed $5 now:
**Here's the best link to donate:** **[secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38645398/316427079/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1641-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Y5YzdiZS0zYjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvwjcTaWAQS79ihyCeLGYs5FCJ5sbSwAD8-iz0zqHI4=)**
I really appreciate your support,

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. clean_body: Your donation can help tip the scale in our favor, so it would mean the world to me if you contributed | | | Hi, friend – Our campaign isn't run by millionaires or special interests; it's powered by people like you. The hard truth is this: Florida will be the most expensive 2022 Senate race – and I can't win without you and a strong team behind me. When our fundraising numbers went public last month, the strength of our grassroots movement shocked the political establishment. I'm proud of that, our $28 average gift – and you, friend. I want better for Florida and our country, and we're building a wave of grassroots support strong enough to win against Marco Rubio's far-right megadonors. But if there's one thing I learned from the GOP's wins in Virginia this month, it's that our fight to flip Florida blue is still an uphill battle. Together we're gaining ground: Recent polls have me neck and neck with Marco Rubio. But every dollar and every fundraising goal will make or break this race – and we're still $13,881 short of our critical Mid Month goal. The whole nation is looking at us, friend. Florida is one of Democrats' best pickup opportunities and could determine Senate control. With everything from defending voting rights to protecting reproductive freedoms hinging on who controls the Senate, missing tonight's goal isn't an option. Asking you for money like this isn't my favorite part of this race, friend – but it's critical to the movement we're building. The whole country is counting on us to help defend the Senate, and your donation can help tip the scale in our favor, so it would mean the world to me if you contributed $5 now: Here's the best link to donate: = I really appreciate your support, Val Demings | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Team,

You're a part of our amazing grassroots team because you understand our critical mission: **we need a change in leadership in the Ohio Secretary of State's office.**

Ohio Republicans have spent the last half of this year scheming to take the power of the vote out of our hands. Instead of playing fair, they're aiming for total control of our democracy, going as far as building State House maps **with only 16% of the districts expected to be competitive.**

We can't ignore the writing on the wall: if we allow Ohio Republicans to keep gerrymandering our state, the votes and voices of Black, brown, and all Ohioans will be watered down into nothing. That's why we need to send Chelsea straight to Columbus.

**[Today is the midpoint for November, and we need a big push in fundraising to help us stay competitive and hit our goals for the month. Will you chip in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can do today to help us reach our 32 donation goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38645686/316428833/956498204?refcode=EM_FR_211115fairness_MM_TC_90D_6_NG_TESTA_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWZjZDhkNy0zZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=67fJMQJ39xB3LIPipeMmoK-tKWpnZX07bSbfQn03A0I=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38645688/316428835/956498204?refcode=EM_FR_211115fairness_MM_TC_90D_6_NG_TESTA_el10&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWZjZDhkNy0zZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=67fJMQJ39xB3LIPipeMmoK-tKWpnZX07bSbfQn03A0I=)

Our best bet to protect our democracy and the will of Ohio voters is making Chelsea Clark the next Secretary of State for Ohio. She's ready to defend our voting rights and outlaw gerrymandering once and for all.

**[But we need your help to get us there. So help us hit our $1,372 48-hour mid-month goal for November and bring us one step closer to bringing real change for Ohioans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38645702/316428849/956498204?refcode=EM_FR_211115fairness_MM_TC_90D_6_NG_TESTA_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWZjZDhkNy0zZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=67fJMQJ39xB3LIPipeMmoK-tKWpnZX07bSbfQn03A0I=)**

Thank you,

Team Chelsea

| | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

name: Peter Franchot
subject: My vision for a transit-oriented future
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
If I’m blessed to be Maryland’s next Governor, I will shore up Maryland’s economy for the 21st century, and lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. Central to my vision is building a world-class, integrated and statewide transit system that connects all corners of the state.
The strength of any economy lies in the number and quality of its connections -- and that reality is especially evident when it comes to transportation. Let’s look at the Baltimore region for example. Even though Baltimore is our largest city and our cultural crown jewel, only 9% of jobs are currently accessible by public transit in an hour or less. The system has fallen dramatically behind its East Coast peers, and it will need a generation’s worth of sustained investment to catch up.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/transitnovember2021?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/transitnovember2021?amount=20.22]Under my administration, we’re not going to pass the buck. I’ll break ground on a transformational East-West mass transit line to make the city more accessible, while also ensuring system-wide improvements for everyone in the Baltimore Metropolitan Region. Elsewhere in the state, I will also ensure completion of the Purple Line light rail, and will support expansion of the Green Line from Branch Avenue in Prince George’s County to Charles County to relieve traffic congestion on one of the main arteries into DC.
I can’t wait to get started on building a world-class, integrated and statewide transit system that will help kickstart our economy, improve our state’s competitiveness, create family-supporting jobs, and help our state transition to a green economy by lowering carbon emissions. But in order to get there, I’m going to need your help to win this competitive race. A recent poll has shown that I am leading the race for Governor. Will you chip in to help us meet our fundraising goals and maintain our lead?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/transitnovember2021?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/transitnovember2021?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/transitnovember2021?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/transitnovember2021?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/transitnovember2021]I’m building an inclusive, people-powered movement to change the way that government does business. clean_body: [ Peter, If I’m blessed to be Maryland’s next Governor, I will shore up Maryland’s economy for the 21st century, and lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. Central to my vision is building a world-class, integrated and statewide transit system that connects all corners of the state. The strength of any economy lies in the number and quality of its connections -- and that reality is especially evident when it comes to transportation. Let’s look at the Baltimore region for example. Even though Baltimore is our largest city and our cultural crown jewel, only 9% of jobs are currently accessible by public transit in an hour or less. The system has fallen dramatically behind its East Coast peers, and it will need a generation’s worth of sustained investment to catch up. [ my administration, we’re not going to pass the buck. I’ll break ground on a transformational East-West mass transit line to make the city more accessible, while also ensuring system-wide improvements for everyone in the Baltimore Metropolitan Region. Elsewhere in the state, I will also ensure completion of the Purple Line light rail, and will support expansion of the Green Line from Branch Avenue in Prince George’s County to Charles County to relieve traffic congestion on one of the main arteries into DC. I can’t wait to get started on building a world-class, integrated and statewide transit system that will help kickstart our economy, improve our state’s competitiveness, create family-supporting jobs, and help our state transition to a green economy by lowering carbon emissions. But in order to get there, I’m going to need your help to win this competitive race. A recent poll has shown that I am leading the race for Governor. Will you chip in to help us meet our fundraising goals and maintain our lead? CHIP IN $10 [] CHIP IN $20.22 [] CHIP IN $50 [] CHIP IN $100 [] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [’m building an inclusive, people-powered movement to change the way that government does business. With your help, we’re going to win this race, take back the Governor’s Mansion in November 2022, and get to work on delivering the concrete points of progress to lift our communities into the quality of life that they deserve. Maryland’s economy is poised to lead in the 21st century, but until world-class transit reaches every corner of the state, we lack a key driver for that economic growth and a means through which all communities can benefit from it. Hop on board, and let’s get it done. [] Thank you, [] DONATE [ Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer Friends of Peter Franchot P.O. name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: It’s time to legalize marijuana in Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/Image%2011-8-21%20at%2012.28%20PM.jpg]Howdy,
Earlier this spring, we said that the Indiana Democratic Party was not going to treat 2021 as an “off year.” We set out -- together -- to go everywhere and talk to everyone about issues that are popular in the Hoosier State.
This promise is why I’m excited to announce that the Indiana Democratic Party is calling on the Indiana General Assembly to legalize recreational marijuana during the 2022 legislative session.
We’re serious. Legalizing cannabis would bring transformational -- and positive -- changes to Indiana. And here’s the best part: more than 80-percent of Hoosiers already support some form of legalization.
So when Democrats claim it’s one of the most-pressing issues important to voters, we literally mean it.
And I’ll cut the bull and just say it: If the Indiana Republican Party does not join Democrats in the effort this upcoming legislative session in the Indiana General Assembly, then we’re ready to hit the road and make this a major issue for the 2022 midterm elections.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane_other=true&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane_other=true&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.]

More than 78-percent of Hoosiers think it’s unnecessary for people to be arrested for simple possession. And again, marijuana has large, bipartisan support. Democrats are done waiting and ready to take action in making this better future happen for the Hoosier State.
Now this is where we need you. Democrats have a feeling Indiana Republicans like Gov. Eric Holcomb will let their extreme partisanship get the best of them and deny the large majority -- and our state economy -- this opportunity.
In fact, we believe Holcomb will ironically let the bureaucratic process get in the way of an issue that’s been solved by more than 18 other states. Those are 18 Republican and Democratic states.
If this happens and Indiana Republicans refuse to join Democrats to help legalize cannabis this upcoming session, we’ll be ready to take this campaign on the road for next year’s elections. We’ll be ready to crisscross Indiana and talk with farmers, business owners, veterans, and everyday Hoosiers about why this common-sense idea must become law -- and how Democrats are the ones pushing it.
Join us in this fight. Chip in whatever you can now to help us gear up for the battle that’s ahead of us. And most importantly, support Democratic candidates at the ballot box next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/indems?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1]
Help us make this opportunity a reality for the Hoosier State. Democrats are ready to deliver once again for our voters, but we’re going to need your help to get it done.
Sincerely,
Mike Schmuhl
Chairman

Indiana Democratic Party
115 W Washington
INDLPS, IN 46202
United States
Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team Mondaire
subject: Republicans only need five seats to take back control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hi friend,
We’ll get straight to the point:
Due to redistricting, Mondaire’s seat could be in jeopardy in 2022. Republicans only need five seats to take back control of the House, and they'll do everything in their power to do so.
Mondaire is on the frontlines of many important battles, including the fight to expand the Supreme Court to protect our reproductive and voting rights, securing universal child care in the Build Back Better Act, calling for the filibuster to be abolished, and passing life-changing legislation to get our country back on track.
If Republicans take back control of the House, they'll waste no time undoing the progress Democrats have made for everyday Americans.

subject: falling short

body:
We're only about 62% of the way to our goal
#

Hey there,
In just a moment, we're going to ask you to make a $3 contribution to Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign for U.S. Senate. Please give us a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here's the truth:
We launched a 72-hour fundraising drive to keep our fundraising on pace before tonight's mid-quarter deadline.
But right now, we're only about 62% of the way to our goal, and it looks like we might fall short.
For campaigns like ours that rely on grassroots donations, November is always a very difficult fundraising month.
But Pennsylvania's open Senate seat is going to be the most competitive race of 2022, and it will be tough to stay competitive if we don't hit our fundraising goals.
So we're asking you to pitch in. We can't do this alone.
[Can Malcolm count on you to make a $3 contribution before our deadline tonight? name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Do you have a minute?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
|
---
| | | Hey, Patriot, do you have a minute?

Republicans are coming up on a very important deadline and are currently pacing behind the Democrats. This is the worst-case scenario for Republicans in battleground elections.
---
| | | [HELP REPUBLICANS CATCH UP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775559:JlDUHF2dN:m:1:3299561967:0F8FB5DD58F25638AA31E5C75330FAF5:r "HELP REPUBLICANS CATCH UP")

---
**My friend Tim Scott is one of the Republicans who needs our help. He 's facing a tough reelection and Democrats want nothing more than to unseat him in the Senate.**
**I 'll get right to it, Patriot, if every patriot I'm emailing doesn't step up before Midnight, Tim Scott will miss his Mid Month Deadline and our chances of restoring a Conservative Majority in the Senate will be DOOMED!**
We can't afford to let this happen. America needs Tim Scott's leadership in the Senate. _**[So if you can, please rush emergency funds toward Tim Scott's Mid Month Goal NOW!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775559:JlDUHF2dN:m:1:3299561967:0F8FB5DD58F25638AA31E5C75330FAF5:r "So if you can, please rush emergency funds toward Tim Scott’s Mid Month Goal NOW!")**_

Republicans across the country are gearing up for the fight of their lives. We are working to restore a Conservative Majority across all levels of government, but we need your help.

Every supporter and every contribution can and will make a difference in the next election.

Reaching our Mid-Month Deadline is essential in our plan to defeat the radical Left once and for all. _**[Patriot, can I count on you to step up and help me ensure victory for Republicans?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775559:JlDUHF2dN:m:1:3299561967:0F8FB5DD58F25638AA31E5C75330FAF5:r "Patriot, can I
count on you to step up and help me ensure victory for Republicans?")**_

Thank you for your continued support of efforts to take back the Majority and protect our Conservative values.

To victory,

Congressman Dan Crenshaw
---
| |

* * *

---

---

Patriot, there is less than one year until Election Day.

Republicans are ready for a RED WAVE to win back the House and Senate.

But Democrats are raising MILLIONS from wealthy donors. They will do ANYTHING to stop Republicans from winning.

I'm asking for your help to overcome the Democrats' fundraising advantage and finally stop Joe Biden's agenda in Congress.

_**[Will you be the patriot who puts Republicans over the top and saves our country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775561:JlDUHF2dN:m:1:3299561967:0F8FB5DD58F25638AA31E5C75330FAF5:r "Will you be the patriot who puts Republicans over the top and saves our country?")**_

Thanks for your tremendous support,
Tim Scott

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Media lies about Rittenhouse
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58774990:JL2VhF2fN:m:1:3253819041:35F2A6C66AA4993AF74BBB527915C7CD:r)
Peter,

The liberal media is attacking the Rittenhouse trial with everything they have:

* The liberal liars at MSNBC are calling the judge a white supremacist.

* The liberal liars at CNN had one of Rittenhouse's attackers on Anderson Cooper, telling a different story than what he testified at the trial.

* The liberal liars continue to paint Kyle as racist and evil despite any evidence.

**The attacks on truthful reporting have escalated as the liberal bias in the media is being exposed more than ever before. **

Let me tell you how my organization, the Media Research Center (MRC) is defeating the liberal liars in the media. We are the only organization solely dedicated to exposing media bias.

_When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the liberal bias in the media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media_.

[**I am asking for your urgent support today to help us expose the lies being told in the Rittenhouse trial. Can you click here to donate $10, $35, $50, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58774990:JL2VhF2fN:m:1:3253819041:35F2A6C66AA4993AF74BBB527915C7CD:r)

Here is how the Media Research Center is TAKING DOWN the Fake News media:

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.

* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.

* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58774990:JL2VhF2fN:m:1:3253819041:35F2A6C66AA4993AF74BBB527915C7CD:r)

Americans are waking up to the bias. Trust in the media is at an all time low. It's in large part due to our work.

But MRC does not have woke corporations supporting us. We rely 100% on Americans who believe in American values of truth over the media.

**I am reaching out to you to help us raise $25,000 online to expand our operations. **

[**Please send an urgent donation today to MRC and support our work.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58774990:JL2VhF2fN:m:1:3253819041:35F2A6C66AA4993AF74BBB527915C7CD:r)
[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $5,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58774990:JL2VhF2fN:m:1:3253819041:35F2A6C66AA4993AF74BBB527915C7CD:r)

Believe in America, not the media.

We are winning this battle for truth in reporting. But as we expose the media, their attacks increase. Your support can help us fight back.

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

Trust in the media is at an all time low. It's in large part due to our work. But MRC does not have woke corporations supporting us. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Not where we need to be
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Congress
body:
Not where we need to be

We really need to turn this ship around, or we lose.

Hey, it's Donald Trump Jr.

I'm reaching out with some troubling news. We're already halfway through November, and House Conservatives are at only 30% of their goal for this month.

**Even worse, Democrats are on track to outraise Republicans for the second month in a row.**

We came up short last month, and we're paying the price.

Nancy Pelosi's liberal allies are flooding swing states with propaganda advertising targeting my father's America First allies in Congress.

They're trying to cancel the MAGA movement once and for all. Well, I'm not sitting by and letting them get away with it.

[**I 'm challenging every Patriot who receives this email to pledge just $15. That's it. That's all we need from every supporter on this list.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775568:Jo6lhF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:69FC66525F675D38892A2F94E67D1435:r)
| [STEP UP NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775568:Jo6lhF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:69FC66525F675D38892A2F94E67D1435:r)
---

[CHIP IN $15](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775568:Jo6lhF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:69FC66525F675D38892A2F94E67D1435:r)
---

I'm confident that with your help, we'll make up ground and hit our goal for November. If we make this goal, we'll finally have the resources we need to fight back against the Democrats' flood of negative ads.
[FIGHT BACK AGAINST PELOSI PROPAGANDA ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775568:Jo6lhF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:69FC66525F675D38892A2F94E67D1435:r)
---
**
Don 't sit on the sidelines. We need you in this fight.**

Thanks,
Don Jr.

_[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775569:Jo6lhF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:69FC66525F675D38892A2F94E67D1435:r)_

_Peter, we are just FIVE SEATS away from a Republican House Majority.
Your support is the key to firing Nancy Pelosi, restoring the Trump Majority, and Saving America from Democrat destruction. _

_[**I am personally asking YOU to join President Trump and me in this fight to win back control of Congress**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775569:Jo6lhF2ZN:m:1:3298722022:69FC66525F675D38892A2F94E67D1435:r)_ _.
America as we know it is on the line. We can't sit on the sidelines and let Pelosi and the Squad ram their radical agenda down our throats.

Thank you for standing with me in the fight to Fire Pelosi and Save America.

Rep. Elise Stefanik
Chairwoman, House GOP Conference _

Paid for by Elise for Congress
---

Elise Stefanik
PO Box 500
Glens Falls, NY, 12801

We are now quickly approaching our first fundraising deadline since the BIG Republican victories, and all eyes are watching to see if we can meet our goal. We are still coming up $17,750 short, but I know we can close the gap if enough patriotic Americans chip in whatever they can.

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda \- from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are all hoping we fail to meet our goal.

You can **[CLICK HERE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2v06g-1kurm-4qqlpo4/ "CLICK HERE")** to rush an emergency donation right now. No matter how large or small, every dollar will go a long way toward closing the gap and putting us over the top.

Please **[rush a $25 donation](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2v06g-1kurn-4qqlpo5/ "rush a donation")** RIGHT NOW. It could be the difference in whether we win or lose.

Thanks,
\- Mike

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies.
_Sponsored message_
| | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2d7o5p4j9q0oskrhl0rqqlqa959mqbgdbavs8r0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o72chh2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now with trial underway, it has been falling apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znee01ig75009qisq125d4kui2pmr8vk2hv2pmvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o72chh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8b1tpdn6c0kjbm0c99u2ol28dsl5ll34nejgfp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o72chh2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zag36q8f2lohmd77bmcpb6tk7r4u81d6u5djaumo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o72chh2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5ika7u23vp8a2h8sk7adc741b8d3mit3lhhvrdg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o72chh2bs)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
I am running for governor to serve ALL of the people of Texas.

I believe that the only way we are going to achieve great things for this
state is by looking out for each other and moving forward together.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=162363%2E444211%2EXCotur ]Donate now to support my campaign »

Whether it was building a successful technology business in my hometown or
working with my fellow El Pasoans on the City Council or passing
legislation in a divided Congress to improve mental healthcare for
veterans, these experiences have taught me that we are most successful
when we keep the focus on people.

When we listen to and learn from each other — regardless of our
differences — we build trust, and that trust allows us to do together what
none of us could do on our own.

The fringe policies and incompetence that we see in Texas today — on
masks, on abortion, on guns, on schools, on the electricity grid — are
symptoms of a larger problem. Our leaders have stopped listening to the
people they were elected to serve. They don’t trust Texans and so they
aren’t able to move forward on what the people of Texas want, like better
jobs and safe communities.

Instead, they’re focused on the agendas of their donors, on positioning
themselves for the next election, on catering to the loudest voices in
their party and on keeping themselves in power regardless of the cost to
the rest of us.

It’s a small vision for such a big state. And it’s hurting the people of
Texas.

We could be leading the world in creating the next generation of energy
jobs instead of praying the electricity grid won’t collapse again this
winter.

We could expand Medicaid and ensure that every one of us is healthy enough
to pursue our education and career instead of leading the nation in the
number of people unable to see a doctor.

We could follow the guidance from our own world-class scientists and
healthcare professionals to protect vulnerable Texans instead of allowing
politics to determine our response to the pandemic. More than 70,000
Texans have died of Covid on this Governor’s watch.

We are losing the big, bold vision that used to define Texas, a Texas big
enough for all of us. Big enough for our dreams and big enough to make
them happen. We’ve been offered something small, mean and uninspiring in
its place.

But it doesn’t have to be this way.

We can do better.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=162363%2E444211%2EXCotur ]Donate now »

When I ran for Senate in 2018, I traveled to every county of Texas. I met
a lot of people, and had the chance to listen to and learn from them. How
they lived, what they cared about, what kept them up at night, what they
dreamed for their kids and grandkids. It turns out that in most
communities, people have thought through the solutions to the challenges
before them. They don’t need someone to tell them what’s best for them,
they just need someone to listen and then take action.

Something else I picked up, and it’s stayed with me ever since, is that
it’s impossible to write someone off, to take them for granted, to forget
them once you’ve had the chance to meet them and understand where they’re
coming from. I’ve got a strong hunch that if we took the time to listen
more and learn from each other, there’s a whole lot more we could get
done, in our lives, in our communities, and in our state.

I didn’t win that race, or the next one (not even close). But I stayed
with it, kept working to help the people I’d met, the communities I’d been
to. In the face of so much that could cause despair — like the
unprecedented attack on voting rights or the failure of the electricity
grid — I found hope and purpose in the people with whom I volunteered for
the last two years in an organization called Powered by People.

We worked to bring people into our elections and the political process.
Together we helped register more than 250,000 new voters. We organized our
fellow Texans to defend our democracy in the halls of the state capitol
when free and fair elections were under attack. And then we went beyond
the capitol to counties like Rains and Midland, Harris and Dallas, Bowie
and Jefferson, bringing as many people of this state into the conversation
as we could — Republicans and Democrats alike — to listen to each other
and try to find common ground on the right to vote.

And when the lights went out, the heater wouldn’t turn on and the water
stopped running for millions of Texans in February, together we organized
thousands of volunteers to make over a million phone calls to stranded
Texas seniors — connecting them with food, water, warmth and the knowledge
that another human being cared about them and wanted to make sure they
were OK.

Our volunteers raised over a million dollars to help those whose homes had
been damaged in the disaster. Their governor might fail them, but the
people of Texas wouldn’t.

That’s what happens when people are moved to come together to help their
neighbors and fellow Texans. Imagine if we had a governor who felt the
same way.

It’s up to us to make it happen.

And get back to being big again.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=162363%2E444211%2EXCotur ]I hope you’ll join us and make a donation to become one of our first
grassroots donors. Your support today will make a big difference in the
success of this campaign.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=162363%2E444211%2EXCotur ]Donate now »

I look forward to working with you for ALL of Texas,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=162363%2E444211%2EXCotur

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

It turns out that in most communities, people have thought through the solutions to the challenges before them. They don’t need someone to tell them what’s best for them, they just need someone to listen and then take action. Something else I picked up, and it’s stayed with me ever since, is that it’s impossible to write someone off, to take them for granted, to forget them once you’ve had the chance to meet them and understand where they’re coming from. I’ve got a strong hunch that if we took the time to listen more and learn from each other, there’s a whole lot more we could get done, in our lives, in our communities, and in our state. I didn’t win that race, or the next one (not even close). But I stayed with it, kept working to help the people I’d met, the communities I’d been to. In the face of so much that could cause despair — like the unprecedented attack on voting rights or the failure of the electricity grid — I found hope and purpose in the people with whom I volunteered for the last two years in an organization called Powered by People. We worked to bring people into our elections and the political process. Together we helped register more than 250,000 new voters. We organized our fellow Texans to defend our democracy in the halls of the state capitol when free and fair elections were under attack. And then we went beyond the capitol to counties like Rains and Midland, Harris and Dallas, Bowie and Jefferson, bringing as many people of this state into the conversation as we could — Republicans and Democrats alike — to listen to each other and try to find common ground on the right to vote. And when the lights went out, the heater wouldn’t turn on and the water stopped running for millions of Texans in February, together we organized thousands of volunteers to make over a million phone calls to stranded Texas seniors — connecting them with food, water, warmth and the knowledge that another human being cared about them and wanted to make sure they were OK. Our volunteers raised over a million dollars to help those whose homes had been damaged in the disaster. Their governor might fail them, but the people of Texas wouldn’t. That’s what happens when people are moved to come together to help their neighbors and fellow Texans. Imagine if we had a governor who felt the same way. It’s up to us to make it happen. And get back to being big again. [ ]I hope you’ll join us and make a donation to become one of our first grassroots donors. Your support today will make a big difference in the success of this campaign. [ ]Donate now » I look forward to working with you for ALL of Texas, Beto

Peter, we're on the verge of a huge milestone: This is the FIRST mid-month benchmark we've set since I announced my candidacy for governor of New York, and we're so close to our goal of 1,000 donors!

That said, we're falling short – which is why I want to explain why hitting this goal is so critical: I am running for governor to defend the vulnerable and the voiceless from the wealthiest and most powerful interests. And I need you by my side to make this historic grassroots movement as strong as it can possibly be.
**We're so close to reaching 1,000 online donations to our campaign, but it looks like your name is still missing.**[**Will you rush $5 or more right now to fuel this grassroots movement for justice and equality?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38648993/316443213/1687198019?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk195-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjJmNDQ0Zi00ODQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SIZqOHkp5x3mw0vdeVCYHsv0GhdG0t9BrNwTj-v3W0=)

As governor, I will create the change New York needs. I will build an economy that invests in good-paying jobs. A health care system that puts people over profits. Everyone will have access to the good schools and affordable housing they deserve, and I'll launch an aggressive plan to tackle climate change and create a brighter future for all New Yorkers.
With you on my team, I will continue this fight against wealthy and powerful special interests as your governor – but I can't win this fight alone.

**Our grassroots movement is counting on the support of fearless fighters like you to make my vision of a more equal, progressive New York a reality, Peter.[So please, will you become a donor with a gift of $5 or more right now to help us reach this first mid-month goal of my campaign? We still need 185 donations to reach our goal! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38648994/316443214/1687198019?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk195-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjJmNDQ0Zi00ODQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SIZqOHkp5x3mw0vdeVCYHsv0GhdG0t9BrNwTj-v3W0=)**
Thank you so much for being on this team.

Letitia James

name: Team Bennet
subject: Michael wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38648985/316443205/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzgyNDk0OS00ODQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTmIU_GLDGWLHjWFlpJzvfLqRCchEVwgMHPZPnq9wME=)
Today, families in Colorado and nationwide are receiving another monthly payment thanks to Michael’s work to expand the Child Tax Credit. Michael is working on passing a further extension of the expanded Child Tax Credit, which has already kept three million children out of poverty nationwide. Take a look at how it’s helped Coloradans: _“I was out of a job for nearly a year due to the pandemic and we were living on savings, with every dollar we could spare going toward groceries. The advance Child Tax Credit payments were literally keeping our two children fed.”_ — _Denver parent_ _“It’s helped me to stay afloat and pay for bills and helps me pay rent, food, and necessities of day-to-day life for my kids. I have three, ages 14, 11, and 5 months old.”_ — _Englewood parent_ Research shows that this tax cut is pumping hundreds of millions of dollars into Colorado’s economy _every month_ — it isn’t just good for parents, it’s good for the economy that all Coloradans rely on. Now, Michael wants to hear from you so we’re collecting stories about the impact of the Child Tax Credit. **How has the Child Tax Credit temporary expansion helped you or those in your community? name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re trying to draw me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zih3hsrbkr6uqgo1m9bj75o26c75f2rcvfp2f86o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o76c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65srksprbasrge5qeepb1c6q65d3kmlp7eplj6uqjadlj6lpj5d32e9hr0s9l6ljjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbephkcspm2ptncdj39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm0mok50q1q97r1aqu6b20eo131epofs9m0jrt50_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o76c9h2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpb5416d8kld82sts6lp9d41b6ho3erfv0r31g00_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o76c9h2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdd4mknc8v1qen9fgf3mtu7cbgslcufiqdjhc5vo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o76c9h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbuu492d9p4t6v23el37lm93019qop0rqho43cp0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o76c9h2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaf4bgskisl6ovpo0h335iovc0bph80k02qlblh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o76c9h2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z78crefv7g6ll8tqtbg9g1mkp5t9tt7khunjvfmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o76c9h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf1lgs8d8qhn46kv5ge1chdqvtjq6ln23n4355lg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o76c9h2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkqdg1bmtjrbl6kdgcgrgf223hpi113rg1eabj6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o76c9h2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk2bgjmt4db2vrd7vcjj4lkfcjh6d6pdrs055vu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o76c9h2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmgkuplev3hqobgjo4ctthfjmhohehr0i8shgsng_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g64o76c9h2bs)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---
