* * *

Huge news, friend.

**Beto O'Rourke just announced he's running for governor.** This is a big opportunity and with Beto bringing the strength of his organizing operation to the top of our ticket, this could be our best shot at flipping Texas blue.

Texans are unhappy with GOP Governor Greg Abbott. His approval rating has dropped and now stands at just 42%. He's been horrible on everything from responding to our extreme weather, women's reproductive rights, to voter disenfranchisement and gerrymandering.

Abbott is clearly vulnerable, but to defeat the GOP, Beto is going to need every Democrat in Texas to come out in the midterms. We need to boost turnout in solid blue cities like Austin so we can help flip the governor’s seat.

In 2018, Beto was just 214,921 votes short of winning statewide. With high Democratic voter turnout, in the bluest cities like Austin, our campaign can help close this gap for Beto in 2022. Last year, we went to over 50,000 doors and increased turnout to record heights in our district, leading all of Texas. That's why we’re in the best position to repeat our success in Austin and help Democrats win in the general statewide. We're prepared to do it again, but we need your help:

**[Turnout will determine whether or not we win this race. Will you split $5, $15, or even $35 to Beto and my campaign right now to be a Founding Donor that helps us build the operation necessary to flip Texas blue? clean_body: With Beto's announcement -- and Abbott's dropping approval -- what this means for our campaign. | = Beto O'Rourke is Officially Running for Governor = | = Huge news, friend. Beto O'Rourke just announced he's running for governor. This is a big opportunity and with Beto bringing the strength of his organizing operation to the top of our ticket, this could be our best shot at flipping Texas blue. Texans are unhappy with GOP Governor Greg Abbott. His approval rating has dropped and now stands at just 42%. He's been horrible on everything from responding to our extreme weather, women's reproductive rights, to voter disenfranchisement and gerrymandering. Abbott is clearly vulnerable, but to defeat the GOP, Beto is going to need every Democrat in Texas to come out in the midterms. We need to boost turnout in solid blue cities like Austin so we can help flip the governor’s seat. In 2018, Beto was just 214,921 votes short of winning statewide. With high Democratic voter turnout, in the bluest cities like Austin, our campaign can help close this gap for Beto in 2022. Last year, we went to over 50,000 doors and increased turnout to record heights in our district, leading all of Texas. That's why we’re in the best position to repeat our success in Austin and help Democrats win in the general statewide. name: Laura Loomer
subject: This scared me . . .
body:
Last night, I got this text from my fundraising director, Shane
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ozUmQgrGrmM3V85tyLlwCA/gCNxZHcCgRMFQz7632zZT5lQ)
Patriot,

Last night, I got this text from my fundraising director, Shane:

When he first texted me, “Laura, I have bad news.” I lost my breath.

Shane has never said anything like that in my years of working with him, and he is generally always optimistic.

So when he said he had bad news, it scared me.

Fundraising this month has been horrible, and I’ll explain that next, but please make an emergency donation now.

Across the board, fundraising for Republican candidates has been at the lowest levels that anyone has seen in nearly a decade!

Why?

They’re calling it “Republican apathy.”

First, Republicans are poised to make gains in the Mid-Terms — but not because voters are excited about our candidates, but because voters are sick of the Biden Regime!!

And if we don’t make some serious changes in our party leadership when we do take back control of the House, the GOP likely won’t be much different than the Democrat Party!

That’s why it’s vital I get in to Congress next year to shake things up by knocking out a Do-Nothing Republican!

[**Help me get there today!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ozUmQgrGrmM3V85tyLlwCA/gCNxZHcCgRMFQz7632zZT5lQ)

We have seven days to raise $14,700. [**Can you pitch in $20, $100 or even $10 today?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ozUmQgrGrmM3V85tyLlwCA/gCNxZHcCgRMFQz7632zZT5lQ)

We WILL gain back the House next year! But what will the Republican Party look like?

Will it be like Paul Ryan’s Congress that couldn’t get rid of Obamacare despite having total control of the government?

Or will we primary out RINO’s and Do-Nothing Republicans, and replace them with America First fighters like myself and finally become the party that holds the line against the Biden Regime and REVERSES their AMERICA LAST policies?

There’s only one way to answer that question: [**help me get to Congress**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ozUmQgrGrmM3V85tyLlwCA/gCNxZHcCgRMFQz7632zZT5lQ).

Thanks so much for all you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z51qfva77qmqg006ep8sr094d9qjghhlg1pubho8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g62p31c9h2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z78u587ajm222v2cvem21qeah9o4njm9r1chasp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g62p31c9h2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb2lkinngj5pqmc5pgcsk089ukioo97qpi9eic20_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g62p31c9h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zil8hns9pf006hsfoi3nigq52litjfbq6uiirm7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g62p31c9h2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztjn90rpbhn3kcotat6n54qku742bj2utvi961uo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g62p31c9h2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zplmf7d8dp63d5blli2728p0akqnkn1nrlupkus0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g62p31c9h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk5kk4odqsr6mj25f9bfrr1vuahohndbkhufba78_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g62p31c9h2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3uji76gffaqk9fovffkd2l05v1eqhev5d0s9nco_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g62p31c9h2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk4a48sltlkbukjgkj1m2qe6me8h4fdmb1sq3450_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g62p31c9h2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zru689p938km4i57fuuqo979t6uf3mbo233u3pk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g62p31c9h2bs)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z33l4nfsoho7bm3hj78elb256b15oevbj3b917o8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9jle8r7ccjkm1on9dtjmppq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuju1df34kqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69bls2on2s3isujqact4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf8pnm9qrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprf972u9hfad1k6mob4c3helhb2otks4qj4d3ksqq7aoplempn3dtjmlh6bchle9qj9ctke1h238h1e8he4933cpjm0o31chgm4oh5u)

Peter,

With unsettling outcomes in Virginia’s recent elections, our fight in Maryland is one Democrats can’t afford to lose.

That’s why we’re reaching out today. Despite huge endorsements from AFSCME (and 105 other unions!), U.S. Senators Alex Padilla and Ben Ray Lujan, CASA in Action, Cecile Richards, and more, our campaign’s fundraising isn’t cutting it.

**We have a $4,856 gap to fill and, if we’re being blunt, we’re concerned. We know we ask a lot, but we wouldn't if it absolutely necessary:[Will you please chip in? Your $12 would go a long way toward making up ground and advancing the bold vision that Tom has for Maryland. There’s still so much work left to do, so he’s counting on you to step up today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38653497/316446639/-520940794?refcode=bpi_em_20211115_MM3_ND&amount=12&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmJhY2Y1YS00ZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NlehdubB3atctj4CRiwvSK-GQrVDNuDi2-ExQ0r56f0=)**

It’s pretty simple: Tom should be governor because he’s an action-oriented leader who lives his values. He’ll ensure that everyone has access to a good-paying job and believes that every child can — and should — receive a world-class education. He’ll create an environment where small businesses can thrive, and he’ll govern on the principle that everyone deserves equal justice. **These aren’t campaign talking points for Tom -- he’s held these values, and governed with them, his entire career, and he’ll bring the same energy to Annapolis.**

But winning campaigns doesn’t just happen. It takes building a grassroots army one $12 donation at a time -- and that’s where you come in. **[Please donate $12 or as much as you can to send Tom to Annapolis to fight for our shared progressive values. He’ll have your back, he just needs you to have his.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38653504/316446654/-520940794?refcode=bpi_em_20211115_MM3_ND&amount=12&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmJhY2Y1YS00ZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NlehdubB3atctj4CRiwvSK-GQrVDNuDi2-ExQ0r56f0=)**

Our deadline is fast approaching, so thank you in advance for your help!

\-- All of us on Team Tom

******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38653505/316446655/-520940794?refcode=bpi_em_20211115_MM3_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmJhY2Y1YS00ZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NlehdubB3atctj4CRiwvSK-GQrVDNuDi2-ExQ0r56f0=)******

Results in New Jersey also showed us that voters are turning against the radical progressive agenda being championed by Joe Biden and his party faithful._
_So, their only strategy going forward will be to_ simply buy the 2022 election. **After all, in 2020, liberals invested**$164,789,750** to get Ralph Warnock elected to the U.S. Senate - imagine what they will spend to keep him there, and it's why we need to gin up our efforts early.**

you?")**
2022 will be an all-out war in Georgia, and we need to be ready. We can't wait until next Fall to have the resources--we need to be on the ground with people and supplies and in the air with ads TODAY!
The New Journey PAC is ready to hand a humiliating defeat to the Democrats, but only if we have your support _right now. They are a one-trick pony, and now that we know their game --we're ready for them!_
_The progressive machine came after Rep. Byron Donalds and failed. Then, they called Senator Tim Scott an "oreo," and it backfired._
**_They even threw objects at Larry Elder and defeated his candidacy for Governor of California, but when they referred to Winsome Sears as "a black face speaking on behalf of White supremacy" in Virginia, we handed them a defeat they didn't see coming._**
**[A black Republican like Herschel Walker will be directly in the crosshairs of the Democrat attack machine, and we need to ensure he has the support he needs to win!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775220:J2wDWF2xN:m:1:3253819041:A5060E1829F6D2E279F81407545FD98C:r "A black Republican like Herschel Walker will be directly in the
crosshairs of the Democrat attack machine, and we need to ensure he has the support he needs to win!")**

The reason I decided to work on Ben’s race is that we need people like him in the House who will vote yea for bringing in millions of dollars in funds for infrastructure -- not nay, as Ann Wagner voted. _We’re already halfway through November_ , and 2021 is _rapidly_ coming to a close. Every month, we need to hit our benchmarks, and this month is not on track. I know folks are tired -- I am too -- **but we can’t stop fighting**. There’s _too much_ on the line next year for us to give up and become complacent now. January 6th showed us what happens when power goes unchecked.
Ben is our best hope of saving our democracy from Trump extremists like Ann Wagner. **[**Will you chip in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can do today to help us reach our 15 donation goal by midnight tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38654656/316450047/-1223207246?refcode=EM_FR_211115MM_MM_SK_90DO_4_G_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTdiZjM5Ny00ZTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QLmF1yLqzr2uU1AV9bwbqISEjfY2JWc4i2OJveDceo=)**

clean_body: We have until midnight tonight. = = I’m so grateful to have you on our team because you know we deserve better than Trump cronies like Ann Wagner representing us in Congress. We understand we need a change in leadership in Washington. What is happening now with Ann Wagner and her gang of right-wing extremists is not okay. The reason I decided to work on Ben’s race is that we need people like him in the House who will vote yea for bringing in millions of dollars in funds for infrastructure -- not nay, as Ann Wagner voted. = = We’re already halfway through November , and 2021 is rapidly coming to a close. Every month, we need to hit our benchmarks, and this month is not on track. I know folks are tired -- I am too -- but we can’t stop fighting. There’s too much on the line next year for us to give up and become complacent now. January 6th showed us what happens when power goes unchecked. Ben is our best hope of saving our democracy from Trump extremists like Ann Wagner. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Keep fighting, Simon Korn Finance Director Ben Samuels for Congress Ben Samuels is a Democrat running in Missouri’s Second Congressional District. As a sixth-generation Missourian, economic policy expert, and businessperson, Ben will work tirelessly to deliver results for the community his family has long called home.This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible. ___= || || Ben Samuels for Congress 9621 Olive Blvd. P.O. Box 8484 Saint Louis, MO 63132-9998 United States | Paid for by Ben Samuels for Congress Contributions or gifts to Ben Samuels for Congress are not tax deductible. Contributions are subject to the limitations and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

subject: Today is Kat’s mid-month deadline
body:
Today is our mid-month deadline, and Nancy Pelosi is currently outpacing us.
---

| Friend,
Today is our mid-month deadline, and Nancy Pelosi is currently outpacing us.
The America First movement has taken many victories in the past few weeks and Nancy is getting worried. She's put her fundraising machine into overdrive; relying on liberal elites from out of state. We can't let these mega donors buy our seats!
But we know we can count on true patriots, like you, to help Kat catch up and keep Florida Red.
---
| | | [HELP KAT CAMMACK](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eSultcj2oDgFv4sY4qaQwBGJne0n2Rxe3gr3jDTAIyAm0fULA5CKduoTPnjLV_F2u5ARa-GNpzUS2cker7OrrRlbqjrd0DBpEZ4cElQOKtCs4BrnL_HlsbQs16Y6XzVrCU5Yr57E7Uw_eASeoskmCA8haGvLfPtYd3bW1QhLhanQH1dB0b9NqqXuW8Hz2o3OCGgaGfKoNaBqanjwcmhEAw==&c=UZdFxpNeseQ_hEwb4G7u4ngERxHKobn18-PC6XZlMKrPZ-zB3_g-lQ==&ch=BPyYy4cKHOlfastGFAAobCjr2so1tMXZ5RFHJV6Kd6x6s-00gUhQdg==)

| Kat is here to show the Radical Left that the America First agenda is here to stay. Working Americans are sick and tired of the left's radical socialist agenda on Capitol Hill. President Trump put our country on the right track and we need to stay committed to putting our Nation first.
Kat is the woman you can count on to keep Florida red. She isn't some establishment RINO, she is a true Conservative who will fight tooth and nail for you and your community.
[Can Kat count on you to stand strong with America First and help her reach the mid-month deadline?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eSultcj2oDgFv4sY4qaQwBGJne0n2Rxe3gr3jDTAIyAm0fULA5CKduoTPnjLV_F2u5ARa-GNpzUS2cker7OrrRlbqjrd0DBpEZ4cElQOKtCs4BrnL_HlsbQs16Y6XzVrCU5Yr57E7Uw_eASeoskmCA8haGvLfPtYd3bW1QhLhanQH1dB0b9NqqXuW8Hz2o3OCGgaGfKoNaBqanjwcmhEAw==&c=UZdFxpNeseQ_hEwb4G7u4ngERxHKobn18-PC6XZlMKrPZ-zB3_g-lQ==&ch=BPyYy4cKHOlfastGFAAobCjr2so1tMXZ5RFHJV6Kd6x6s-00gUhQdg==)

name: Ben Downing
subject: Our Racial Justice Action Plan for the Commonwealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for By the Downing Committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655500/316451743/635930916?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20211115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjk5M2JmMC00ZTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3U9OZ3EEQS65HRUlAT1cMBxBXviHfXUUCbUucPMPac=)
Every few years, our state government attempts to chip away at the deep structural racism and injustice embedded in our society. When I was in the Massachusetts legislature, I saw it every session. Through the tenacity of racial justice advocates and the work of a few committed legislators, small pieces of proposals would end up in must-pass legislation sent to the Governor’s desk — only to have most of the truly transformative proposals stripped away. Expecting that the current status quo culture of policy making in Beacon Hill will deliver on racial equity is expecting different results from the same old, same old. The Governor and other Beacon Hill insiders benefit from the current paradigm. [**Too often in Massachusetts, policy making starts with one question: what will State House leadership support? This approach is fundamentally insufficient. That is why our Racial Justice Action Plan for the Commonwealth is based on a different set of questions: **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655502/316451745/981525699?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20211115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjk5M2JmMC00ZTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3U9OZ3EEQS65HRUlAT1cMBxBXviHfXUUCbUucPMPac=&emci=be7bcee9-4e46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9b993bf0-4e46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496)
* What does racial justice in Massachusetts look like?
* Who needs to be in the room to build and steward this work?
* What does it mean for white people, and other communities of affluence and privilege, to co-deliver on equity for everyone?

Our platform is grounded in the concrete recommendations of BIPOC communities and racial justice advocates. It's grounded in cultural humility. _Team, I am committed to listening and learning throughout this campaign and throughout my time in office._ That’s why we are holding a series of feedback hubs across the state to elevate what is working already and to inform a more refined action plan that meets people’s aspirations and demands. [**Click here to learn more about our Racial Justice Action Plan and find a feedback hub near you >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655504/316451747/981525699?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20211115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjk5M2JmMC00ZTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3U9OZ3EEQS65HRUlAT1cMBxBXviHfXUUCbUucPMPac=&emci=be7bcee9-4e46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9b993bf0-4e46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496) | [RACIAL JUSTICE ACTION PLAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655505/316451748/981525699?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20211115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjk5M2JmMC00ZTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3U9OZ3EEQS65HRUlAT1cMBxBXviHfXUUCbUucPMPac=&emci=be7bcee9-4e46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9b993bf0-4e46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496)
---
Now, it is time to not just reflect, but put to practice what racial justice means for Massachusetts. Throughout this campaign, and as Governor, I will work with Black, Latino, Asian American, and Indigenous people to understand what racial justice means for Massachusetts on a statewide level. No community of color is a monolith — I want to use this campaign to inform my racial justice strategy for my time as Governor.
We have an immense opportunity in Massachusetts to not just give racial justice advocates and community leaders a seat at the table — but to pick up that table and bring it to the people.
The work of getting stronger at the broken places starts with calling out systemic inequities and recognizing all of our individual brokenness. It starts with calling for an end to the status quo, and a new era for change and accountability on Beacon Hill.
I look forward to hearing from you and fighting alongside you in the work to end structural racism and injustice.
Ben
Paid for By the Downing Committee
---
Downing Committee
PO Box 120
Lowell, MA 01853
United States

By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/be7bcee9-4e46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/9b993bf0-4e46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjk5M2JmMC00ZTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3U9OZ3EEQS65HRUlAT1cMBxBXviHfXUUCbUucPMPac=&id=126850156)

name: Barrier to Entry PAC
subject: We can’t slow down now!
body:
Help us meet our November goal.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38655472/316451712/1300596418?refcode=211115_FR_midmonth1_bte
_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjNDZhYmUzLTRlNDYtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eIJSnjwBV_8Qea4G5eQ5IPaHvCfRv86X3EWq6H563aY=)
---
Peter, how is November halfway over? We’ve accomplished so much in the last 15 days, but most notably, we helped elect Shenise Turner-Sloss to Dayton City Commission & we endorsed Jessica Mason for Congress (TX-30). Both of these candidates are young Black women who represent the working-class and have high expectations for what our country needs to become. It’s an honor to be on their side.

But just because you made a few wins, doesn’t mean we're slowing down. We must keep working and build upon this momentum.

**Meeting our end of month deadline is crucial** \-- it helps us to continue endorsing candidates and pave the way for strong campaigns. Remember, your dollar goes to candidates who don’t have ways to other means. Their full-time, non-paying job is running for office.

Help us continue to break these barriers, so other working-class candidates can worry less about how they’ll pay rent, and more importantly how they plan to change our country. **[Would you chip in to help meet our mid-month goal of $7,000? Together, we can lift up these candidates and their campaigns. We’re not slowing down anytime soon. clean_body: Help us meet our November goal. | | | logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjNDZhYmUzLTRlNDYtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eIJSnjwBV8Qea4G5eQ5IPaHvCfRv86X3EWq6H563aY= Peter, how is November halfway over? We’ve accomplished so much in the last 15 days, but most notably, we helped elect Shenise Turner-Sloss to Dayton City Commission & we endorsed Jessica Mason for Congress (TX-30). Both of these candidates are young Black women who represent the working-class and have high expectations for what our country needs to become. It’s an honor to be on their side. But just because you made a few wins, doesn’t mean we're slowing down. We must keep working and build upon this momentum. Meeting our end of month deadline is crucial \-- it helps us to continue endorsing candidates and pave the way for strong campaigns. Remember, your dollar goes to candidates who don’t have ways to other means. Their full-time, non-paying job is running for office. Help us continue to break these barriers, so other working-class candidates can worry less about how they’ll pay rent, and more importantly how they plan to change our country. = If you've saved body:
| **We’ve got 358 days left in this race, friend —[ _will you chip in $3.58 to help us show the small-dollar power that will drive us to victory over insurrectionist Scott Franklin?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655850/316452593/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2_EGweb_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdmNmM0YS00ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gYdOu0UzVMuntt26XX2LznyRz2lUmqWoIC7QhFbTYDk=)** If asking for exactly $3.58 sounds like a gimmick to you, well, it is! But there are fundraising gimmicks, and then there are fundraising gimmicks with a _purpose_. Is $3.58 a somewhat arbitrary number? Yes, totally. But the exact dollar amount is less important than what it stands for. We could ask for [_**$12 (months to go)**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655851/316452594/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2_EGweb_full_xx_l2&amount=12&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdmNmM0YS00ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gYdOu0UzVMuntt26XX2LznyRz2lUmqWoIC7QhFbTYDk=) or [_**$51 (weeks to go)**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655852/316452595/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2_EGweb_full_xx_l3&amount=51&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdmNmM0YS00ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gYdOu0UzVMuntt26XX2LznyRz2lUmqWoIC7QhFbTYDk=) or even some form of 8,590 (hours to go), though not $8,590 because that’s illegal unless you’re a corporate-backed Republican who relies on shady PACs to allow ultra-rich individuals to give way, way, _way_ beyond the individual limit of $2,900 (Lookin’ at you, Scott). **But what is absolutely not arbitrary is the fact that small-dollar contributions — like $3.58! Or $5, $25, however much you can spare at a time — are the lifeline of our campaign.** It’s how we outraised Franklin in our first two months on the campaign trail, and it’s how we’re going to beat the GOP machine and deliver real, uncorrupted leadership to Florida’s 15th District. [_**So, will you chip in whatever you’re able to help keep this campaign going?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655854/316452596/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2_EGweb_full_xx_l4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdmNmM0YS00ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gYdOu0UzVMuntt26XX2LznyRz2lUmqWoIC7QhFbTYDk=) | | [$3.58 (days)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655855/316452597/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2_EGweb_full_xx_btn1&amount=3.58&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdmNmM0YS00ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gYdOu0UzVMuntt26XX2LznyRz2lUmqWoIC7QhFbTYDk=)

Hey friend — today’s a big milestone for our campaign!
In exactly one year, voters will head to the polls or mail in their ballots to decide the future of Florida’s 15th District. **So today, I’m asking for just $3.65, one cent for every day left in this race —[will you make your contribution now and help show the grassroots power behind this campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655861/316452602/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2_EGweb_full_xx_l5&amount=3.65&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdmNmM0YS00ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gYdOu0UzVMuntt26XX2LznyRz2lUmqWoIC7QhFbTYDk=)**
[Chip in $3.65 ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655863/316452603/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2_EGweb_full_xx_btn5&amount=3.65&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdmNmM0YS00ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gYdOu0UzVMuntt26XX2LznyRz2lUmqWoIC7QhFbTYDk=)
---
As you might imagine, I’ve been doing a good bit of reflection in the last 24 hours or so. I’m proud of how far we’ve come in just a few short months (almost $150,000 raised, outpacing our opponent, for starters!). I’m grateful for people like you who have supported this campaign. And I’m so looking forward to seeing what we accomplish together in the next year.
But I keep coming back to one thing: **Florida needs real, genuine change.**
The people of this district cannot afford to wait for affordable healthcare and good jobs. Our state cannot afford to ignore the climate crisis, which threatens Florida more than almost any other state. And our country cannot afford the direct threat to democracy that insurrectionists like my opponent and his cronies represent.
**That’s why I’m in this race. Not for power, not for fame, and not even to have my face plastered on ads and videos all over the interwebs. I’m running to bring real leadership back to this district, so that we can pass policies that ensure ALL of us can thrive.**
Here’s the tricky part: Defeating Republican incumbents is hard. But if we come together and give our time and dollars when we’re able, we can do this. We’re the underdogs here, no doubt about that, but we’re scrappy, we’ve got jingles, and we’ve got real people behind us.
[**So let’s prove it: Will you make a donation of just $3.65 today to mark our one-year-out milestone?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38655864/316452604/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211115oneyear2_EGweb_full_xx_l6&amount=3.65&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjdmNmM0YS00ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gYdOu0UzVMuntt26XX2LznyRz2lUmqWoIC7QhFbTYDk=)

clean_body: | We’ve got 358 days left in this race, friend —= If asking for exactly $3.58 sounds like a gimmick to you, well, it is! But there are fundraising gimmicks, and then there are fundraising gimmicks with a purpose. Is $3.58 a somewhat arbitrary number? Yes, totally. But the exact dollar amount is less important than what it stands for. We could ask for = or = or even some form of 8,590 (hours to go), though not $8,590 because that’s illegal unless you’re a corporate-backed Republican who relies on shady PACs to allow ultra-rich individuals to give way, way, way beyond the individual limit of $2,900 (Lookin’ at you, Scott). But what is absolutely not arbitrary is the fact that small-dollar contributions — like $3.58! Or $5, $25, however much you can spare at a time — are the lifeline of our campaign. It’s how we outraised Franklin in our first two months on the campaign trail, and it’s how we’re going to beat the GOP machine and deliver real, uncorrupted leadership to Florida’s 15th District. = | | = = = = — Team Eddie \--------Forwarded message-------- From: Eddie Geller Date: November 8, 2021 Subject: $3.65 = Hey friend — today’s a big milestone for our campaign! In exactly one year, voters will head to the polls or mail in their ballots to decide the future of Florida’s 15th District. So today, I’m asking for just $3.65, one cent for every day left in this race —= = As you might imagine, I’ve been doing a good bit of reflection in the last 24 hours or so. I’m proud of how far we’ve come in just a few short months (almost $150,000 raised, outpacing our opponent, for starters!). I’m grateful for people like you who have supported this campaign. And I’m so looking forward to seeing what we accomplish together in the next year. But I keep coming back to one thing: Florida needs real, genuine change. The people of this district cannot afford to wait for affordable healthcare and good jobs. Our state cannot afford to ignore the climate crisis, which threatens Florida more than almost any other state. And our country cannot afford the direct threat to democracy that insurrectionists like my opponent and his cronies represent. That’s why I’m in this race. Not for power, not for fame, and not even to have my face plastered on ads and videos all over the interwebs. I’m running to bring real leadership back to this district, so that we can pass policies that ensure ALL of us can thrive. Here’s the tricky part: Defeating Republican incumbents is hard. But if we come together and give our time and dollars when we’re able, we can do this. We’re the underdogs here, no doubt about that, but we’re scrappy, we’ve got jingles, and we’ve got real people behind us. = = Thanks for being a part of this campaign. — Eddie | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. Box 1111 11507 Dr Martin Luther King Jr Blvd Mango, FL 33550-9700 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
| | | I'm absolutely revolted.

\-- Reports show **SEVEN** Congressional Republicans personally helped plan the January 6th rally.

\-- I just learned **FIVE** more rioters are now running for Congress.

\-- And Republicans only need to flip**FIVE** seats to retake our Majority.

**Mark my words: I will fight to stop those who tried to topple our democracy from barging back into power if it 's the last thing I do.**

**[I'm calling on us to move quickly in response to this despicable news. This moment demands a swift and POWERFUL response -- 5,000 gifts before midnight -- to PROTECT our Democratic House Majority and ensure every last Republican who played a part in what became a deadly attack on our Capitol loses their seat because of what they've done. The soul of our very democracy depends on what we do in this moment. Can I count on your immediate $3 to defeat insurrectionist House Republicans and all their GOP colleagues? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTR-~)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs6iir50rb150m5ivffqjs3i9fj7o1ebfflc7lf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g66ob6c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onh6dr38spmccob4dhkemqjcdjjehi78db7m2r6cdb666qraohgcip36c9hmao70puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dr66hjj6or7m8pmcdj0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztbp4dlmomc829uf0pksq35tsvb1gjpfg2u3rnjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g66ob6c3h2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zupchgoo2t7c5mc3594r520jki3vpc140pnaaha0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g66ob6c3h2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4m4hpknpnnpc6bt1mg7bn59pi5u0a6hefis3lo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g66ob6c3h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjci0rr7tdvhbdnue71ih6vuu2lmvv3cc74jvh8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g66ob6c3h2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6i49vot5rg2sq311m9jaa8rl9vu980kp1omsj7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g66ob6c3h2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8cnjhfoq74vurlc4aupkagk1r85lcqp3vtj4n3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g66ob6c3h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zop45or2s3ra0kka8d5e3u975tpppmq725mrq018_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g66ob6c3h2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zupug47q3g6mqr5tvve1qk38936rba9ipf55pa2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g66ob6c3h2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znic43mfrk610qcig2c4henrs95aqjoeplfu0aso_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g66ob6c3h2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5khmkrtp6gjcacphc4bu048s4m4nllu1cb1jr90_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1g66ob6c3h2bs)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: Winning Back Our State All Comes Down to YOU
body:
| Peter -- On Saturday, The US Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit halted Biden’s vaccine mandate for companies citing “grave statutory and constitutional issues.” To no one’s surprise however, Brandon’s Regime, I mean Biden, is defying this order and instructing companies to proceed with enforcing this illegal and immoral mandate. **Don’t be discouraged though, this is without a doubt a big win for Medical Freedom and the Constitution!** The Career Politicians will fight tooth and nail to keep trying to rule your life, and unfortunately too many Republicans of the career political class will simply roll over and fail to fight back. This is all the more evidence that the real power lies with YOU.

Traveling across the state I’ve seen so many people who are fed up with the tyranny of the Left and total inaction of the career politicians on the Right who are supposed to be standing up for our freedoms. We have to keep up the fight for liberty, and we have to fight better and stronger than the career politicians who simply want to ignore us. Last week in Virginia, we saw how effective it is when people choose to stand up. The Democrats are being backed into a corner! Remember that you have a choice. You can choose to elect the same career politicians who are failing to act urgently and aggressively as thousands of Minnesotans are forced out of their jobs, or you can choose a citizen leader who will stop at nothing to restore and protect your freedoms over your body, your children, your wallet, and your life. If you are interested in learning about the steps you can take to regain control of your government, please stop by our [**Save Sota Town Hall on 11/20**](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOUEiGh0eYdSwp9alc6_iUK4UHAvXJzPaLBbrewkbkJaeiTzcgsSUNT0lG2yg5zg3STpkjlUen4YU4tOah-cSQejporjpbn_PLNAeJSFYAUu0x8-7Q_bsz8MQuPw5hup34sOixvDiMcPySFL2jZ6kuTxOpoguE3j5pIQp12ygBJPmwyIGWjwSwGBGkykpR1ooCMDDmUaGq--TXdmMyZi_z6isFOIEZs8422Cp11FNzhbBn4XHCGUg5-1ygwBKvpkzZ-JU4F0uv9qOvn7dD5Vk7Rf59BrzqLZPmmJ-bto25qiw7pImvO7ukzASpUBJnL6RBlFDzdEtqYzTzAHktcftumu0wZxJ7Md4sGIT39xAJxVxTNJkGq04nvP3SjM5DPovIiLO-CEESmMAFZHb6C87lp3Q0x4O74jZpWUZC-y7u0-rCxPDvNGlj-UXnJPDfj6xxOCOWoHdOXNgaXRU0rv_wzNI5gWbhFqEg-V-0f5Hnz0gbXbOCDEEvReENigLa2VcFD8OGls8YazRB_3oissIev5YmezJU_FjqVRkPSuvr3c2780VqavMzRhxl4MYLO6J7o&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_to_action&n=1) to meet me, the campaign team, and our team of dedicated volunteer leaders. I would love to see you there!

Also be sure you don’t miss the debate in Stillwater next week! We will live stream this event on our Facebook page for those who cannot make it in person. I will also be interviewed on the Black Republican Black Democrat Show Wednesday at 8:00pm, so please tune in!

**If you can’t make it out to these events, there are still many ways for you to get involved and make a difference. Visit our website to**[**volunteer**](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rHIMENRQT5AKoWG-e4wjsE6PmOi69xTq33Skw-UbFh4z&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_to_action&n=2)**, or**[**pitch in $25, $50, $100, or more**](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_to_action&n=3)**.** Remember that you have the power to lead, be the boss, and tell your elected officials that it’s time for a change or they’re out! If we understand this, Walz will surely be in for a humiliating defeat next year! Let’s get to work! Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [http://www.electneil.com/](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=s5_-E46XaHU4aq1BhevRQ2RS09r6XrSwzqyIE3RMcVDQmx_bVEorH2VPoQ7QjsI6TxW_LqIAPg9giAPP8OhQc9hr81UsCcK1COn0CHXtyQZ3uVopLAWMuP7bV8erwy_NCs7bIytozc4re-JXr0L74Qf206-McB3s80-I1JkDMPPSLIqd25jCzK8QULhM2016it5Lde5KnO-SdjfvOIH3SSCUQUsQmeSr634pjiIYgCsr-i_9x_dHOOMwKwFb-Daw1kEyaxnXYfbXKcrkE8HMNKmsP1dytRLs-Gx-yFd3PbAGpDFGK0puMyFh1_WU1d49-xxe8bTOGevN6FoJNWDsg7KnhjG-PsvPotajpmuPOgM&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_to_action&n=4)
---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Tonight at midnight we close the books on our mid-month fundraising drive.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
Tonight at midnight we close the books on our mid-month fundraising drive.
This one is important, because historically November is a very difficult month for fundraising. Especially in the second half of the month when people understandably tune out politics.
But that means we really need a strong first half of the month to hit our goals. Because while a lot of our supporters may be tuned out, those spending big to beat us are not. They see this as an opportunity.
So we still need about 5,000 donations TODAY to reach our goals. And there’s only one way that happens...together.
[**Please make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign before midnight. It all adds up when everyone is chipping in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211115-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1667_6688874_Q7YmOH&akid=1667%2E6688874%2EQ7YmOH)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211115-1-subs&t=20&refcode2=1667_6688874_Q7YmOH&akid=1667%2E6688874%2EQ7YmOH)**

****

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211115-1-subs&t=22&refcode2=1667_6688874_Q7YmOH&akid=1667%2E6688874%2EQ7YmOH)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211115-1-subs&t=23&refcode2=1667_6688874_Q7YmOH&akid=1667%2E6688874%2EQ7YmOH)**

| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211115-1-subs&t=25&refcode2=1667_6688874_Q7YmOH&akid=1667%2E6688874%2EQ7YmOH)**

Mark

name: American Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8012%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=MwAzwFVYWc2FX213uuqYWQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18571%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N%2fxmcOfcfTDo36lMjL3lFA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18572%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SZ0KzgjOnFA3zrP%2bTmSh2g&sysid=1) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18573%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2blKX%2bogS%2fK2LAVGGEWtMHQ&sysid=1)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18574%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mmv3vwEdYSMxh5zhaviqrQ&sysid=1)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18574%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mmv3vwEdYSMxh5zhaviqrQ&sysid=1)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18585%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SSRmbLl%2fi8CJXBZQBitekg&sysid=1) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18586%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KSXASTAOMvbLcRh%2bIIkq9A&sysid=1)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8012%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=MwAzwFVYWc2FX213uuqYWQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8012%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=MwAzwFVYWc2FX213uuqYWQ&sysid=1)

Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times’ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline for you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.

Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near-limitless sums of money. clean_body: | | | Listen up, friend! Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way. So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2022 – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes). That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. Especially when we're up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multi-million-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her Mid Month Deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: = From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it. Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near-limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony Rubio. That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be. So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for stepping up.
