name: Josh Hawley
subject: This Is Living Podcast Episode 4: Navigating Technology with Your Family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
If you like what you hear, be sure to leave a 5-star rating and a positive review! [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=cedf6b966aec4656a50ee597c723f3ad&_e=6ZkDRKKJxaA9PbQ6_CQ1MQoktHFaA5lVyp1UsCX-Ak-wJJaUXiIzL6qwJzhuW11Xhg-o0sgTOmPqGaZzGiHCPf9PYKhakIWjmTDj-1HR8xN8V-npx95y1pBb4UrJkDbqq_nkXiQNfolUhzJ7Aea0v2xKAaFC8PTbS7DzRGVGJBFQ04-p_MJoi9BZ5Ysafw3EF2lOEyRRmS7p1G_9V8W8S4BPULjnZ6u5MK0syK6wpuz_kWbfQrl-BMyW0spmdT3S0BQQI7x2evLMYg5yp7-1ftAlzAxv5vRGLnPgG3B3u93JgOFnjzx9IHJLZm6GBm-W3l-ESwLw0oa0rUGepOz10nCbccmXGyEnclifqnXwgU0bu5qlNLpvbhPNP2yLa0oCAuwPeuq112Ymp9hVTfBGkXPP8Wpgcf29gKQTLPeGqlI%3D) | |
---
In episode 4, Erin and I discuss technology and the role that it plays in our families. Balancing the use of technology is one of the biggest challenges that families face today. We talk about how we set personal boundaries with technology and what expectations we are creating in our own family.

The evidence is pretty clear — social media has a negative impact on society. It has caused a generation of kids to grow up with higher levels of anxiety and depression. Our mission as parents is to point our kids toward Jesus, and raise up a generation of world changers, and technology is just one obstacle we face.

Parenting is trial and error, and we didn't arrive at our current views on technology overnight. We have worked to limit our children's exposure to technology like social media. It's easy to say "we limit our kid's exposure to technology," but what do we replace it with?
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=cedf6b966aec4656a50ee597c723f3ad&_e=6ZkDRKKJxaA9PbQ6_CQ1MQoktHFaA5lVyp1UsCX-Ak-wJJaUXiIzL6qwJzhuW11Xhg-o0sgTOmPqGaZzGiHCPf9PYKhakIWjmTDj-1HR8xN8V-npx95y1pBb4UrJkDbqq_nkXiQNfolUhzJ7Aea0v2xKAaFC8PTbS7DzRGVGJBFQ04-p_MJoi9BZ5Ysafw3EkICqOp3mcIgP_KlG9TaTvhOhfGPFPFC-tMPM08gn9-reU6cpfBQKA_6Ch9fOYekOb-oHguBpnvXOzx6AmixpLgHaVDFy5f-OFOJEzxMXPxpqMSNib3htv0ZGEI2LvdOeev3snssEkl4zpIJEE8y5vbfDhmTfBqsPpLe0yMh0WtX6b2QC-CSKXRk7RplHxFsIrIMb4eUISykzsbN4LmnMDffHGPXgaMqgyRV1RVz2Aao%3D)

name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/fa465570727c893e/d6ae3d8b39815d71c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, Over the last week, we've picked up more support and criss-crossed the state meeting voters! Even as the holiday season approaches, we aren't slowing down, and we're thankful to have you with us on this journey.
---
---
# **_Senator Cindy Hyde-Smith_**
---
---
I'm grateful to U.S. Senator Cindy Hyde-Smith for her encouragement, friendship, and support. She helped ensure we had a great event in Mississippi, and I'm looking forward to working with her to defend our principles and values in the Senate. [**Watch a video message we recorded here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/fa465570727c893e/d31e0d18532ffd6dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_B.I.G. Crowd In Middle Georgia!_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/fa465570727c893e/6ccadbe0bdb27f07c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Thank you to everyone who joined us in Middle Georgia for our Believe In Georgia tour stop! Great crowd with great friends, old and new. Thank you to our host committee for helping ensure this event was a success. We're drawing crowds everywhere we go, and our grassroots team in this state is unmatched.
---
---
# **_Barnstorming Georgia_**
---
---
We followed up our Middle Georgia event by meeting voters and sharing our message from Glennville to Fulton County. Thank you to everyone on Team ’22, including my friend Wayne Dasher, who is helping organize these events and spread the news. We're strengthened by your support.
---
---
# **_Honoring Our Heroes_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/fa465570727c893e/d9a15fd4d7305e6dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Last week marked Veterans Day, and we celebrated all who have served and are serving our great nation, including the more than 690,000 veterans who call Georgia home. My father, John A. Black, was a Master Sergeant in the U.S. Army and is pictured in the left photo, first from left on the back row. My father-in-law, Carrol M. Beavers, was a First Lieutenant who served in Korea. He's pictured in the right photo on the left side. I'm thankful for them, and thank you to anyone receiving this email who's served.
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/fa465570727c893e/dde6693fa81890b5c3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/fa465570727c893e/7d779f0b400cc866c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/fa465570727c893e/98fca95c33983102c3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! Our campaign is firing on all cylinders, but for that to continue, we must keep up our fundraising efforts. The need is real and it's crucial to our success. [**If you haven't already contributed, please do so now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/fa465570727c893e/4ef943ad0dcf05dbc3d6b838967d376c/37793) Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support! More good news to come in the days ahead.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/fa465570727c893e/1b3afcb07f296ea4c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/fa465570727c893e/50ca0634800d52c6c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/fa465570727c893e/ebeaec0213a7ced3c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=fa465570727c893e&d=6d1161d1c7602284c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=fa465570727c893e).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604

clean_body: Chip in to help elect more Democratic governors. = | | Beto O’Rourke just announced he’s running for governor in Texas, giving Democrats a real shot at flipping the state blue next year. Governor Kathy Hochul is proud to support Beto O’Rourke’s gubernatorial campaign to defeat Republican Governor Greg Abbott — who just signed one of the most restrictive anti-abortion measures into law. But Beto is counting on grassroots supporters like you to help him build a campaign that can compete with the Texas GOP and win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Beto O'Rourke and Kathy Hochul will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Governor Greg Abbott’s Texas is setting the blueprint for how other conservative-led states can impose a dangerous, restrictive agenda. Abbott’s administration just implemented a restrictive law that would ban abortion before most women know they are pregnant, and attacks access to abortion care. With Beto O’Rourke at the top of the ticket, Texas has a real chance to say goodbye to Greg Abbott’s regressive leadership and move the state forward. But he can’t do this without our help. That’s why Governor Hochul is calling on you to become an early supporter of Beto’s campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Beto O'Rourke and Kathy Hochul will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you for all you do to support hard-working Democrats like Beto and Kathy. — Hochul HQ | | | | | | | | | Friends for Kathy Hochul P.O. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Not where we need to be
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Congress
body:
Not where we need to be

We really need to turn this ship around, or we lose.

Hey, it's Donald Trump Jr.

I'm reaching out with some troubling news. We're already halfway through November, and House Conservatives are at only 30% of their goal for this month.

**Even worse, Democrats are on track to outraise Republicans for the second month in a row.**

We came up short last month, and we're paying the price.

Nancy Pelosi's liberal allies are flooding swing states with propaganda advertising targeting my father's America First allies in Congress.

They're trying to cancel the MAGA movement once and for all. Well, I'm not sitting by and letting them get away with it.

[**I 'm challenging every Patriot who receives this email to pledge just $15. That's it. That's all we need from every supporter on this list.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775644:J32H3F2NN:m:1:3253819041:954E2C589AEC604C14D8B23746BCBB7F:r)
| [STEP UP NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775644:J32H3F2NN:m:1:3253819041:954E2C589AEC604C14D8B23746BCBB7F:r)
---

[CHIP IN $15](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775644:J32H3F2NN:m:1:3253819041:954E2C589AEC604C14D8B23746BCBB7F:r)
---

I'm confident that with your help, we'll make up ground and hit our goal for November. If we make this goal, we'll finally have the resources we need to fight back against the Democrats' flood of negative ads.
[FIGHT BACK AGAINST PELOSI PROPAGANDA ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775644:J32H3F2NN:m:1:3253819041:954E2C589AEC604C14D8B23746BCBB7F:r)
---
**
Don 't sit on the sidelines. We need you in this fight.**

Thanks,
Don Jr.

_[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775645:J32H3F2NN:m:1:3253819041:954E2C589AEC604C14D8B23746BCBB7F:r)_

_Peter, we are just FIVE SEATS away from a Republican House Majority.
Your support is the key to firing Nancy Pelosi, restoring the Trump Majority, and Saving America from Democrat destruction. _

_[**I am personally asking YOU to join President Trump and me in this fight to win back control of Congress**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58775645:J32H3F2NN:m:1:3253819041:954E2C589AEC604C14D8B23746BCBB7F:r)_ _.
America as we know it is on the line. We can't sit on the sidelines and let Pelosi and the Squad ram their radical agenda down our throats.

Thank you for standing with me in the fight to Fire Pelosi and Save America.

Rep. Elise Stefanik
Chairwoman, House GOP Conference _

Paid for by Elise for Congress

Glens Falls, NY, 12801

name: Cherise Trump, Speech First
subject: Stop the Silence: Protect the First Amendment
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTdiMjE0MTkxMDg1NzQ4ZTA5OWE5MGNlNDA5MGRlNzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9zcGVlY2hmaXJzdC9zdHVkZW50X2Jvci9GRk8yNDA1Nw&K=0Cwt5GaDp4dmaOWeskRdwQ)
---
Fellow American, Our First Amendment is at risk. Attacks on free speech are a plague of nearly biblical proportions on college campuses. And if this precious freedom is taken from students— _it will be taken from you and me next._ Students must hold the line for their free speech and ours—but the prospect of a lone student standing up against a school with an enormous financial endowment and an army of lawyers is like David vs. Goliath. __Many students feel powerless__. **Speech First gives students the resources to fight back against tyrannical policies.****We organize and urge students and the community to****stand together****to protect the First Amendment freedoms of college students everywhere.** **If you feel strongly about protecting the First Amendment on college campuses—and in your own community!—**[**please join the fight by signing the NATIONAL STUDENTS' BILL of RIGHTS Today.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTdiMjE0MTkxMDg1NzQ4ZTA5OWE5MGNlNDA5MGRlNzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9zcGVlY2hmaXJzdC9zdHVkZW50X2Jvci9GRk8yNDA1Nw&K=I3fowpE22YZ31Sf4eeAgJw)
---
[**SIGN THE BILL TODAY**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTdiMjE0MTkxMDg1NzQ4ZTA5OWE5MGNlNDA5MGRlNzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9zcGVlY2hmaXJzdC9zdHVkZW50X2Jvci9GRk8yNDA1Nw&K=HSwUBCErbwh5XgkTorDvTw)
---
The concept of a “Students’ Bill of Rights" is not particularly new. You’ll find these documents on many college campuses across America, and they are usually passed and maintained by the student government. But, though they often protect certain rights of marginalized or disenfranchised groups on campus, they rarely protect the rights of students to speak and express themselves freely without fear of reprisal for their opinions. That’s where this important document comes in. This short but important declaration lists several principles that __EVERY__ college and university should affirm for its students -- because our own Constitution preserves them for ALL AMERICANS! [**Please help us demand that college students' First Amendment freedoms remain protected by signing this important declaration now!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTdiMjE0MTkxMDg1NzQ4ZTA5OWE5MGNlNDA5MGRlNzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9zcGVlY2hmaXJzdC9zdHVkZW50X2Jvci9GRk8yNDA1Nw&K=DPJBvvZnXk-wunRr7Fgofg) Free speech on campus is under threat from all sides. In recent years, “speech codes,” “free speech zones,” and “safe spaces” have become ubiquitous at schools across the country. While schools proclaim that these measures are instituted to protect students; their true objective is very clear— _to shut down unwanted speech._ According to a recent poll by FIRE (the Foundation for Individual Rights in Education), more than half of all students have reported self-censoring on campus and in the classroom. _We are witnessing a _crisis of self-censorship__ __ due to students’ fear of repercussions for simply believing or thinking a certain way. **We cannot let this censorship crisis continue for students. Our words should not be governed by any institution. Now is the most difficult time ever for students to express their ideas, viewpoints and opinions on campus. Speech First has taken on the mission to help students—**[**but we need your support by signing the NATIONAL STUDENT** ’**S BILL of RIGHTS, now!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTdiMjE0MTkxMDg1NzQ4ZTA5OWE5MGNlNDA5MGRlNzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9zcGVlY2hmaXJzdC9zdHVkZW50X2Jvci9GRk8yNDA1Nw&K=UHT3LsZkLOLUO8PUL09jzw)
---
[**SIGN THE BILL TODAY**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTdiMjE0MTkxMDg1NzQ4ZTA5OWE5MGNlNDA5MGRlNzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9zcGVlY2hmaXJzdC9zdHVkZW50X2Jvci9GRk8yNDA1Nw&K=rJnK9cd-FAXrsJJTD0cMAw)
---
Here are more key takeaways from that poll:
* **33%** of students say it is never acceptable to shout-down a speaker.
* **40%** of students feel comfortable disagreeing with a professor.
* **75%** of students say it is never acceptable to use violent protest to stop a speech.****

To better interpret those results; if 75% of students say violent protest is _not_ acceptable— _**25% of students surveyed think it is okay, at least in certain situations, to use violent protest to shut down speech**_**** on campus if they disagree with the speaker! It is heartbreaking to see disenfranchised groups and individuals being censored as academic institutions use their power to silence them. **We cannot let this attack on** **The First Amendment continue**. _Let_ ’ _s stand united and be heard!_ **Together, we can be a greater power than the oppressive school administrations, special interest groups, and student governments seeking to silence students across the country.** _**If you care about FREEDOM, RIGHTS and the FIRST AMENDMENT**_**—you can make an impact now by showing your support. Sign the National Student Bill of Rights today!**
---
[**SIGN THE BILL TODAY**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTdiMjE0MTkxMDg1NzQ4ZTA5OWE5MGNlNDA5MGRlNzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9zcGVlY2hmaXJzdC9zdHVkZW50X2Jvci9GRk8yNDA1Nw&K=1BjUO7P-ft_n894tDEjgWA)
---
I greatly appreciate your support. We couldn’t do this without you. Let’s restore and protect the First Amendment for students across America together! For Our Future,
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTdiMjE0MTkxMDg1NzQ4ZTA5OWE5MGNlNDA5MGRlNzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9zcGVlY2hmaXJzdC9zdHVkZW50X2Jvci9GRk8yNDA1Nw&K=lDgKy8r6eT0ouGyZjfp2aQ)
---
Cherise TrumpExecutive DirectorSpeech First
---
1300 I St NW Suite 400EWashington, DC 20005
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/2/1cla%3AOTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTdiMjE0MTkxMDg1NzQ4ZTA5OWE5MGNlNDA5MGRlNzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3An%3An%3AFEMpxkZQbNevItgDtzKYgw) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now!
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58776053:6fBz3F2N2:m:1:3299561967:8D9F0B2C81926614FE4B44E096D14C9E:r)
---
Patriot,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now with trial underway, it has been falling apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this - Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58776053:6fBz3F2N2:m:1:3299561967:8D9F0B2C81926614FE4B44E096D14C9E:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58776053:6fBz3F2N2:m:1:3299561967:8D9F0B2C81926614FE4B44E096D14C9E:r)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58776053:6fBz3F2N2:m:1:3299561967:8D9F0B2C81926614FE4B44E096D14C9E:r)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58776053:6fBz3F2N2:m:1:3299561967:8D9F0B2C81926614FE4B44E096D14C9E:r)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsmomqqh526i47munlmna3ngc0i793ucfkmcjs3o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp39pble3gr1ojle3jjeo9lmdpj1pj3mpij8cr2c8r69p9jcmq3ct3gmopndd9n6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661pbbc30epg6cd32mdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpjm0p30c1j66oh5u)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh12qgh8l3gg01pbos6klo1fs2e9adiqde7m7n90_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60o36cdh2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztfv6oiarne4bqd0lcnvlrtg9g8be0ikrla6d3j0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60o36cdh2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z21t3odfpa2dt11ju01b58oulp2volq547knhhgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60o36cdh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zec5r65j193fl5b4sec13o9mkhlnpt55qbiv1f20_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60o36cdh2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7nvmj9q5eckjq21lbponuil0imo4bkb2p2tts98_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60o36cdh2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z15gcgn7kns2ksghsb29tncjnp7o4v92onjsaueg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60o36cdh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7kna9blboscvnnrjhrncrkl8a5tl24gfb92vnio_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60o36cdh2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziihhs49t4j48el1su9cvdbdqapov1pllfjtq51g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60o36cdh2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb65o764e108lo383qob5saj94r8dhnhjrdlta6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60o36cdh2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2a8tia3g37en6m0frdksigtnkoih14l2okgoamg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60o36cdh2bs)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

body:

body:
Peter – right now, the GOP is pushing harder than ever
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38658159/316460923/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1095-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDU0MzJhZS01NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RcQpPlAa7HjyvXneXd3zOt9BuENA8z9jaDP6FSkemZw=)

**Peter – right now, the GOP is pushing harder than ever to flip New Mexico red, and I'm heading into a three-month fundraising blackout in _just a few weeks_ _._**
**[We're still way behind on our $150,000 end-of-month fundraising goal, so please rush $5 right now to help me keep New Mexico blue.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38658161/316460925/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1095-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDU0MzJhZS01NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RcQpPlAa7HjyvXneXd3zOt9BuENA8z9jaDP6FSkemZw=)**
I knew from the moment I launched my reelection campaign that the GOP would do ANYTHING to gain power in New Mexico. Even as I was giving my reelection speech in Albuquerque, far-right extremists tried to drown out my voice – and they yelled profanities at journalists covering the event.
Since then, GOP pushback has only gotten worse. Several Trump-style candidates are attacking me for keeping New Mexicans safe during the pandemic.** Now, because of a special legislative session, I'm heading into a three-month fundraising blackout while my opponents are NOT, so I need your help to defend myself from GOP attacks.**
**I need to hit my $150,000 goal before the end of this month to power me through this fundraising blackout. If I don't reach my goal, our funds will dry up over the blackout, and I won't have the resources to fight back against GOP attacks or spread my message to swing voters.**
**[Please, Peter, I only have a few weeks left to meet my $150,000 goal, and we're way behind right now: Will you donate $5 today to get me back on track and keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38658163/316460927/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1095-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDU0MzJhZS01NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RcQpPlAa7HjyvXneXd3zOt9BuENA8z9jaDP6FSkemZw=)**

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Another update (important)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JXE2bm3rHTBCt%2BKhWW854v0giEv7K%2FR%2B&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, during the tumultuous and dangerous four years of Donald Trump's presidency, his administration debased and degraded our judicial branch of government. I'm not just talking about the Supreme Court - though, perhaps, that is the most egregious and obvious example of our courts being handed over to right-wing ideologues. No, I'm talking about the hundreds of judicial appointments Donald Trump made across the country - oftentimes unqualified, partisan judges who now hold the fate of justice for countless Americans in their hands.
**Believe it or not, Friend, the third branch of our democratic republic - our judicial system - has everything to do with why I'm reaching out to you about my mid-month fundraising goal. I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why raising these last $3,532 is so crucial to protecting Senate control and democracy. [(You can make a donation here.)](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1097-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
By the grace of a tie-breaking vote from Vice President Kamala Harris, Democratic control of the Senate allows us to work to correct the calamity Trump inflicted on our judicial branch. In partnership with President Biden, Senate Democrats are confirming qualified, diverse, and impartial judges across the country. And in the event that a Supreme Court vacancy arises, we currently have the votes to confirm the president's nominee and rebalance our highest court away from its current extreme right majority. That is, as long as we retain control of the Senate by winning elections in 2022.
In the meantime, we have a small window of opportunity to repair and protect our judiciary, and we are working as hard as we possibly can to make progress - despite attempts by the likes of Ted Cruz to block and delay every nomination. Senate control is precarious. More and more, political experts are categorizing races across the country as "toss-ups" and predicting the real threat of Republican control of Congress in 2022. Indeed, recent election results in Virginia and across the country show the map for Republicans is expanding. They could very well take back Senate control (they only need to flip one seat). Mitch McConnell is already making me a top target. If he succeeds in his power grab, "equal justice under the law" is truly in peril.
This is where I need you to come through, Friend. It's not just about raising the last $3,532 before our mid-month fundraising deadline. It's about securing the resources to protect this Senate seat and Democratic control in Congress. **[So please, if you agree with me and feel the urgency of this moment, then please donate whatever you can to ensure we have the resources to win. I'm counting on your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1097-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500) **
Thanks, and talk soon.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=E2m9jtXcTbQPiPIHhtCyyf0giEv7K%2FR%2B&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

I'm not just talking about the Supreme Court - though, perhaps, that is the most egregious and obvious example of our courts being handed over to right-wing ideologues. No, I'm talking about the hundreds of judicial appointments Donald Trump made across the country - oftentimes unqualified, partisan judges who now hold the fate of justice for countless Americans in their hands. Believe it or not, Friend, the third branch of our democratic republic - our judicial system - has everything to do with why I'm reaching out to you about my mid-month fundraising goal. I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why raising these last $3,532 is so crucial to protecting Senate control and democracy. By the grace of a tie-breaking vote from Vice President Kamala Harris, Democratic control of the Senate allows us to work to correct the calamity Trump inflicted on our judicial branch. In partnership with President Biden, Senate Democrats are confirming qualified, diverse, and impartial judges across the country. And in the event that a Supreme Court vacancy arises, we currently have the votes to confirm the president's nominee and rebalance our highest court away from its current extreme right majority. That is, as long as we retain control of the Senate by winning elections in 2022. In the meantime, we have a small window of opportunity to repair and protect our judiciary, and we are working as hard as we possibly can to make progress - despite attempts by the likes of Ted Cruz to block and delay every nomination. Senate control is precarious. More and more, political experts are categorizing races across the country as "toss-ups" and predicting the real threat of Republican control of Congress in 2022. Indeed, recent election results in Virginia and across the country show the map for Republicans is expanding. They could very well take back Senate control (they only need to flip one seat). Mitch McConnell is already making me a top target. If he succeeds in his power grab, "equal justice under the law" is truly in peril. This is where I need you to come through, Friend. It's not just about raising the last $3,532 before our mid-month fundraising deadline. It's about securing the resources to protect this Senate seat and Democratic control in Congress. Thanks, and talk soon. Dick

name: Eddie Gallagher, Navy SEAL Chief (Ret.)
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs. We must act.
body:
I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. After nearly 20 years of decorated se
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlu6h3b3vmpqtpf9l0lloiffil3c55ijcoadundg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60pb1c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongcaqj8d70caqn6d1gs5g6fdr4slh32slh6cobcc3366q73cr16pgr6thh65h31puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc3immo60tj0cooreddkcuobapbi4no)
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj5m39k0slq1tu387j01ct70ddg80m9his483b40_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60pb1c3h2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. **

After nearly 20 years of decorated service as a Navy SEAL, I was arrested and charged with the murder of an ISIS terrorist in Iraq. I was facing not only life in prison, but an endless campaign of slander and misinformation from our corrupt media.

Thankfully my family fought back publicly and fearlessly, caught the attention of President Trump, and I was freed from the brig and allowed to properly prepare for trial. I was found not guilty and allowed to keep my trident – but our life was a living hell for a long time.

**Now, Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs and I refuse to sit back.** As I've watched his trial, it's become crystal clear that Kyle acted in self-defense.

**[I'm emailing you now because through FreeKyleUSA, Kyle's mother Wendy has been furiously working to raise money for his legal defense, and they urgently need our help. Will you make a donation right now?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7a7pkl6iadjbis61depu156ojhfe8jvnau6loa0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60pb1c3h2bs)**
|
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8uoi1m2mb7lcg1gr3ubnt6k02gab24s8c3ljj3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60pb1c3h2bs)
|
---
More and more nowadays, if you're considered a political enemy of the powers-that-be, the rule book gets thrown out and anything goes.

The media, politicians, tech companies and other powerful interests band together to try and crush you financially and personally. The "narrative" takes precedence over the truth, and people's lives can be forever ruined.

**That is not the America that I dedicated my life to defend.**

It shouldn't have to be this way, but I know from my own experience that if enough people stand up and push back, justice can still prevail. And right now, justice means a "not guilty" verdict and Kyle Rittenhouse getting his life back.

**It can happen, but his legal defense is incredibly costly and he needs the support of millions of patriotic Americans across this country.**

**[I'm calling on you to help because believe it or not, your donation will make a difference. So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now, and let's pray that Kyle gets the justice he deserves.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhnftmfjrr1i3hd7n0nc8istehqbtnfgijjhqit0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60pb1c3h2bs)**

The truth, and our God-given right of self-defense still mean something in this country, and we have the power, today, to stand up for both.

Thank you for your time.

Steadfast,
Eddie Gallagher
Navy SEAL Special Operations Chief (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl3hed6gls11b383mdcls44dd403cpdvqeh12ba8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i60pb1c3h2bs)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of Nov. 15th: STOP the socialist bill & inflation!
body:
| |
---
**The most important thing to do this week is to STOP the “Build Back Socialist” bill, a.k.a. reconciliation. We actually have a chance at stopping this bill, so please complete the actions below and share with as many people as possible!**
**The key to beating this socialist nightmare of a bill is to focus on how it will make inflation worse, and therefore the pain and suffering will increase for more Americans.**

From what we are hearing, Sen. Joe Manchin is actually very concerned about and sensitive to the inflation issue. Furthermore, the polling on Americans’ reaction to the out-of-control inflation is not good for any Democrats.

We can use this point to push worried Democrats, especially Sen. Manchin, to stand firmly against the “Build Back Socialist” bill, a.k.a. Reconciliation.

**Your assignment this week is to[call both of your Senators](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTFjOWEwMGYzZDc0NDRlMWFhYzYwOTFhMGQ0YzI5OTBk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZmluZC1zZW5hdG9ycz9taWQ9NDQ1NzgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=XnlpSPYG1RnVkSKzN2GlJQ) about this awful bill.**

[Please visit our website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTFjOWEwMGYzZDc0NDRlMWFhYzYwOTFhMGQ0YzI5OTBk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYWN0aW9ucy9hY3Rpb24taXRlbXMtMjAyMS0xMS0xNS8_bWlkPTQ0NTc4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=AYwuQROazCesuEaVkRabkQ) for details of this call to action, including recommended reading and a sample script you can use.

Lastly, for all of you who are represented by Democrats and who feel like calling them never makes a difference, this time you absolutely can make a difference. Democrats are secretly worried about inflation. Help us to make sure they are so worried about it that we are able to kill this nightmare of a bill.

**Finally, be sure to share this call to action with everyone you know who loves America!**
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMzE5LTFjOWEwMGYzZDc0NDRlMWFhYzYwOTFhMGQ0YzI5OTBk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlP21pZD00NDU3OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=vGa8-J75Xuwr2vMeQP90DQ)

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: This is how we win in 2022 → | Team — We’ll make this quick: Our team just checked the finance books, and we’re a little off. By midnight tonight, we need to have raised half of our November goal. As of 11 a.m., we were still $1,871 short. = Look, our plans to flip Ohio blue have always centered on building a massive grassroots movement. After the results Democrats saw in Virginia, we’re more convinced than ever that that’s what we need to do. Democrats lost despite record voter turnout. Here’s what that means: It’s not enough just to get voters to the polls — we first have to make sure they’re excited about our campaign. And the best way to do that is by meeting voters where they are, long before Election Day, to answer their questions and hear their concerns. We want to speak with them in coffee shops, to host rallies in town squares, to visit their workplaces, and so much more. That’ll take an investment of significant resources — one that just won’t be possible if we fall behind on our fundraising goals. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks, Team Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. name: Mark Warner
subject: President Biden just signed the infrastructure bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
This moment would never have been possible without our Democratic majority in the senate.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38658937/316464658/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWE3ZmNmMi01YTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3YNrl2xbwesNEvs1r8OiWj6vWKZfkuD7vhY8T24mhvs=&emci=28970da4-2c46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=caa7fcf2-5a46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, I just watched President Biden sign the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act into law. I am incredibly proud of the work we did together to make this moment possible. This bill is a generational advancement of our infrastructure that brings with it countless new jobs for Virginians. It isn’t very often we get to do such a profound amount of good in a single bill. But I’m also reminded of an important fact. This moment would never have been possible without our Democratic majority in the senate. [_**So I’m asking you to celebrate this transformative investment in the American people by making your own investment in keeping the Senate blue in 2022. Chip in $5 now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38658938/316464660/1523721431?refcode=mw_em_211115_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWE3ZmNmMi01YTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3YNrl2xbwesNEvs1r8OiWj6vWKZfkuD7vhY8T24mhvs=) This infrastructure bill includes the largest investment in public transit ever, the largest investment in passenger rail since Amtrak, and the largest investment in our bridges since the creation of the interstate highway system. It’s going to give more Americans access to clean drinking water, clean energy options, and broadband internet. Millions of lives are going to change because of this bill. It’s impact is going to be felt for decades to come. Those are the outcomes made possible by having Democratic control of the Senate. [_**We must keep that control in the 2022 elections. clean_body: This moment would never have been possible without our Democratic majority in the senate. | | | Derek, I just watched President Biden sign the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act into law. I am incredibly proud of the work we did together to make this moment possible. This bill is a generational advancement of our infrastructure that brings with it countless new jobs for Virginians. It isn’t very often we get to do such a profound amount of good in a single bill. But I’m also reminded of an important fact. This moment would never have been possible without our Democratic majority in the senate. = This infrastructure bill includes the largest investment in public transit ever, the largest investment in passenger rail since Amtrak, and the largest investment in our bridges since the creation of the interstate highway system. It’s going to give more Americans access to clean drinking water, clean energy options, and broadband internet. Millions of lives are going to change because of this bill. It’s impact is going to be felt for decades to come. Those are the outcomes made possible by having Democratic control of the Senate. = Thank you, Mark Warner = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

If we don’t secure Wisconsin’s elections ahead of this MUST-WIN governor’s race, 2022 will be nothing more than a repeat of 2020.
---
We cannot wait until the eve of next year’s election to address the WEC’s failure and willful neglect of the law.
---
_Which is exactly why I’m asking the state Supreme court to immediately SUSPEND the unlawful guidance the WEC issued on the 2020 election._
---
**[SECURE OUR ELECTIONS](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=c4d9a9b25d824ebbab99660cdce3d659&_e=XnZz7PLVcYgRaHrATyPEw3cy1_mTV5aD3m2TBIFk1Jljhz19xnnONC2RCSJ7VOiPuCPiZXNmKaAoRSa2yV3sixr7WrZvhBfRRl1Mh-stuJAcn9_ArjhMx2x4ZmrYFlkhuX0iD9AcX24r8dCY0xD38SYyb7loMmwwpB9s4gXkW2_vJiObBja6Z-hJwVx8nJLWkAZCZj5kd2LYVVl6INb3ETTvADinj48JjZRwLgWmebbjmX4GzWcsYs8U8H_KCDhRxv1sBJldoTzL84grJ7o0lmkdPBfC_6TdR0l2-k2TmBMXThXuwslNP_0SKIM-iMlBvOZt7-Xfda6YknHQnpTvO2v4rgiygxHF39AbpwzAf_uUU9T-CqLcpAyx70wkXhH6YfkiGisthr8ShVpJeaxg7ilqfZZON6uFnnsk2WLD8UBbR0Jj4kSh-37OapwM2O2CT7rzaJjfkERffQ1IGro40ORAGJII2OgtoGjjY1k6tZfHlDQGaHBdWza9dIfAq3xWu20F-uaOKCn_AkYyl1qdbw%3D%3D)**
---
Our lawsuit is focusing on 3 key areas where the WEC failed to follow the law in its guidance:
1\. Allowing municipalities to establish unattended absentee ballot drop boxes
2\. Banning special voting deputies from long term care facilities
3\. Relocating and closing polling places on the eve of an election
---
There’s too much at stake for us to lose this battle in the courts, Friend.
---
**Our freedom, our way of life, and the future of our great nation all depend on free and fair elections -- elections where every voter can trust the process and the result.**
---
Now more than ever, I need you fighting by my side to ensure our elections are free and fair.
---

clean_body: I’m suing the Wisconsin Elections Commission to protect your vote. | Friend, After a non-partisan audit of the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) identified numerous instances of the Commission issuing unlawful guidance on the 2020 election, I knew we couldn’t wait to act. That’s why I’m SUING the WEC to ensure our elections are FREE and FAIR with less than 1 year to go until Election Day. But I’m counting on our grassroots supporters like YOU to help me marshal the resources to win this fight in the courts. If we don’t secure Wisconsin’s elections ahead of this MUST-WIN governor’s race, 2022 will be nothing more than a repeat of 2020. We cannot wait until the eve of next year’s election to address the WEC’s failure and willful neglect of the law. Which is exactly why I’m asking the state Supreme court to immediately SUSPEND the unlawful guidance the WEC issued on the 2020 election. Our lawsuit is focusing on 3 key areas where the WEC failed to follow the law in its guidance: 1\. Allowing municipalities to establish unattended absentee ballot drop boxes 2\. Banning special voting deputies from long term care facilities 3\. Relocating and closing polling places on the eve of an election There’s too much at stake for us to lose this battle in the courts, Friend. Our freedom, our way of life, and the future of our great nation all depend on free and fair elections -- elections where every voter can trust the process and the result. Now more than ever, I need you fighting by my side to ensure our elections are free and fair. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

body:
It's the future prosperity of our children and future generations of Americans that's at stake in 2022. I lost by less than 10,000 votes. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=791c1457cabb4f77999387739da59b78&_e=5O3oytK1sbJGAMjJqLew7Z9nE868ct24_EMbrkQSpYZqqPGLGqes7XycZn4ftrbv-ZzbyiIxQHg81weGjbj_iIWp4y8TJCROKGf6xxULeAm1RBbBImQVUvi7DMQidJ5TFeYaVpDbNyFqTYfMSVfDDYNFlhvxKqrujSVcbRZne-ATzgQJcOiUlB8XWNUItQe6-hoBxqnU2wXsiu9vKtKki6X1wnztgro6lT1m79BSO1u8Kus4yZvJMQCuIvYnaSPg1-4BwEyZjADk2F-KZsrvSIb7kDcurSqwd1XfLdfidav6vOCvgaw73qWbAKnV8ETAA6jOA9qG4HrP_-CBQygCDDXW7H-tDeRu_F-j1onXDlwhl-MI3NFEwCAMA36VkZod)

---
Fellow American -

When I think back on 2020, I remember how:

Our city burned.

Our families were scared, even in their own homes.

Violent crime surged across our communities.

**_When our country needed real leadership, we were failed._**

And now in the year 2021, hard-working Americans and their families are at a crossroads.

Despite the numerous campaign promises to serve the people's interests and not raise taxes, Congresswoman Craig and President Biden only sought to protect their own political interests with increased government spending, and already proposing massive tax increases on the middle class and American families.

The talk of unity and working together is long forgotten. The American people and those of the 2nd Congressional District deserve better leadership and vision.

[** ****SEND IN THE MARINE ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=791c1457cabb4f77999387739da59b78&_e=5O3oytK1sbJGAMjJqLew7Z9nE868ct24_EMbrkQSpYZqqPGLGqes7XycZn4ftrbv-ZzbyiIxQHg81weGjbj_iIWp4y8TJCROKGf6xxULeAm1RBbBImQVUvi7DMQidJ5TFeYaVpDbNyFqTYfMSVfDDW0rT6BYCti0srGP5evvycx8qFDPjRbvlZlQ0VPQSfQDo0-9BGm-iuMkzWIPyjoZBTbaOI06I6pTIr5rkM6U1S-482Iblu73zxBjwH2ouiozmagPUhGY3UVysnC1BDIcEibzdDBcBIfSNtRjTzom2emhuWbzgYPwLnnbg1fCfPnNxNIA8sCK62vqLN38KSQ_aK4KGH_hO8gC-v1_rXmuvYlCjdDSxzyjRpC980SnvbXS)
Last year, I ran for Congress to fight for America’s future and preserve the American dream for my children. It's the future prosperity of our children and future generations of Americans that's at stake in 2022. _**I lost by less than 10,000 votes.**_

After seeing the broken promises and failed policies that work against the people's interests, I knew that once again I had no choice but to get off the sidelines and join the fight for America's future. [**Would you consider contributing $10, $25, or any other amount to send a proud father, Marine Raider, and Republican to Congress?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=791c1457cabb4f77999387739da59b78&_e=5O3oytK1sbJGAMjJqLew7Z9nE868ct24_EMbrkQSpYZqqPGLGqes7XycZn4ftrbv-ZzbyiIxQHg81weGjbj_iIWp4y8TJCROKGf6xxULeAm1RBbBImQVUvi7DMQidJ5TFeYaVpDbNyFqTYfMSVfDDdNhIwO5_hBCdI00hsrDeX-3DEM6Le3UA1Em21SGio1552vNO5JVOeBg0BEKM4NsyAxT0XoPEbhE0pbC0ocJv70zCh3tIkJnRt8Lu9mRarVOxLiViQJG3BhnM9EiUGUDIeDbwb0f3cKiDPov6cbrsdTQetxYKoN6QE9-fw_mETSVRfFD9eusVEIUWoOH6k4l_axrlPGFLyCzMmpm7XHtG3GCIuOD108mSehBdOo_2zUF)

[** ****SEND IN THE MARINE ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=791c1457cabb4f77999387739da59b78&_e=5O3oytK1sbJGAMjJqLew7Z9nE868ct24_EMbrkQSpYZqqPGLGqes7XycZn4ftrbv-ZzbyiIxQHg81weGjbj_iIWp4y8TJCROKGf6xxULeAm1RBbBImQVUvi7DMQidJ5TFeYaVpDbNyFqTYfMSVfDDca_mR7x4ie8mOkR2jVAIb8yUUJrjBx7eTsa4pb23hQgkojDKeSWhxq7ESRSvMesg5N8fiOJhhtN9gfKL_iUD75mZsgRSpd4DA6aiIfDIK9lYspvRuo1B3mvoBImOPVaco9dyE90js_lnfeeHlRrVWSYRuv6YZZZ8TYJbAAIET4f7SHM7KYoMzrAU0fjxKKfkGxy6TaQLAb4va_Wrgd-hpVSwsSwJM0xUNaQp870_qip)
When I ran last year, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. But this year, all eyes are on this seat. It’s one of the top races in the country because Republicans only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take the country back from the intolerant and radical Left.

As Americans, we don't have to accept the Washington politicians' failed leadership and broken promises. I want to fix the broken system in Washington, so we have a country we are proud to leave for our next generation and that’s what I plan to do in Congress.

It would mean so much to me if you would chip in to my campaign so we can restore and protect the country that we love.

Let’s take our country back. [**Join me.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=791c1457cabb4f77999387739da59b78&_e=5O3oytK1sbJGAMjJqLew7Z9nE868ct24_EMbrkQSpYZqqPGLGqes7XycZn4ftrbv-ZzbyiIxQHg81weGjbj_iIWp4y8TJCROKGf6xxULeAm1RBbBImQVUvi7DMQidJ5TFeYaVpDbNyFqTYfMSVfDDd0G9eZlavDZJnT2pg68yO-lwV1xekoZSuIO_gW9HTvQnZXWPjZ4IBfYYTaWyWuUi_mIoCtDnzmXjEeg4An6LAeXr1Os8Jhrrh5NJ1wdL9kR63QWKI2vGcSOM5SalDoDjGU8PooZcJgc5jBtcrPVAPSfM_hInsyN-XSujSa8jx52n_1uhXEv370yuv1nETZ03vlSPLZoLNholcXDptXyON7CweA8nGmLaJKPWBz1nSO9)

clean_body: It's the future prosperity of our children and future generations of Americans that's at stake in 2022. I lost by less than 10,000 votes. | Fellow American - When I think back on 2020, I remember how: Our city burned. Our families were scared, even in their own homes. Violent crime surged across our communities. When our country needed real leadership, we were failed. And now in the year 2021, hard-working Americans and their families are at a crossroads. Despite the numerous campaign promises to serve the people's interests and not raise taxes, Congresswoman Craig and President Biden only sought to protect their own political interests with increased government spending, and already proposing massive tax increases on the middle class and American families. The talk of unity and working together is long forgotten. The American people and those of the 2nd Congressional District deserve better leadership and vision. Last year, I ran for Congress to fight for America’s future and preserve the American dream for my children. It's the future prosperity of our children and future generations of Americans that's at stake in 2022. I lost by less than 10,000 votes. After seeing the broken promises and failed policies that work against the people's interests, I knew that once again I had no choice but to get off the sidelines and join the fight for America's future. When I ran last year, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. But this year, all eyes are on this seat. It’s one of the top races in the country because Republicans only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take the country back from the intolerant and radical Left. As Americans, we don't have to accept the Washington politicians' failed leadership and broken promises. I want to fix the broken system in Washington, so we have a country we are proud to leave for our next generation and that’s what I plan to do in Congress. It would mean so much to me if you would chip in to my campaign so we can restore and protect the country that we love. Let’s take our country back. In Service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. Marine. | Tyler Kistner * Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 9 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future. | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? It’s (finally) infrastructure week in America. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659274/316465850/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTM4MzlhZS01YjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FslROGAZStr5alWnAGYhsfLmp9GkDIgGZEcqCaaDa1c=&emci=31868c0b-8841-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fe3839ae-5b46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)
Peter, This is a great day for our country — and a great day for North Carolina. **President Biden just signed the historic, bipartisan infrastructure plan.** After years of partisan gridlock, common sense, and strategic give and take, this plan will really deliver for the American people. We’re rebuilding crumbling roads and bridges, shoring up our water and sewer systems, expanding high-speed internet access to all of our state, investing in public transportation, opening the way for more electric vehicles with charging station infrastructure, and making some of the first major investments in resilience in the face of climate change. **North Carolina will receive almost _$9 billion_ to directly fund projects in our state. **Here’s what it’s going towards: ✅ Repairing 1,460 bridges and more than 3,100 miles of highways considered to be in poor condition
✅ Expanding broadband access to the 424,000 people in the state who still need it
✅ Investing more than $900 million across five years to improve public transportation
✅ Building a network of electric vehicle charging stations to encourage the use of electric cars Peter: When Democrats lead and work together, we can accomplish big, difficult things. We can _deliver on our promises_ and make this country work better for all of us. **[But if our administration is going to achieve all our priorities for North Carolina, we need more Democratic leaders working with us here in Raleigh. So I’ll be direct: Can you chip in $10 or any amount to support our efforts to elect Democrats up and down the ballot next year? Click here to donate>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659275/316465851/435245919?refcode=em_RC_FR_BIFsign-RR_111521_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTM4MzlhZS01YjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FslROGAZStr5alWnAGYhsfLmp9GkDIgGZEcqCaaDa1c=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659278/316465853/435245919?refcode=em_RC_FR_BIFsign-RR_111521_express10&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTM4MzlhZS01YjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FslROGAZStr5alWnAGYhsfLmp9GkDIgGZEcqCaaDa1c=)

name: Action Needed [via Left Action]
subject: 54,000 letters to Congress - send yours today!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [ADD YOUR NAME: Tell Congress to pass the Protecting our Democracy Act >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4145993-867b-4be3-b5af-1580ce21abaa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td65f0cd9-a090-46cc-a542-f6af5ad60db5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump’s presidency exposed the cracks in our government when it comes to checks and balances. During his tenure, he intentionally abused his power to appeal to his base of supporters, and used the office of the president for his own personal gain. And he faced zero consequences. That’s why House Democrats introduced a bill to prevent this from ever happening again. The Protecting Our Democracy Act includes several key reforms that curb unconstrained executive power and also increase executive branch transparency and accountability. The Protecting Our Democracy Act makes sure that no president is above the law -- no matter what party they belong to. For the sake of our democracy, we need to ensure Congress passes this bill. [Click here to sign the petition to demand Congress pass the Protecting Our Democracy Act and send a message directly to your representative.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6791e68-5506-4f63-aa3a-c73e94a274c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Activists from across the country have sent over 54,000 letters to Congress so far. Will you add yours now?

name: Laura Loomer
subject: This scared me . . .
body:
Last night, I got this text from my fundraising director, Shane
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/c7QewF892Vvuv763FCZDGrskYA/0892VE86ZnHJO3nmshgw44yw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/c7QewF892Vvuv763FCZDGrskYA/0892VE86ZnHJO3nmshgw44yw)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/c7QewF892Vvuv763FCZDGrskYA/0892VE86ZnHJO3nmshgw44yw)
Patriot,

Last night, I got this text from my fundraising director, Shane:

When he first texted me, “Laura, I have bad news.” I lost my breath.

Shane has never said anything like that in my years of working with him, and he is generally always optimistic.

So when he said he had bad news, it scared me.

Fundraising this month has been horrible, and I’ll explain that next, but please make an emergency donation now.

Across the board, fundraising for Republican candidates has been at the lowest levels that anyone has seen in nearly a decade!

Why?

They’re calling it “Republican apathy.”

First, Republicans are poised to make gains in the Mid-Terms — but not because voters are excited about our candidates, but because voters are sick of the Biden Regime!!

And if we don’t make some serious changes in our party leadership when we do take back control of the House, the GOP likely won’t be much different than the Democrat Party!

That’s why it’s vital I get in to Congress next year to shake things up by knocking out a Do-Nothing Republican!

[**Help me get there today!**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/c7QewF892Vvuv763FCZDGrskYA/0892VE86ZnHJO3nmshgw44yw)

We have seven days to raise $14,700. [**Can you pitch in $20, $100 or even $10 today?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/c7QewF892Vvuv763FCZDGrskYA/0892VE86ZnHJO3nmshgw44yw)

We WILL gain back the House next year! But what will the Republican Party look like?

Will it be like Paul Ryan’s Congress that couldn’t get rid of Obamacare despite having total control of the government?

Or will we primary out RINO’s and Do-Nothing Republicans, and replace them with America First fighters like myself and finally become the party that holds the line against the Biden Regime and REVERSES their AMERICA LAST policies?

There’s only one way to answer that question: [**help me get to Congress**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/c7QewF892Vvuv763FCZDGrskYA/0892VE86ZnHJO3nmshgw44yw).

Thanks so much for all you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Tony
P.S. I’m forwarding you Lauren’s message, in case you missed it. I hope you can see why this is so important to us.
* * *
I know it’s usually my husband Tony asking you for money.
But today, I told Tony I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us.
[**_So, yes -- I’m about to ask for $10 before midnight. Let me explain why. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659555/316467269/1129282168?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGUyZTI0Ni01ZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jj7Fjn4PdZfeRJUoaBOUFY_-p5E35uOXOMEzTjgwaPw=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659556/316467270/1129282168?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGUyZTI0Ni01ZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jj7Fjn4PdZfeRJUoaBOUFY_-p5E35uOXOMEzTjgwaPw=)
I know Tony can flip this seat for Democrats:
**[One of the things I admire most about Tony is that when he believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659557/316467273/1129282168?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGUyZTI0Ni01ZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jj7Fjn4PdZfeRJUoaBOUFY_-p5E35uOXOMEzTjgwaPw=)**
When he ran for the state Legislature, Tony fought for his principles against all odds.
When local businesses were struggling due to the pandemic, Tony secured relief funding.
When Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like my father-in-law.
And when Republican Congressman Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and voted against COVID relief:
[**Tony stepped up to unseat him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659558/316467274/1129282168?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGUyZTI0Ni01ZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jj7Fjn4PdZfeRJUoaBOUFY_-p5E35uOXOMEzTjgwaPw=)
[**_Everyday folks deserve a fighting chance, but my husband’s opponent doesn’t have the interests of our community at heart. Tony is determined to win this race, but it won’t be easy -- or cheap. Don Bacon already has a $260,000 fundraising lead. That’s why Tony needs to raise another $10,775 before midnight, and why I said I’d ask you today on his behalf. Will you chip in $10 to help him close this gap? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659559/316467275/1129282168?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGUyZTI0Ni01ZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jj7Fjn4PdZfeRJUoaBOUFY_-p5E35uOXOMEzTjgwaPw=)
Now you know a bit about Tony’s amazing track record.
But I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for him.
It’s personal.
It’s rooted in his experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds.
It’s rooted in the lessons he learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like him.
And it’s rooted in his desire to leave the world a better place for our kids, Ava and Luca.
[**I know you work hard for your money, and I wish I didn’t have to ask.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659561/316467276/1129282168?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGUyZTI0Ni01ZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jj7Fjn4PdZfeRJUoaBOUFY_-p5E35uOXOMEzTjgwaPw=)
But if Tony misses his $10,775 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign.
And it will be that much harder for him to flip this important seat for Democrats.
[**_So I’m asking one last time: If you believe in Tony like I do, will you chip in $10 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659562/316467277/1129282168?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGUyZTI0Ni01ZDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jj7Fjn4PdZfeRJUoaBOUFY_-p5E35uOXOMEzTjgwaPw=)

Republicans know that these new maps are completely unfair and that they further dilute democracy in Ohio -- it’s their goal. name: Ras Smith
subject: Quick updates in my race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
National Republicans came out swinging against the striking workers at John Deere, accusing them of "jeopardizing entire crops and the livelihood of farmers all across Iowa." |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659934/316468822/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWZiZTcxMS01ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g6CjhJMwD9-2hGBPKQRzMdW2hMlfpjWy22qCXHoQxlI=)
Friend,

Before I ask you to [**chip in $30**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38659935/316468823/-73891749?refcode=em-111521-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWZiZTcxMS01ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g6CjhJMwD9-2hGBPKQRzMdW2hMlfpjWy22qCXHoQxlI=) to our mid-month goal, I want to share a few updates on the strike at John Deere and our race. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop: **• Last week, National Republicans came out swinging against the workers, accusing them of "jeopardizing entire crops and the livelihood of farmers all across Iowa."** My opponent Kim Reynolds has had a month to stand with them, but instead she's pandering to the far-right on issues like the pandemic and immigration. It's clear what side she's on.

**• The far-right is rewarding her, handsomely.** She announced she had over a million dollars in her warchest earlier this year. That number certainly grew after a boost from Donald Trump at his MAGA rally.

**• In response, we're ramping up our organizing efforts.** We're visiting every corner of the state to _correct Reynolds' record._ We're reminding Iowans that she rejected hundreds of millions of funds for our public schools, and has failed to stand with workers.

**• In order to fund our campaign, we need to hit our $8,000 online fundraising goal for the month of November. We're still**$6,744 short** and need to pick up the pace.** If ten people from your area chip in just $30, we'd hit our daily goal in an instant. [**Friend, can you be one of my ten supporters from your area that chips in $30 or whatever you can before midnight tonight? My opponent Kim Reynolds has had a month to stand with them, but instead she's pandering to the far-right on issues like the pandemic and immigration. It's clear what side she's on. • The far-right is rewarding her, handsomely. She announced she had over a million dollars in her warchest earlier this year. That number certainly grew after a boost from Donald Trump at his MAGA rally. • In response, we're ramping up our organizing efforts. We're visiting every corner of the state to correct Reynolds' record. name: Ted Deutch
subject: making an investment in your everyday life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Deutch for Congress
body:
| Team,

I was so proud to have supported the historic and vital Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill that will improve the lives of so many Americans. From creating good paying union jobs and growing the economy, to improving our roads, bridges, broadband, and public transportation, we are going to bring our infrastructure into the 21st Century.

For decades politicians have been talking about the need for a major infrastructure investment. For years politicians have failed — until now. We must give credit to President Joe Biden and Speaker Pelosi for finally getting us to the finish line. Congress has done more than just talk about infrastructure — we have delivered.

This bipartisan bill is the largest investment ever in the infrastructure of our nation. Florida will receive over $13 billion for highways, $245 billion for bridge replacement and repairs, $2.6 billion for public transportation, $198 million for electric vehicle charging networks, $100 million for broadband coverage, and so much more.

With this historic legislation passing, we are making certain that America remains a global leader for decades to come. I am excited to see all the good this bill will do across the country and especially in South Florida.

Thank you,

Ted

---

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: We just won the support of a major national group
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Taking the Hill PAC, a prominent veterans organization, has endorsed my candidacy.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660133/316469799/-381930006?refcode=EM_FR_211115TTH_N_CD_FULL_8_G_N_Logo&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmIxMTA1ZC01ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WsYfl9UuB1YwX0kUPZahLixsNg3V13s98e_v29kAeME=)
---
Derek,

This past Thursday, I was honored to receive a major national endorsement from Taking the Hill PAC — a leading group in supporting veterans who run for office. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660135/316469800/-381930006?refcode=EM_FR_211115TTH_N_CD_FULL_8_G_N_P1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmIxMTA1ZC01ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WsYfl9UuB1YwX0kUPZahLixsNg3V13s98e_v29kAeME=) This is a clear signal of the continued momentum behind us — and we'll need it if we want to win in one of the nation's most competitive House districts. [**If you believe in our platform of ending the forever wars, ensuring veterans have the care they need, and protecting the tenets of our democracy, please make a donation of $5 or more to my campaign to keep PA-17 blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660136/316469801/-381930006?refcode=EM_FR_211115TTH_N_CD_FULL_8_G_N_L1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmIxMTA1ZC01ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WsYfl9UuB1YwX0kUPZahLixsNg3V13s98e_v29kAeME=) ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660137/316469802/-381930006?refcode=EM_FR_211115TTH_N_CD_FULL_8_G_N_B1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmIxMTA1ZC01ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WsYfl9UuB1YwX0kUPZahLixsNg3V13s98e_v29kAeME=)**** I am so proud to have earned the endorsement of this veterans group, led by former Pennsylvania Congressman and Army Under Secretary Patrick Murphy. I'm honored by his words of support: | _"I am so proud to endorse Chris Deluzio for Congress. His service to our country in uniform, and his continued service to our fellow veterans, inspires me. Chris is a leader that I look to on so many of the critical issues facing our nation, from defending Americans from cyber attack to securing our election systems and protecting our sacred right to vote. Chris is Western Pennsylvania's finest, and I am honored to have his back as he runs to represent us in Congress."

-Patrick Murphy, former Congressman, 32nd Under Secretary of the Army, and founder of Taking the Hill PAC._
---
Like so many other Iraq war veterans, it’s important to me that we never wade back into costly forever wars and focus instead on rebuilding right here at home. I promise my fellow veterans this: **I will always be there to fight for full funding and staffing of the VA, to defend the VA from right-wing privatization attacks, and to make sure our government never backs down from the commitment to care for those who stepped up to serve in uniform.**

Thank you,

Chris
| | **Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660138/316469803/-381930006?refcode=EM_FR_211115TTH_N_CD_FULL_8_G_N_BioBox&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmIxMTA1ZC01ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WsYfl9UuB1YwX0kUPZahLixsNg3V13s98e_v29kAeME=)****

He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. =** Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
