clean_body: | | | | His Vax mandates are unconstitutional. Friend, The Biden vaccine mandates are unconstitutional and must be stopped! I refuse to sit idly by as the Biden administration and unelected and unaccountable bureaucrats trample all over the rights of my fellow Americans. That is why my law firm has filed a class-action lawsuit against the Biden Administration. Tens of thousands of Americans face the prospect of losing their jobs over these illegal mandates. Small businesses that are trying to recover from the pandemic are facing worker shortages because of the Biden administration’s gross government overreach. Too many politicians are remaining silent as these unlawful mandates take effect. Our fellow Americans are facing the prospect of losing their jobs, their careers, their livelihoods, and their places in society. These mandates do nothing but permanently divide our country into classes of people based on their vaccination status. To say that this is bad public policy is an understatement! The Biden administration is acting nothing short of tyrannical. American citizens are being stripped of their most fundamental civil liberties.** I have successfully defended the rights of Wyomingites from government overreach for decades. I have no intention of stopping now. I hope you will join me today, so together we can fight back for Wyoming and for America. To read more about my efforts to defend your rights**** and the**Constitution, "read the full article here". For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I thought you deserved an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
In a few moments, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to help me flip this seat in Wisconsin blue by defeating Ron Johnson. This is an important moment for our campaign, which is why I’m reaching out. Can I have a minute to explain?

The most critical FEC deadline of our campaign so far is coming up in a few short weeks, and it’s the final one before we officially enter the midterm election year. Once this deadline passes, we’re legally required to report how much money we’ve raised, and we’ll release the number of donations we’ve received.

Everybody from the press to Ron Johnson and Mitch McConnell, along with their corporate donors and special interests, will be looking over our FEC report to see if we’re putting together the resources (and the people) needed to win. That makes these donations critical.

With major election forecasters already calling Wisconsin the tipping point for Senate control, national Republicans will begin pouring millions of dollars into this race at any moment, especially if they are given an opening. All of that means I have to ask:

**[Can you help us demonstrate the grassroots strength of this campaign by contributing any amount today? Now that we are at the halfway point in the quarter, there’s no time to waste. We need to collect 2,500 individual donations before tomorrow's midnight deadline in order to stay on track for the rest of the year. I’m counting on you:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660225/316470172/1201999653?refcode=em21_211115_mm3_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211115_mm3_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ0NTM5NS01ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V5Uk7hFYxKfOyjnH9jeAfUclcuvIe-Xfc2qJignUv0M=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660226/316470173/1201999653?refcode=em21_211115_mm3_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211115_mm3_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWQ0NTM5NS01ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V5Uk7hFYxKfOyjnH9jeAfUclcuvIe-Xfc2qJignUv0M=)

The amount you give is far less important than the act of contributing. Every time you pitch in to support this campaign, you’re sending a powerful message about the type of leadership you deserve in Washington.

I want anyone who looks at our FEC report to see what I see: A strong coalition of regular people chipping in to our campaign because they believe in the work we’re doing together. No corporate PACs. Just you.

Thanks for standing with me.

— Sarah

Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. clean_body: In a few moments, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to help me flip this seat in Wisconsin blue by defeating Ron Johnson. This is an important moment for our campaign, which is why I’m reaching out. Can I have a minute to explain? The most critical FEC deadline of our campaign so far is coming up in a few short weeks, and it’s the final one before we officially enter the midterm election year. Once this deadline passes, we’re legally required to report how much money we’ve raised, and we’ll release the number of donations we’ve received. Everybody from the press to Ron Johnson and Mitch McConnell, along with their corporate donors and special interests, will be looking over our FEC report to see if we’re putting together the resources (and the people) needed to win. That makes these donations critical. With major election forecasters already calling Wisconsin the tipping point for Senate control, national Republicans will begin pouring millions of dollars into this race at any moment, especially if they are given an opening. All of that means I have to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = The amount you give is far less important than the act of contributing. Every time you pitch in to support this campaign, you’re sending a powerful message about the type of leadership you deserve in Washington. I want anyone who looks at our FEC report to see what I see: A strong coalition of regular people chipping in to our campaign because they believe in the work we’re doing together. No corporate PACs. Just you. Thanks for standing with me. — Sarah Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

Maxwell has spent his life as an organizer, fighting for the future we deserve. He knows the time for poor, working-class, and young people to have a seat at the table is now. He is running a bold, progressive campaign to end gun violence, pass Medicare For All, transform our criminal justice system, and combat the climate crisis. His mission is about organizing a coalition of people behind a platform that represents their values and interests -- and he has the track record to do just that!
---
As a National Organizer with the ACLU, Maxwell pushed Joe Biden to agree to abolish the Hyde Amendment, an act that has limited abortion access for millions of people. He organized the movement that restored voting rights to 1.6 million Floridians with previous felonies. And he's led thousands of young activists in the fight against gun violence as the National Organizing Director of March for Our Lives. Maxwell's hard work and determination proves he has what it takes to get young voters and voters of color to the polls. **If elected, he would be the first congressional representative to be a member of Generation-Z!** ** ** **With your support, we are going to seize this historic opportunity.** **[Your split contribution between Maxwell and Future Generations will help boost his campaign and make sure we have the resources we need to get him elected.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVY1lwzmxc_ehOc3-dJkcbLmURngu-FkOIOVhLgt01oEArEwM8DcRtjjAq4NrSlHSv_X00S-HxsU5DM2hcJI43lu1sZ_oWvSMqttGfMjOVRntehedXDVE9UVuqZRNaTSFg37C3EwaGY_k_cCHZr-GLk5xRpeqZ3f8boy16lRotfwKFchEfYP1VnLNkeO31x8AIT_aq2_DW2FQ0aODs1voSSyy14fhezrqEkIfwRhXiYveGvZl7wAdATo6M9bUy5nRClCyfGrQ6baT8aYzhB7fZEUHWFEjnXEar-R6iRItsExntvA7mhu4z8DlmbuesuKx4i4gAFA_FTIGc-Hjx1xKcD2SbI7jWpl7cuDAmKcSjOZaKVyVZOcr4UBMC33_qTo/3h1/El6W4OJiT4W-9nvXrGWItg/h3/qHeRKSvZRdqJb9OmT_xS7G6Bhu0saCsns8BDCJNsv-s)** Join us, and let's elect #MaxwellForTheFuture! name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Infrastructure bill passed; what's next?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Team,

It's been a long several months working with my Democratic and Republican colleagues in the Problem Solvers Caucus and across New Jersey to pass the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill.

Finally, with President Biden signing the bill today, all of our hard work has paid off. With the passage of this monumental infrastructure package, we will be able to build the Gateway Tunnel and fix our crumbling roads, bridges, water, & transit.

[Victories like this make me optimistic for the future of our democracy. Will you contribute $20 to our campaign today, so I can continue to advocate for impactful legislation? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660481/316471400/-1301873340?amount=20&refcode2=fd47a774-6046-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=JG_EM_FR_3MO_211115_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDQ3YTc3NC02MDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YCLg2a7wyVd2loPaTSzhh9KjQZgegbxd_bZz7Nx69T0=)

The Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework is going to be a game changer for New Jersey. With the passing of the bill, **millions of jobs will be created every year.**

**This is exactly the type of legislation we need to support: a bipartisan measure implementing real change that impacts real people.**

This coming election, I’m coming out in full support of our bipartisan successes. Let's get to work to make sure we can continue to fight for Jersey Values in Congress. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | Team, It's been a long several months working with my Democratic and Republican colleagues in the Problem Solvers Caucus and across New Jersey to pass the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill. Finally, with President Biden signing the bill today, all of our hard work has paid off. With the passage of this monumental infrastructure package, we will be able to build the Gateway Tunnel and fix our crumbling roads, bridges, water, & transit. = | = The Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework is going to be a game changer for New Jersey. With the passing of the bill, millions of jobs will be created every year. This is exactly the type of legislation we need to support: a bipartisan measure implementing real change that impacts real people. This coming election, I’m coming out in full support of our bipartisan successes. Let's get to work to make sure we can continue to fight for Jersey Values in Congress. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | **= | = | = Thank you, Josh | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign =, if you'd like to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | = | = | Prefer to donate by mail? disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660532/316471701/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYyODdjNS02MDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6F1NNqVsVe3RjnafGksDoEmyn6XFM_HeMygLd5hYrk=&emci=2ab1105d-5f46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fbf287c5-6046-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

We hope your fall is off to a great start -- we're reaching out to follow through on our goal to keep everyone looped into the work on the ground. From events with local Democrats to meeting with the Girl Scouts, we've had a busy couple of weeks.

Here's what we've been up to:
* * *

Earlier this month, Christy got to organizing talking with the people of this district -- making sure they know how she'll represent them when she gets to Congress.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660533/316471702/1313983427?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYyODdjNS02MDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6F1NNqVsVe3RjnafGksDoEmyn6XFM_HeMygLd5hYrk=&emci=2ab1105d-5f46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fbf287c5-6046-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11385749)
---
* * *

Then, Christy celebrated Karen Bass at her launch party to be the next Mayor of Los Angeles. If elected, she would be the first woman to hold the position, and Christy is always excited to celebrate strong women any chance she gets.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660534/316471703/896210089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYyODdjNS02MDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6F1NNqVsVe3RjnafGksDoEmyn6XFM_HeMygLd5hYrk=&emci=2ab1105d-5f46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fbf287c5-6046-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11385749)
---
* * *

Then, Christy could not miss an opportunity to chat with the Girl Scouts on the International Day of the Girl.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660535/316471704/-553902855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYyODdjNS02MDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6F1NNqVsVe3RjnafGksDoEmyn6XFM_HeMygLd5hYrk=&emci=2ab1105d-5f46-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fbf287c5-6046-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11385749)
---
* * *

**Christy has been busy out in the district making sure her message gets to those who need to hear it, but she needs you on her team to make sure we can continue to build a strong campaign.**

**[Peter, with your help, Christy can continue to do what she does best: ensure that every voice can be supported. Please chip in $5 or whatever you can to Christy's campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38660536/316471705/-2052413565?refcode=em21_211115_campaignupdate-s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYyODdjNS02MDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6F1NNqVsVe3RjnafGksDoEmyn6XFM_HeMygLd5hYrk=)**

Together we can continue our fight to provide our fellow Americans with all the support they need!

\-- Team Christy

clean_body: | Peter, We hope your fall is off to a great start -- we're reaching out to follow through on our goal to keep everyone looped into the work on the ground. From events with local Democrats to meeting with the Girl Scouts, we've had a busy couple of weeks. Here's what we've been up to: Earlier this month, Christy got to organizing talking with the people of this district -- making sure they know how she'll represent them when she gets to Congress. | Then, Christy celebrated Karen Bass at her launch party to be the next Mayor of Los Angeles. If elected, she would be the first woman to hold the position, and Christy is always excited to celebrate strong women any chance she gets. Then, Christy could not miss an opportunity to chat with the Girl Scouts on the International Day of the Girl. Christy has been busy out in the district making sure her message gets to those who need to hear it, but she needs you on her team to make sure we can continue to build a strong campaign. = Together we can continue our fight to provide our fellow Americans with all the support they need! \-- Team Christy = = *

Friends -
I want to let you in on a little secret.
In 2020, we had some of the best testing ads of any outside group trying to elect Joe Biden. Our ads convinced people to vote for Joe Biden more than almost any other group spending money in the election.
And while we raised a good amount of money, it was a FRACTION of what other groups received. Even for ads specifically targeting Latino voters.
Would Democrats have done better among Latino voters if we were better-funded? I think so.
Can we let that happen again? No.
That is why we send these emails. We’re taking matters into our own hands. So I am asking:

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Time is running out to help Kyle Rittenhouse
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcvblf1e0qgdlb042sdfpu4bu7vku5lvrcm8btdg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i6cor4c3h2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze4p3hv0po0hi7djmlq4orggijn47g7cbhp37noo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i6cor4c3h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbj1r122h4j90kvqurugv9k7rce8instqniqc0bo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i6cor4c3h2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2qrg9eqvnf1hup5k5qa93o5rq31bkn2qh148ep8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i6cor4c3h2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|

name: House Freedom Caucus
subject: Making the Red Wave Count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| |
---
Peter:

Welcome to the most important six months of our political lives.

Everyone in Washington is talking about the big 2021 Republican win in Virginia and the 2022 midterms a year from now.

But we can't take our eye off the ball. The _**real**_ battleground right now is not the general election next November, but the _**Republican primaries**_ this coming spring and summer.

Just watch: more and more House Democrats will start retiring. They know their seats are lost, and their majority is over. They see the Red Wave on the horizon.

But at House Freedom Fund, we aren't interested in the color of the wave, only how strong it is. We don't want another weak Republican majority of corporate yes-men and Swamp creatures.

** [ We want conservative fighters! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58776500:JsFxPF2zN:m:1:3298722022:2BDFFB315D66CD1A367A472D43F141B2:r) **

The issues that won for Glenn Youngkin in Virginia - Covid hysteria, Critical Race Theory, trans extremism, election integrity - are the issues the American people really care about.

That's why the House Freedom Fund is recruiting, vetting, and endorsing candidates who are ready to lead on all of them.

Make no mistake: Republicans will almost certainly win back Congress in 2022. The only choice before us is: _**What kind of Republicans will we send to Washington?**_

One thing we all know: RINOs won't rescue America.

That's why the fight right now is in Republican primaries. The winners of those primaries will determine who really controls Congress heading into 2024, the most important election of our lifetimes.

With a true, fighting, conservative majority, Congress can:

✅ Find out what REALLY happened in the 2020 election, and on January 6;

✅ Tell the truth about Biden's failure on the Southern border;

✅ End funding of Critical Race Theory insanity in federal agencies and contractors;

✅ Subpoena the Justice Department and FBI about their targeting of parents protesting corrupt school boards; and,

✅ STOP Joe Biden's destructive agenda dead in its tracks.

** [ Join this fight by making a split contribution to our priority House candidates today! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58776500:JsFxPF2zN:m:1:3298722022:2BDFFB315D66CD1A367A472D43F141B2:r) **

Building a conservative majority in Congress is HFF's only mission for the next six months. We don't need more establishment cowards. We need 50 more Jim Jordans, Marjorie Taylor Greenes, Lauren Boeberts, Byron Donalds, and Yvette Harrells. We need leaders who are ready for the war the Left is about to launch against conservatives, parents, and patriots around the country.

We cannot win the battles of the next six months without you.

**[ Please support HFF and our candidates today, and turn the 2021 Virginia victory into a 2022 nationwide blowout! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58776500:JsFxPF2zN:m:1:3298722022:2BDFFB315D66CD1A367A472D43F141B2:r) **

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for everything you to do help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund
|

I’m worried that we won’t be able to pass all our progressive priorities before the 2022 midterm elections due to Republican obstruction.

And I’m absolutely terrified that we will lose our House majority and Biden’s Build Back Better agenda will go down the drain.

Right now, we’re $1,837 short of our $7,000 Mid Month fundraising goal._**If we miss this, we’ll be vulnerable to Republican challengers trying to steal CA-41 from us.**_

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re gerrymandering me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6582%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=g8yn6hkVpZbQi2%2bNGoU%2bwA&sysid=1)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67098%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HaFisA4XyLoqLmTL5v8hqg&sysid=1)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67099%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DrweJDZ1SfKoN%2bvFNguoWQ&sysid=1)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office - I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67090%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gFz6%2bwQOPHEmEo55Pc48Zg&sysid=1)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67091%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bTWaW7Mv0gEd8VEu4PVQnQ&sysid=1)

**[Your donation,](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67092%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=obqTHf%2f5oVsFinjdmm4XMQ&sysid=1)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67093%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PiDvz91ncMyt9VIIp8NKgw&sysid=1)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67091%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bTWaW7Mv0gEd8VEu4PVQnQ&sysid=1)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67094%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KTwDmMtvEcQ3VJ%2fL0PLKoQ&sysid=1)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67005%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zLlYXJs53n8dyi53pMUkIA&sysid=1)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67091%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bTWaW7Mv0gEd8VEu4PVQnQ&sysid=1)

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office - I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties. whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years. My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic. Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down. No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built. Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by: Forcing critical race theory into our schools. Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts. Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY. That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that ** You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country. I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people! For Liberty, Jim | | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

I'm proud to have supported the bipartisan infrastructure package.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38661446/316475215/-2113420158?refcode=JP_EM_PT_FL_211115_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjdmMGFkMi02MzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TsqAI_NJFl_m_2M6j7u4_hUeQWdapfxKjhVkg8edrfA=&emci=e57f0ad2-6346-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e67f0ad2-6346-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6108787) | Peter, last week I was proud to vote in favor of the bipartisan infrastructure package that President Biden just signed into law. For far too long, we have undervalued and underinvested in our nation’s infrastructure, and this is a once-in-a-generation investment in the future of our nation.

**Some of the main priorities in this bill that I fought for are:**

• **Highways, roadways, and bridges,** as well as a major investment in public transportation

• **Water infrastructure** to ensure that we have access to water resources and that every American has access to clean, safe drinking water

• **Broadband infrastructure** so that all Americans have access to reliable internet services

• **Supply chain infrastructure** to reduce the product delivery slow-downs that we are experiencing

• **Wildfire prevention** including my legislation that will invest in reforestation, create jobs, sequester carbon, and help prevent mudslides after wildfires

[I’m looking forward to what the future holds for our nation now that the bipartisan infrastructure package has passed, and I hope you are too. Will you sign on today if you support this new infrastructure package?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38661447/316475216/2066293472?refcode=JP_EM_PT_FL_211115_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjdmMGFkMi02MzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TsqAI_NJFl_m_2M6j7u4_hUeQWdapfxKjhVkg8edrfA=&emci=e57f0ad2-6346-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e67f0ad2-6346-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6108787) [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38661448/316475217/2066293472?refcode=JP_EM_PT_FL_211115_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjdmMGFkMi02MzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TsqAI_NJFl_m_2M6j7u4_hUeQWdapfxKjhVkg8edrfA=&emci=e57f0ad2-6346-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e67f0ad2-6346-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6108787) Thank you for your support, Peter. clean_body: Bad news, folks: Republicans are holding the largest lead ahead of the midterm elections in 40 years, according to a brand-new poll from ABC News and the Washington Post. In short, our Democratic majority is on the line. It will take incredible work to hold our majority. But, unfortunately, we are falling short of our last mid-quarter goal of the year. It’s critical that we meet each and every grassroots fundraising goal to support Democrats in competitive races that could make or break our majority. Will you add a contribution of $10 or any amount before our mid-quarter deadline expires at midnight tonight? body:
We’re supporting unprecedented investments to combat climate change.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38661631/316475793/-783913782?refcode=EM_FR_211115BBB_N_TN_90DO_4_G_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTIzNzE0MC02NDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QIP0SUSq3GUd5-picLaTGnpBw5SugEg8rgHitDUJg2g=) Team,

Earlier this month, Congress passed the INVEST in America Act, a $1 trillion infrastructure package and key component of President Biden’s economic plan. **Next up, the Build Back Better Act, a $1.75 trillion package of essential investments in our country and our people — including major steps to address the climate crisis.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38661632/316475794/-783913782?refcode=EM_FR_211115BBB_N_TN_90DO_4_G_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTIzNzE0MC02NDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QIP0SUSq3GUd5-picLaTGnpBw5SugEg8rgHitDUJg2g=) From investing in green energy technology to advancing environmental justice, **the Build Back Better Act will make unprecedented investments to combat climate change.** We can’t stop there. The Build Back Better Act is a critical down-payment on climate change, but we must continue to do more.

[**_NextGen PAC is building grassroots power to elect progressive leaders who are committed to solving our climate crisis. name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies.
| | | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zm2u5tbjartnhvihp3i7ec6lh3grbr02ni2ug4k8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i6aob4cdh2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now with trial underway, it has been falling apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zaf4jg4eob2f5pcmh6lhjmmngsfpdpibe8atrbc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i6aob4cdh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zstoko73pccck1lhtan6usbgl5qmaqeqkn5gn1s0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i6aob4cdh2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z06oda57uca0m8maqed5urjg1spgjbhau9m49ero_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1i6aob4cdh2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: I’ll be honest, we’re coming up short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Sorry for another email, but hear me out?
#
Derek,
I hate having to send these emails, but that’s how you know they’re important. Tonight marks the midway point of the month, and our online fundraising is going slower than I had hoped.
**I checked our numbers again just a bit ago, and we’re behind where we need to be right now in November.**
[**_Can you chip in any amount right now to help flip PA 🔵 and get our fundraising back on track? Every dollar we raise before midnight goes directly to John’s official Flip Pennsylvania Fund, and your donation from Cresco will make a huge difference._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37375?refcode=em20211115-3470&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3470%2E434096%2EHDp3mE)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37375?refcode=em20211115-3470&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3470%2E434096%2EHDp3mE)**
Look, we all saw what happened in Virginia earlier this month. And we especially know that Democrats can only win when we focus on talking to every voter, urban *and* rural.
That’s why we’re focused on running a true statewide campaign here in PA, and getting out to all 67 Counties of our Commonwealth. John says it all the time, and we really mean it: _Every County, Every Vote._
**A donation to our Flip Pennsylvania Fund is so incredibly impactful because John doesn’t take a single dime of corporate PAC money.** This campaign is funded by grassroots donors just like you, so we rely on folks chipping in a few bucks whenever they can.
I’m sure you get a ton of emails every day, and I’m grateful that you’ve taken the time to read this one.
[**_So again, could you please kick in a few bucks before midnight tonight? It would mean the world to us if you donate to the Flip Pennsylvania Fund and help get our November fundraising back on track._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37375?refcode=em20211115-3470&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3470%2E434096%2EHDp3mE)
I know that with a few more donors from Cresco, we’ll be able to keep getting out across ALL of PA and fighting for every vote.
Thank you,
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211115-3470-footer&t=22&refcode2=3470_434096_HDp3mE&akid=3470%2E434096%2EHDp3mE)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3470%2E434096%2EHDp3mE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3470%2E434096%2EHDp3mE)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

**[Chip in an urgent $3 to help Eric Gash turn this Western North Carolina district blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38661995/316477358/1573898945?refcode=em-111521-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGZjYzA1OC02NjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ZRYeunikDT4Rcl9GDGZXmY9k5VODrGCqfnNCZdQdR4=)**

This is huge, folks.

**This past weekend, Madison Cawthorn dropped out of the race to represent our newly-redrawn congressional district. After redistricting, our Western Carolina community saw a seven-point Democratic shift. This race became much more competitive, so Cawthorn is retreating east to a gerrymandered district to keep power.**

To this news I say, _good riddance._

Cawthorn was never interested in uplifting working families. For him, Congress was about growing his celebrity within right-wing circles. The fact that he's bailing tells you all you need to know about the values he holds.

I'm relieved Cawthorn is out of the picture, but nothing has changed about my campaign. This race is still about our Education, Economy and Environment. It's about ensuring working families have a shot at high-wage jobs and affordable housing. These are things we can all agree on -- regardless of our party affiliations.

**[NC-14 is officially an open seat! Tomorrow at midnight marks our mid-quarter fundraising deadline, and we need to raise another $10,000 to expand our voter outreach. This past weekend, Madison Cawthorn dropped out of the race to represent our newly-redrawn congressional district. After redistricting, our Western Carolina community saw a seven-point Democratic shift. This race became much more competitive, so Cawthorn is retreating east to a gerrymandered district to keep power. To this news I say, good riddance. Cawthorn was never interested in uplifting working families. For him, Congress was about growing his celebrity within right-wing circles. The fact that he's bailing tells you all you need to know about the values he holds. I'm relieved Cawthorn is out of the picture, but nothing has changed about my campaign. This race is still about our Education, Economy and Environment. It's about ensuring working families have a shot at high-wage jobs and affordable housing. These are things we can all agree on -- regardless of our party affiliations. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I've never been more fired up about representing the people of Western Carolina, and Cawthorn leaving is the strongest signal yet that our momentum is growing. If anything, Cawthorn knew well that our community has no interest in politicians who fight and yell. We need someone who can put the interests of this district first. That is the objective of this campaign, and it’s a privilege to have you on our team. Thank you, Eric = | = Eric Gash is a teacher, pastor, former professional football player, and high school football coach running against Madison Cawthorn. Please consider = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Eric Gash for Congress PO BOX 543 Hendersonville, NC 28793 United States | Paid for by Eric Gash for Congress

subject: Is there anything I can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Please give me a chance to explain.
#
Peter:
**[In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662028/316477587/-181800575?refcode=dd_em_211115_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2NlNjViNC02NjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6--MvuNLWmzLcgZuIoIjm4CmgsXFVM8dvi_HNj3gFxQ=) **But first, please give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here’s the truth:
We’re less than one year out from Election day. This is important for a few reasons.
First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack.
Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022. And our official race ranking just changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up.
But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win.
It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone. So here’s where I ask:
**[Can you please split a $5 contribution to Senator Durbin and our campaign? I would not ask if it weren’t so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662029/316477588/-181800575?refcode=dd_em_211115_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2NlNjViNC02NjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6--MvuNLWmzLcgZuIoIjm4CmgsXFVM8dvi_HNj3gFxQ=)**
Thank you,
Mark

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Red Wave Is Coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| |
---
Peter:

Welcome to the most important six months of our political lives.

Everyone in Washington is talking about the big 2021 Republican win in Virginia and the 2022 midterms a year from now.

But we can't take our eye off the ball. The _**real**_ battleground right now is not the general election next November, but the _**Republican primaries**_ this coming spring and summer.

Just watch: more and more House Democrats will start retiring. They know their seats are lost, and their majority is over. They see the Red Wave on the horizon.

But at House Freedom Fund, we aren't interested in the color of the wave, only how strong it is. We don't want another weak Republican majority of corporate yes-men and Swamp creatures.

** [ We want conservative fighters! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58776543:6l9JMF27N:m:1:3253819041:85E68CC2CD048966F867EA14E144632A:r) **

The issues that won for Glenn Youngkin in Virginia - Covid hysteria, Critical Race Theory, trans extremism, election integrity - are the issues the American people really care about.

That's why the House Freedom Fund is recruiting, vetting, and endorsing candidates who are ready to lead on all of them.

Make no mistake: Republicans will almost certainly win back Congress in 2022. The only choice before us is: _**What kind of Republicans will we send to Washington?**_

One thing we all know: RINOs won't rescue America.

That's why the fight right now is in Republican primaries. The winners of those primaries will determine who really controls Congress heading into 2024, the most important election of our lifetimes.

With a true, fighting, conservative majority, Congress can:

✅ Find out what REALLY happened in the 2020 election, and on January 6;

✅ Tell the truth about Biden's failure on the Southern border;

✅ End funding of Critical Race Theory insanity in federal agencies and contractors;

✅ Subpoena the Justice Department and FBI about their targeting of parents protesting corrupt school boards; and,

✅ STOP Joe Biden's destructive agenda dead in its tracks.

** [ Join this fight by making a split contribution to our priority House candidates today! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58776543:6l9JMF27N:m:1:3253819041:85E68CC2CD048966F867EA14E144632A:r) **

Building a conservative majority in Congress is HFF's only mission for the next six months. We don't need more establishment cowards. We need 50 more Jim Jordans, Marjorie Taylor Greenes, Lauren Boeberts, Byron Donalds, and Yvette Harrells. We need leaders who are ready for the war the Left is about to launch against conservatives, parents, and patriots around the country.

We cannot win the battles of the next six months without you.

**[ Please support HFF and our candidates today, and turn the 2021 Virginia victory into a 2022 nationwide blowout! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58776543:6l9JMF27N:m:1:3253819041:85E68CC2CD048966F867EA14E144632A:r) **

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for everything you to do help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund
|

name: Wes Moore for Maryland
subject: Wes’ vision for Maryland
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662258/316479059/-337616580?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_wm4m_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzAxNTZiZC02NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd3JcmkOXfOVNUD7Sk5misTXlGPy0fZucKggQc6_Cm0=)
---
November has flown by and our Mid-Month Deadline is already here.
Before we ask for your help to reach Wes’ Mid-Month Fundraising Deadline, please allow us to share Wes’ vision for Maryland and explain some of the biggest driving forces behind his campaign for Governor.
[**1) Creating Economic Opportunity:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662259/316479060/-711004501?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_wm4m_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzAxNTZiZC02NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd3JcmkOXfOVNUD7Sk5misTXlGPy0fZucKggQc6_Cm0=)
Wes believes that no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed -- a job you can raise a family on, wages that reflect the dignity of work, and the chance to create wealth for you and your family. Right now in Maryland, that’s simply not the case. Economic opportunity is readily available to some and dangerously absent to others.
[**No one knows this better than Wes, who understands firsthand the struggles many Maryland families face and has made creating economic opportunity the central mission driving his candidacy for Governor. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662260/316479061/-711004501?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_wm4m_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzAxNTZiZC02NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd3JcmkOXfOVNUD7Sk5misTXlGPy0fZucKggQc6_Cm0=)
[**2) Supporting our Public Education System:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662261/316479062/-711004501?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_wm4m_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzAxNTZiZC02NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd3JcmkOXfOVNUD7Sk5misTXlGPy0fZucKggQc6_Cm0=)
For Wes, the true value of a strong education is personal -- it’s what allowed him to fulfill his potential. Wes comes from a family of educators, and he credits the teachers who spent time with him along the way, listened to him, and took an interest in his life with putting him on a path to success.
Wes believes the quality of education a child receives shouldn’t depend on the zip code where that child lives or what that child’s parents do for a living -- but, sadly, that’s exactly what’s happening in our state today. Right now, Maryland is home to some of the best public schools in America and also some of the most underfunded.
[**Wes wants to strengthen education all throughout Maryland by extending tutoring programs, raising teacher pay, and creating additional access to pre-k for low income families. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662262/316479063/-711004501?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_wm4m_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzAxNTZiZC02NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd3JcmkOXfOVNUD7Sk5misTXlGPy0fZucKggQc6_Cm0=)
[**3) Increasing Access to Affordable Health Care:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662263/316479064/-711004501?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_wm4m_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzAxNTZiZC02NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd3JcmkOXfOVNUD7Sk5misTXlGPy0fZucKggQc6_Cm0=)
Maryland is home to some of the very best hospitals, medical research institutions and health care facilities in the entire world -- but at the same time, so many Marylanders can’t access those institutions or even afford very basic care -- and that shouldn’t be the case.
When Wes was just three years old, he watched his father die in front of him from a virus that was completely treatable. That experience shaped Wes’ view that healthcare is a basic right that every Marylander deserves, period.
[**Wes will work to ensure the systems we have in place will provide effective and affordable services to those in need. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662264/316479065/-711004501?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_wm4m_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzAxNTZiZC02NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd3JcmkOXfOVNUD7Sk5misTXlGPy0fZucKggQc6_Cm0=)
Wes Moore is in this fight to bring real, generational change for Maryland families. But he’s relying on people like you to help him move Maryland forward.
[_**If you believe in Wes’ vision for our state and want to help Wes make it happen, nothing would mean more right now than your help to meet our Mid-Month Fundraising Deadline. Will you pitch in $15, or anything you can spare before tonight’s deadline, to help Wes bring this win home for Maryland? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662265/316479066/-711004501?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_wm4m_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzAxNTZiZC02NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd3JcmkOXfOVNUD7Sk5misTXlGPy0fZucKggQc6_Cm0=)
[**Chip in $15 now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662266/316479067/-711004501?refcode=20211115_em_fr_b1_wm4m_30&amount= $15 &amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzAxNTZiZC02NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd3JcmkOXfOVNUD7Sk5misTXlGPy0fZucKggQc6_Cm0=)
---

Elevate Together,

Team Moore

---

Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. We know you receive a lot of emails -- but that’s because winning this race is going to take a massive grassroots campaign. We need to educate, empower, and register thousands of new Democrats. We need to turn out every voter in every corner of Maryland. clean_body: | | | = November has flown by and our Mid-Month Deadline is already here. Before we ask for your help to reach Wes’ Mid-Month Fundraising Deadline, please allow us to share Wes’ vision for Maryland and explain some of the biggest driving forces behind his campaign for Governor. = Wes believes that no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed -- a job you can raise a family on, wages that reflect the dignity of work, and the chance to create wealth for you and your family. Right now in Maryland, that’s simply not the case. Economic opportunity is readily available to some and dangerously absent to others. = = For Wes, the true value of a strong education is personal -- it’s what allowed him to fulfill his potential. Wes comes from a family of educators, and he credits the teachers who spent time with him along the way, listened to him, and took an interest in his life with putting him on a path to success. Wes believes the quality of education a child receives shouldn’t depend on the zip code where that child lives or what that child’s parents do for a living -- but, sadly, that’s exactly what’s happening in our state today. Right now, Maryland is home to some of the best public schools in America and also some of the most underfunded. = = Maryland is home to some of the very best hospitals, medical research institutions and health care facilities in the entire world -- but at the same time, so many Marylanders can’t access those institutions or even afford very basic care -- and that shouldn’t be the case. When Wes was just three years old, he watched his father die in front of him from a virus that was completely treatable. That experience shaped Wes’ view that healthcare is a basic right that every Marylander deserves, period. = Wes Moore is in this fight to bring real, generational change for Maryland families. But he’s relying on people like you to help him move Maryland forward. = = $15 &amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzAxNTZiZC02NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pd3JcmkOXfOVNUD7Sk5misTXlGPy0fZucKggQc6Cm0= Elevate Together, Team Moore Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2v2x2--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2v2x2-1kwyy-4qqlpo0/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2v2x2-1kwyz-4qqlpo1/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2v2x2-1kwz0-4qqlpo8/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2v2x2-1kwz1-4qqlpo9/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2v2x2-1kwz2-4qqlpo0/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2v2x2-1kwz3-4qqlpo1/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2v2x2-1kwz4-4qqlpo2/ "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2v2x2-1kwz5-4qqlpo3/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2v2x2-1kwz6-4qqlpo4/ "DONATE NOW")
---

Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC!
Add **[info@email.cavpac.com](mailto:info@email.cavpac.com)** to your address book!

name: Amy O'Rourke
subject: Will you support Beto’s campaign for Governor of Texas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

I am excited to share the news that Beto has officially announced that he
is running for Governor. It wasn’t an easy decision. Honestly, we have
loved being together in El Paso for the better part of two years, and
there was a part of me that was very hesitant to give that up.

But over the course of this last year, we have been reminded time and time
again that, whether it was the failure to keep the lights and heat on
during the winter storm, or the extreme vigilante legislation that strips
a woman’s control over her own body, it’s critical that we have new
leadership in Texas. All of us need to do everything in our power to
change the dangerous and divisive direction that our state is heading in.

I hope you will join us in whatever way you can, whether it’s sharing the
news with friends and family, chipping in to help fund this campaign,
and/or signing up to volunteer. The people of Texas have inspired us from
the start, and I have no doubt that they will step up in the most amazing,
unprecedented ways.

We’re in this race because we believe it’s the best way for us to do our
part. Beto is hitting the road today, and I hope to join him soon. We
can’t wait to see you out there!

—Amy O’Rourke

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162798&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=162798%2E444211%2ECyHLqV ]Donate now »

----Forwarded message----
Date: November 15, 2021
Sender: Beto O’Rourke
Subject line: I’m running

I am running for governor to serve ALL of the people of Texas.

I believe that the only way we are going to achieve great things for this
state is by looking out for each other and moving forward together.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162798&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=162798%2E444211%2ECyHLqV ]Donate now to support my campaign »

Whether it was building a successful technology business in my hometown or
working with my fellow El Pasoans on the City Council or passing
legislation in a divided Congress to improve mental healthcare for
veterans, these experiences have taught me that we are most successful
when we keep the focus on people.

When we listen to and learn from each other — regardless of our
differences — we build trust, and that trust allows us to do together what
none of us could do on our own.

The fringe policies and incompetence that we see in Texas today — on
masks, on abortion, on guns, on schools, on the electricity grid — are
symptoms of a larger problem. Our leaders have stopped listening to the
people they were elected to serve. They don’t trust Texans and so they
aren’t able to move forward on what the people of Texas want, like better
jobs and safe communities.

Instead, they’re focused on the agendas of their donors, on positioning
themselves for the next election, on catering to the loudest voices in
their party and on keeping themselves in power regardless of the cost to
the rest of us.

It’s a small vision for such a big state. And it’s hurting the people of
Texas.

We could be leading the world in creating the next generation of energy
jobs instead of praying the electricity grid won’t collapse again this
winter.

We could expand Medicaid and ensure that every one of us is healthy enough
to pursue our education and career instead of leading the nation in the
number of people unable to see a doctor.

We could follow the guidance from our own world-class scientists and
healthcare professionals to protect vulnerable Texans instead of allowing
politics to determine our response to the pandemic. More than 70,000
Texans have died of Covid on this Governor’s watch.

We are losing the big, bold vision that used to define Texas, a Texas big
enough for all of us. Big enough for our dreams and big enough to make
them happen. We’ve been offered something small, mean and uninspiring in
its place.

But it doesn’t have to be this way.

We can do better.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162798&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=162798%2E444211%2ECyHLqV ]Donate now »

When I ran for Senate in 2018, I traveled to every county of Texas. I met
a lot of people, and had the chance to listen to and learn from them. How
they lived, what they cared about, what kept them up at night, what they
dreamed for their kids and grandkids. It turns out that in most
communities, people have thought through the solutions to the challenges
before them. They don’t need someone to tell them what’s best for them,
they just need someone to listen and then take action.

Something else I picked up, and it’s stayed with me ever since, is that
it’s impossible to write someone off, to take them for granted, to forget
them once you’ve had the chance to meet them and understand where they’re
coming from. I’ve got a strong hunch that if we took the time to listen
more and learn from each other, there’s a whole lot more we could get
done, in our lives, in our communities, and in our state.

I didn’t win that race, or the next one (not even close). But I stayed
with it, kept working to help the people I’d met, the communities I’d been
to. In the face of so much that could cause despair — like the
unprecedented attack on voting rights or the failure of the electricity
grid — I found hope and purpose in the people with whom I volunteered for
the last two years in an organization called Powered by People.

We worked to bring people into our elections and the political process.
Together we helped register more than 250,000 new voters. We organized our
fellow Texans to defend our democracy in the halls of the state capitol
when free and fair elections were under attack. And then we went beyond
the capitol to counties like Rains and Midland, Harris and Dallas, Bowie
and Jefferson, bringing as many people of this state into the conversation
as we could — Republicans and Democrats alike — to listen to each other
and try to find common ground on the right to vote.

And when the lights went out, the heater wouldn’t turn on and the water
stopped running for millions of Texans in February, together we organized
thousands of volunteers to make over a million phone calls to stranded
Texas seniors — connecting them with food, water, warmth and the knowledge
that another human being cared about them and wanted to make sure they
were OK.

Our volunteers raised over a million dollars to help those whose homes had
been damaged in the disaster. Their governor might fail them, but the
people of Texas wouldn’t.

That’s what happens when people are moved to come together to help their
neighbors and fellow Texans. Imagine if we had a governor who felt the
same way.

It’s up to us to make it happen.

And get back to being big again.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162798&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=162798%2E444211%2ECyHLqV ]I hope you’ll join us and make a donation to become one of our first
grassroots donors. Your support today will make a big difference in the
success of this campaign.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162798&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=162798%2E444211%2ECyHLqV ]Donate now »

I look forward to working with you for ALL of Texas,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=162798%2E444211%2ECyHLqV

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Demings, Val
subject: re: this is my story, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I will make you the same promise I made to my family: I will continue working to do good at every chance I get.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662781/316481430/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1708-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjExZDU3My02ODQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iiu4veRl-N9ThfznZBAtihPU-399ja3tSfjEfaKSDaw=) Friend, I'm in this race for U.S. Senate to expand my unlikely story of opportunity to more Americans. You see, I grew up the daughter of a maid and a janitor – hardworking parents who taught me to "never tire of doing good." So I took their message to heart: It wasn't easy, but I became the first in my family to graduate college, embarking on what would become a long career of public service. After serving as a social worker, I joined the police department where I served for 27 years and made history when I became Orlando's first Black female Chief of Police in 2007. Today, I proudly represent Florida's 10th congressional district as only the third Democrat to hold that position. I took an oath to always fight for what is right – and that's exactly what I did when I held Donald Trump accountable for violating his _own_ oath of office. So I will make you the same promise I made to my family: I will continue working to do good at every chance I get. **With your help, I will defeat Marco Rubio. With your help, I will ensure the Senate reflects the diversity that makes our country strong – and ensure that every voice can be heard.** **[We've set a goal to raise $20,000 today to power my campaign, and I can't reach it without you, friend. Can you make a $5 donation today to help this little Black girl from the South make history again and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662782/316481431/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1708-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjExZDU3My02ODQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iiu4veRl-N9ThfznZBAtihPU-399ja3tSfjEfaKSDaw=)** Thanks so much for supporting this historic campaign, it's an honor to share this journey with you.

Val Demings
---
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662783/316481432/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1708-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjExZDU3My02ODQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iiu4veRl-N9ThfznZBAtihPU-399ja3tSfjEfaKSDaw=)

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin

| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_15_2021_v3&n=1)
---
### November 15, 2021
Friend -- It’s been an exciting couple of weeks here at the Republican Party of Wisconsin! The results of the Virginia gubernatorial election sent a positive message about the conservative movement that is growing across the country -- representing a sound rejection of Democrats’ failed policies. We need to harness the organic energy that’s happening across America. At the WisGOP, we are encouraging Wisconsinites to get involved by serving as poll workers, volunteering, and making connections with their county parties to help send Tony Evers packing next year. You can sign up to get involved [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eXv_5DaexUSZI9PlfXgIO8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_15_2021_v3&n=2)! \- Team WisGOP |
November 2nd's election night was a total rejection of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats’ big government, socialist agenda. Major Republican wins in Virginia and elsewhere and the close race in deep blue New Jersey show that Americans are tired of Democrats’ government overreach, divisive policies, and agenda that has burdened hardworking families. In these races, Republicans focused on issues that matter to families and voters in all communities: education, keeping our communities safe, rising prices, and bringing back jobs. Following the stunning victories across the country, the WisGOP held a press call to share our perspective on the positive signal that Virginia sent to Republicans in Wisconsin ahead of our crucial elections in 2022. You can read more about it in the Racine Journal Times [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=DK7mUohFpa1-M6QNY7MlqJ2AESWX99lI7nsVviHbKs7RFmQcKJuGpqtbBDm6kINxYrBHszlxG-ZVeHDwxRRb687_48yI44je9lJaGU4wHeOcvPmgOMJROujMpFbXQcGWQyY2naECMp9aofj8VVB-2b3wcnejticz8FN1qEpxbAI6nPY5Gs5JlUp_-yUkV3Ru&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_15_2021_v3&n=3). In one of his most humiliating failures in his nearly three years as governor, Tony Evers’ “Fair Maps” were rejected in a stunning bipartisan rebuke of his leadership. Before 17 Democrats including Assembly Minority Leader Gordon Hintz voted against the maps, several Democrats blasted the maps as “a perversion of justice,” a “con,” and “stealing minority representation rights.” Democrats have finally figured out what Republicans have known all along: Tony Evers’ Liberal Maps Commission has been a sham from the beginning. Evers never wanted fair maps; he wanted maps that tilted the scales in Democrats’ favor. The result was maps that failed through every step of the process — from their failure to abide by the Voting Rights Act, to their disenfranchisement of about 523,000 Wisconsinites who would be left representation in the State Senate two years. You can read more about it in the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2LV_3pMbUHIlFBrsZcCPouNBHja3sfdY8_xeAgIvnS9TzG2RDi9WEHTJzDDP3_qDe1F3TQJp8RmHP10DarYpwrAljscdontRvTBixzvM3lHWbPHK1ghNByW6D-QokpSdkkZs1YAYvAKe_Vc0AN3Nd6Y9Uf7WpLWhZyaWDQTwjNpA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_15_2021_v3&n=4). | |
Republicans in the Legislature recently held hearings to discuss the Legislative Audit Bureau [**report**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=CFjYEVqyZtS1iJlrJm_4rdMisgLmUMt69x1ljBPU0Wlo4q23nrjri3jIo4KKjhfDmZKE-7csTJftkkXwEaYedeGUYqNF7KRZwoSvrPIXNg4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_15_2021_v3&n=5) on the 2020 election. The report found numerous issues with the Wisconsin Elections Commission’s failure to follow the law. WEC’s commissioners couldn’t make the appearance, although the highly partisan chairwoman Ann Jacobs found time to appear on the radio to bash the nonpartisan Legislative Audit Bureau. You can read more about WEC’s efforts to cover for their vast failures in 2020 [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwCGtvMu4YRx1kTTg2pu0AUSeEfHhYNK6g0vYmfEQGcWX6dLSn5sWCDQ5RL6mIOQI4w&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_15_2021_v3&n=6). In 2020, Derrick Van Orden gave Ron Kind the toughest fight of his political life. It’s no surprise that the National Republican Congressional Campaign committee announced Van Orden as one of the first round of candidates admitted to their Young Guns program, a program that has a record of success in helping Republican candidates get elected to the House of Representatives. Watch Fox News’ coverage of the announcement [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=bkVMq5Vb0snmePRNIXU_FlKKrjwZHmSHv7RagF8XXQNdI0R3L7YBoKzpnFP4cHu4HdsxRjnB5uoIe4MqJljHz92gGeOiIjj3Fbg0OJCI3lxSwGR18kRj6VzmxI_7W_fQcghjwIcX11w8lityXOVGpoGa2Gv_rnz0VVE6yrZ-3nBQfGdc_xmhoypYQ0fgI2oMQ3vV30OCfwx51xmelLFMmMmJGiiZ2_Wwb0TTilKJlYTXiqqVGoDSDDbmk2dLT1cYlyKbcJNKNKHHuyetgr1K5K6QXTFX__ABdDlnH_3rUExdNsl62Bhwj8fjMzeKx2M2vN1qU-wcyMkx5YD5-iOIm_R8z_D3TbCg1M8KY6-8zk4xXY8hojT9fELly9jFSBmPHLr8e33DqsqnJG-4Q-qDRli7gdI2Gzdqez7tZjI3M8EUWNLJircubxWot5IPmdhwXekO_7Kvdqi2-xnlgLQbbQPtAwobVrG0o6TNacpnYRBGr_jzgknEvDtLlv9sHdHvTiIuDMXEqC14qEvIT5lFFQxejkVq-PENVmsJ8ekdmqg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_15_2021_v3&n=7).
---|---|---
* * *
