* * *
### **In Case You Missed It...**
### [_**Tony Evers and Josh Kaul Turn a Blind Eye to Election Integrity**_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0cdT9AHpPqrLp896pdDlmIzf2niqYwOm7gvUCTQImjHFh-lIG2Lg3kXV2ntuXgG6xGJekCvw5k8NSvrk7DgKh0w0XymWebP6eOb0h9TDVp0Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_15_2021_v3&n=10)
Dan O’Donnell reported that Josh Kaul is dismissing legitimate allegations of fraud as “not an issue of statewide concern” — yet his staff at the DOJ’s Division of Criminal Investigation disagree and want to launch a statewide investigation. According to one source, “agents at DCI are more than willing to work election fraud investigations,” and the Racine County allegations could fall under the purview of elder abuse cases that the department is already investigating.
### [_What They’re Saying: One Year Out From Election Day, Democrats Brace for Red Wave_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0UUT5kNHhproYMsZ99i1s_oLJhw0uFw1ImzYzHN7Rwkqk6ra8OmXNp4rrge9lP2RVvfJes4tue4CWP8--eDCTca4d9j90MuXq47W40G_l4-xaIBapWN4PdY4OrEIaaFKZQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_15_2021_v3&n=11)
One year from Election Day, Democrats are already bracing themselves for the next round of the red wave that is sweeping the nation. Recent election results show that voters have had enough of Democrat leadership, and major Republican wins in nearly every corner of the country show Americans are ready for a change. Meanwhile, Democrats like Tony Evers run visionless campaigns that focus on running against Republicans in the Legislature while simultaneously taking credit for their accomplishments.
### _[Teachers Union Tony Evers Flunks Again](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0RNxilU3l3lzNwGsxbUXu0r_J2juf44sHZXKnSB90Yzoix6t84DwPoVtwmDSNNvHLA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_11_15_2021_v3&n=12)_
Failed “education governor” Tony Evers attempted to quietly veto a bipartisan education bill. This comes as recent DPI data quantified Evers’ failure to support kids, revealing that English language arts proficiency is down by over 16 percent, math proficiency is down by over 20 percent, and just 8 percent of Black students are proficient in math after Evers failed to lead on reopening schools. Meanwhile, Wisconsin’s education system has been flooded with over $5 billion in federal and state support in recent years. Evers has spent more time grandstanding about funding to make headlines than presenting real solutions to benefit students.

clean_body: The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin | | November 15, 2021 Friend -- It’s been an exciting couple of weeks here at the Republican Party of Wisconsin! The results of the Virginia gubernatorial election sent a positive message about the conservative movement that is growing across the country -- representing a sound rejection of Democrats’ failed policies. We need to harness the organic energy that’s happening across America. At the WisGOP, we are encouraging Wisconsinites to get involved by serving as poll workers, volunteering, and making connections with their county parties to help send Tony Evers packing next year. You can sign up to get involved ! \- Team WisGOP | November 2nd's election night was a total rejection of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats’ big government, socialist agenda. Major Republican wins in Virginia and elsewhere and the close race in deep blue New Jersey show that Americans are tired of Democrats’ government overreach, divisive policies, and agenda that has burdened hardworking families. In these races, Republicans focused on issues that matter to families and voters in all communities: education, keeping our communities safe, rising prices, and bringing back jobs. Following the stunning victories across the country, the WisGOP held a press call to share our perspective on the positive signal that Virginia sent to Republicans in Wisconsin ahead of our crucial elections in 2022. You can read more about it in the Racine Journal Times . In one of his most humiliating failures in his nearly three years as governor, Tony Evers’ “Fair Maps” were rejected in a stunning bipartisan rebuke of his leadership. Before 17 Democrats including Assembly Minority Leader Gordon Hintz voted against the maps, several Democrats blasted the maps as “a perversion of justice,” a “con,” and “stealing minority representation rights.” Democrats have finally figured out what Republicans have known all along: Tony Evers’ Liberal Maps Commission has been a sham from the beginning. Evers never wanted fair maps; he wanted maps that tilted the scales in Democrats’ favor. The result was maps that failed through every step of the process — from their failure to abide by the Voting Rights Act, to their disenfranchisement of about 523,000 Wisconsinites who would be left representation in the State Senate two years. You can read more about it in the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel . | | Republicans in the Legislature recently held hearings to discuss the Legislative Audit Bureau on the 2020 election. The report found numerous issues with the Wisconsin Elections Commission’s failure to follow the law. WEC’s commissioners couldn’t make the appearance, although the highly partisan chairwoman Ann Jacobs found time to appear on the radio to bash the nonpartisan Legislative Audit Bureau. You can read more about WEC’s efforts to cover for their vast failures in 2020 . In 2020, Derrick Van Orden gave Ron Kind the toughest fight of his political life. It’s no surprise that the National Republican Congressional Campaign committee announced Van Orden as one of the first round of candidates admitted to their Young Guns program, a program that has a record of success in helping Republican candidates get elected to the House of Representatives. body:
Iowa is crucial in keeping our Senate majority
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662903/316481885/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk386-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTdkOTMyMy02OTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ok4ucTbMHBCOoBKlJHY3J4vTAzM3jbWwLGdBTLONSo=)
Hi Peter, it's Abby, and I want to talk to you briefly about why our race against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) here in Iowa is so important. You see, with Senate control split 50-50, every single Senate seat matters immensely – and as of this moment, Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable: **Polling shows that only 27% of voters want to reelect him. I need your help to take advantage of this momentum.**
**[**If we win in Iowa, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep our Senate majority. So ahead of my mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow, will you make a donation of $5 or more now to help me defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662904/316481886/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk386-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTdkOTMyMy02OTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ok4ucTbMHBCOoBKlJHY3J4vTAzM3jbWwLGdBTLONSo=)**
I have every intention of doing what it takes to compete against Sen. Grassley and win this race. I made history in 2018 as the youngest woman to flip a congressional district from red to blue. That’s why Fox News and the Senate GOP campaign arm are already attacking me – because they know I can win.

**But Mitch McConnell’s allies have tens of millions of dollars in their campaign war chests. National Republicans are going to do everything within their power to protect Sen. Grassley, keep Iowa red and take back control of the Senate. We cannot let that happen. That's why I'm counting on the grassroots support of people like you – donating $10, $20, $50 at a time – to help me win this.**
**With nearly two-thirds of Iowans saying it's time for Sen. Grassley to go, this is our single greatest opportunity to flip Iowa blue and make sure Democrats maintain Senate control:[So please, can you rush a donation of $5 or more to help me defeat Sen. Grassley in Iowa?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38662905/316481887/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk386-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTdkOTMyMy02OTQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ok4ucTbMHBCOoBKlJHY3J4vTAzM3jbWwLGdBTLONSo=)**

name: Michael Bennet
subject: re: tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38663195/316483023/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGIwYzY1Ni02YjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4jLii6xqhAmo3hLq4T0vt0Teb_9SFQz9gkeNNe8ITw=)
Today I stood with President Biden as he signed the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ into law. Your support and feedback helped me through negotiations, amendments, and more to achieve the largest single federal investment in broadband coverage, funding to improve Tribal access to clean water, and investments to repair and rebuild roads and bridges across the nation. I’m looking forward to building on this progress by passing an extension of the expanded Child Tax Credit that’s already kept 3 million kids out of poverty and serving Coloradans for another term in the Senate but I want to share the honest-to-God truth with you: My team just told me that we’re going to fall short of this month’s fundraising goal if we continue at this pace. **Mitch McConnell, Rick Scott, and the National GOP have raised over $75 million so far this year to flip the Senate, and I’m on their top target list.** On top of that, there are eight Republicans — including wealthy self-funders and corporate CEOs — running to take my seat, and my opponents came out overwhelmingly against this historic investment in job growth, broadband, and infrastructure that just got signed into law. I have little doubt they could try and reverse all that I’ve secured for Colorado and working families nationwide if elected. We don’t have to outraise them, team, but we do have to stay on track with our fundraising goals to fend off their attacks and distortions of my record. **Tonight’s mid-month deadline is just a few hours away and your support makes all the difference. So, I’m respectfully asking (not begging!) you to please make a donation of $10 — or whatever you can afford — to help us reach our goal before tonight’s midnight deadline.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38663196/316483024/-1836949484?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211115_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGIwYzY1Ni02YjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4jLii6xqhAmo3hLq4T0vt0Teb_9SFQz9gkeNNe8ITw=)****

clean_body: | = Today I stood with President Biden as he signed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act into law. Your support and feedback helped me through negotiations, amendments, and more to achieve the largest single federal investment in broadband coverage, funding to improve Tribal access to clean water, and investments to repair and rebuild roads and bridges across the nation. I’m looking forward to building on this progress by passing an extension of the expanded Child Tax Credit that’s already kept 3 million kids out of poverty and serving Coloradans for another term in the Senate but I want to share the honest-to-God truth with you: My team just told me that we’re going to fall short of this month’s fundraising goal if we continue at this pace. Mitch McConnell, Rick Scott, and the National GOP have raised over $75 million so far this year to flip the Senate, and I’m on their top target list. On top of that, there are eight Republicans — including wealthy self-funders and corporate CEOs — running to take my seat, and my opponents came out overwhelmingly against this historic investment in job growth, broadband, and infrastructure that just got signed into law. I have little doubt they could try and reverse all that I’ve secured for Colorado and working families nationwide if elected. We don’t have to outraise them, team, but we do have to stay on track with our fundraising goals to fend off their attacks and distortions of my record. Tonight’s mid-month deadline is just a few hours away and your support makes all the difference. So, I’m respectfully asking (not begging!) you to please make a donation of $10 — or whatever you can afford — to help us reach our goal before tonight’s midnight deadline. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thank you and talk soon, Michael P.S. I’m the only Senator running for re-election turning down corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money because I believe fighting money in politics means leading by example. subject: Frankly, I’m sick and tired of this crap.

body:
Democrats in Congress want you to believe America is racist. As a black candidate for Congress, I couldn't disagree more. |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=e47cb0bad3444a4185fc8f7d2302b388&_t=BJoQ3qDD6VhzMXAoVarWbFMwxMN5BGRthLcnb6aFZGrQqfY6iI71DmT7enAe1XS9P6TN367T0PaSLUB8Vja18Y9ALqe-db7vpAF4X8iDWaq-1JTN5O6LT2rb8izJF8eipFQf2oLfIMzwhZpgb2eJPmnNj7anQh5lZ__zs1ztMRY%3D).

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=e47cb0bad3444a4185fc8f7d2302b388&_e=k--4UZqlogs3CLRTD_jY1axk4uAuGVM_I8cj4V4X78PruY38-rJsKV0ELnbdZ0rtEINcyZmlND69FZ1eeF_9Gt0uGPzBr9jEg7p87Kd0GVTrsfUaEsfBt5NqGdPo1lGW_LH4D2_yd8DvXV1SJxEQHc-hqy4fbvWjUm469byzMFsmt-X09mkLVndV3l7gr4hAgNw2yflDSCvGRWZVWOYldGQD3FdKFVDIwsU-1oDTNy7bfkNadYPQXs6g6aeGsUi_3cy0pCcS-QCozUWHR2NmPT8pW3UxBjkPKRqUmcrdRHpS2lkPamd_u-AEhG6-92NKSJNXe8JokLoauTR3_CdGVv5woA95GDBX_Z9AtrZkT77hG2awOXbp2MFMciBfpHLBs34HmNWMMDTDBPIMOUK1fH_Gp-r09oAtyGTjp603hfx35OQ8PQrrzWq-sBAA7tjZ1Va4P_0hG8LEltgZlTjtmQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

If you follow politics even just a little bit, then you’ll probably have heard of Rep. Cori Bush of Missouri. She’s a pretty spiteful person and has a habit of tweeting things about members of the Republican Party that are racist, false, and just plain deplorable.

Here is her latest tweet – presumably written in response to Republican to the recent victories in Virginia/New Jersey:

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=e47cb0bad3444a4185fc8f7d2302b388&_e=k--4UZqlogs3CLRTD_jY1axk4uAuGVM_I8cj4V4X78PruY38-rJsKV0ELnbdZ0rtEINcyZmlND69FZ1eeF_9Gt0uGPzBr9jEg7p87Kd0GVTrsfUaEsfBt5NqGdPo1lGW_LH4D2_yd8DvXV1SJxEQHc-hqy4fbvWjUm469byzMFsmt-X09mkLVndV3l7gr4hAgNw2yflDSCvGRWZVWOYldGQD3FdKFVDIwsU-1oDTNy7bfkNadYPQXs6g6aeGsUi_UYTxiT68Rod5oZz6MXZ2uvg96j59kBeFtsy4rx1Le5ZOjRQehviJ7Zm7zSjpA7MwgeP8FdoGjt67sdMmBYMQRIvPi0d7LsPsLbWIWy0SMbUqAypYZO-q-lfE4PB6ZlBfS-rTMefNwehVL7uETiGgUtmcTtCfjoAb07Yf2hZzmdN7u1srxIT0rQiWQgv6qhONHKdNFzA1sL5mCd__kVuOdg%3D%3D)
As a black man - **who also happens to be a first generation American born to Haitian immigrants** - this kind of rhetoric makes me seethe. Ask anyone who knows me, and they’ll tell you that I’m a very even-keeled man. But this type of reverse racism cannot and should not be tolerated.

My name is Rod Dorilas, REPUBLICAN candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st congressional district, and I’m writing to you today to tell you that white supremacy is NOT the single greatest threat to our democracy. **The single greatest threat to OUR democracy is the radical socialist and Marxist ideologies/policies being peddled by the Far Left** , of which Ms. Bush is the leader.

**[Today, I’m humbly asking: would you consider making a gift of any amount to my campaign for the U.S. House so that I can challenge the lies Ms. Bush is pushing- straight to her face as a fellow member of Congress? ](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=e47cb0bad3444a4185fc8f7d2302b388&_e=k--4UZqlogs3CLRTD_jY1axk4uAuGVM_I8cj4V4X78PruY38-rJsKV0ELnbdZ0rtEINcyZmlND69FZ1eeF_9Gt0uGPzBr9jEg7p87Kd0GVTrsfUaEsfBt5NqGdPo1lGW_LH4D2_yd8DvXV1SJxEQHc-hqy4fbvWjUm469byzMFsmt-X09mkLVndV3l7gr4hAgNw2yflDSCvGRWZVWOYldGQD3FdKFVDIwsU-1oDTNy7bfkNadYPQXs6g6aeGsUi_8J7SNjku0GkQh0KbIeWwOeMIlfYvcaCZcSoW8X-S1JaAGoo8peXT1jEarxo4NEPVzaSRPJY_bQgLbfIG49u90qvEqgvSIy37uoLwjhcBdi9WTyfMrcgDF9abe_Rj1Tm_H3XnnSoStx_fJtcWIbSX7iumEO1BsMLN_YmAn9Az2n4FesJxJAjyZHkMGwFGiXxdKAItotk__S-FGKNnjNgmDw%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=e47cb0bad3444a4185fc8f7d2302b388&_e=k--4UZqlogs3CLRTD_jY1axk4uAuGVM_I8cj4V4X78PruY38-rJsKV0ELnbdZ0rtEINcyZmlND69FZ1eeF_9Gt0uGPzBr9jEg7p87Kd0GVTrsfUaEsfBt5NqGdPo1lGW_LH4D2_yd8DvXV1SJxEQHc-hqy4fbvWjUm469byzMFsmt-X09mkLVndV3l7gr4hAgNw2yflDSCvGRWZVWOYldGQD3FdKFVDIwsU-1oDTNy7bfkNadYPQXs6g6aeGsUi_w4Gu4acT4BWVlaZ-hPEsDJq8o2-O7mHTW1Ma8ClQcRme5T50v7Y9mncyxHGj6Xl9zcR7iuKNmd9np77H5g8HSs7u2Q3TEoBP4wve7r69l0iJhgQuHObkUiyHYGtCai0OrTDvOALRuwbvHafCAk8bVsBO952qolq9BSGb4N67w0t-X8kxGrRsJrCrqWjLFLfCB_G-KhosEE1gttg7Chv0jQ%3D%3D)

[** HELP ME PUT A STOP TO DEMOCRAT RACISM >>**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=e47cb0bad3444a4185fc8f7d2302b388&_e=k--4UZqlogs3CLRTD_jY1axk4uAuGVM_I8cj4V4X78PruY38-rJsKV0ELnbdZ0rtEINcyZmlND69FZ1eeF_9Gt0uGPzBr9jEg7p87Kd0GVTrsfUaEsfBt5NqGdPo1lGW_LH4D2_yd8DvXV1SJxEQHc-hqy4fbvWjUm469byzMFsmt-X09mkLVndV3l7gr4hAgNw2yflDSCvGRWZVWOYldGQD3FdKFVDIwsU-1oDTNy7bfkNadYPQXs6g6aeGsUi_1JL4qbrynObj6OQhkNiLedUqMUF8hNY-AsWSsm51aQ3Vgkm9kUYT64kjszIEGo34Rbfy5aaCgH0jy1K898YG7UOcEkYEfI8HWCAQBJRwbYUNbfOEiinRzqjufQpzeGPvV_6Y4RbCPX5u-3h-K6mhOrNVkJ475-kF-ZUXi5N_bgrfvWPVVCuxaatfJpKyjyulNTXBIHpMjkREg0aXwlCMDw%3D%3D)
Frankly, I’m sick and tired of this crap. Ms. Bush believes that African Americans are a monolithic group of people who cannot forge their own path.

Yes, slavery existed in this country for a very long time. And as it so happens, it was abolished a very long time ago. To say that the fallout from slavery is still holding people back is a lie promulgated by Democrats who want to keep black voters from switching to the Republican Party.

It’s GOT TO STOP.

**Every time Ms. Bush takes to twitter to spread her vitriol, she is insulting me and my family personally**.
1. I JOINED THE MILITARY AT 17 YEARS OLD TO SERVE THE STARS AND STRIPES.

2. I UTILIZED THE GI BILL TO PAY FOR MY LAW SCHOOL.

3. I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

4. My parents came to this country from Haiti, the poorest country in the Western Hemisphere, and picked crops in South Florida to make sure that my siblings and I could grow up to live OUR AMERICAN DREAM.

Please consider a gift to my campaign today so that I can let the folks in my district know that they have a choice between a member of the Democrat left and a Republican who believe the best days of the country are still ahead of us.

I don’t care about the color of people’s skin – **we are an EQUAL OPPORTUNITY COUNTRY** - the only thing that matters is whether or not you’re willing to put in the work to achieve your dreams.

[** HELP ME PUT A STOP TO DEMOCRAT RACISM >>**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=e47cb0bad3444a4185fc8f7d2302b388&_e=k--4UZqlogs3CLRTD_jY1axk4uAuGVM_I8cj4V4X78PruY38-rJsKV0ELnbdZ0rtEINcyZmlND69FZ1eeF_9Gt0uGPzBr9jEg7p87Kd0GVTrsfUaEsfBt5NqGdPo1lGW_LH4D2_yd8DvXV1SJxEQHc-hqy4fbvWjUm469byzMFsmt-X09mkLVndV3l7gr4hAgNw2yflDSCvGRWZVWOYldGQD3FdKFVDIwsU-1oDTNy7bfkNadYPQXs6g6aeGsUi_9rQdtPwsEqCmAtPmayRutgTni2wvanvvwAv6uVLHC3QLp8vIrJ5_3-nsKyBBVJoo5rC03nojS899WZgU6DYVkH0anngLPRFeWBKbkSQ_96pTPgU-ozVMyC1At5OdRpIQUP68ikumHP8u5y5X3SJU8HbmMl-a8qhbWiTYBZDNY697nzMY57czoFgrXu46vKSh9C9BASY2FokK5KrMGdNC4A%3D%3D)

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=e47cb0bad3444a4185fc8f7d2302b388&_e=k--4UZqlogs3CLRTD_jY1axk4uAuGVM_I8cj4V4X78PruY38-rJsKV0ELnbdZ0rtEINcyZmlND69FZ1eeF_9Gt0uGPzBr9jEg7p87Kd0GVTrsfUaEsfBt5NqGdPo1lGW_LH4D2_yd8DvXV1SJxEQHc-hqy4fbvWjUm469byzMFsmt-X09mkLVndV3l7gr4hAgNw2yflDSCvGRWZVWOYldGQD3FdKFVDIwsU-1oDTNy7bfkNadYPQXs6g6aeGsUi_XDA_UrAJLKS5XIRYNlgYlVhMskAdNmrIpccJybHcnMxAZpaZjVeLQ7u7LpIrlQzNKC2otWncsilOkv0mJPNispBc--XErd9EJGovMJEnwMBWTujdkkSHFopreZyD6ERwJogq9iRoTa9fokGvPy8YGc8ZwaWhu7zJnmEJ5WB3YetAV7DXmhtaAr0OkZ-GgE2HKi-6t8vupVr69EGKACaRjA%3D%3D)
I’m running for Congress to challenge the narrative that all African Americans think the way Ms. Bush does; it’s an insult to Americans like me who see America for all of her faults and embrace everything that has made our country the envy of the world for the past 200+ years.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas
Republican Candidate for Congress

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=e47cb0bad3444a4185fc8f7d2302b388&_e=k--4UZqlogs3CLRTD_jY1axk4uAuGVM_I8cj4V4X78PruY38-rJsKV0ELnbdZ0rtEINcyZmlND69FZ1eeF_9Gt0uGPzBr9jEg7p87Kd0GVTrsfUaEsfBt5NqGdPo1lGW_LH4D2_yd8DvXV1SJxEQHc-hqy4fbvWjUm469byzMFsmt-X09mkLVndV3l7gr4hAgNw2yflDSCvGRWZVWOYldGQD3FdKFVDIwsU-1oDTNy7bfkNadYPQXs6g6aeGsUi_ncN3WCmXhpZY9skH6pReo1Nd6-Y1VKMSRISz5Ov2hNXNU0LPKqt_0YQt7a_5IXm_Cez_5Xn7BMn5cYLbW8lhltIfjGlMaTxnKzI1hzTGC1fB2AqkOczWyVq48V9QDUqFh7M_wM6IlxVUY_3npej1clT868bgHjGgQNA31YEM1fMFHtAKskGryecxnGZJvfX1bO6X2YXefS3gnADZeh7etA%3D%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=e47cb0bad3444a4185fc8f7d2302b388&_e=k--4UZqlogs3CLRTD_jY1axk4uAuGVM_I8cj4V4X78PruY38-rJsKV0ELnbdZ0rtEINcyZmlND69FZ1eeF_9Gt0uGPzBr9jEg7p87Kd0GVTrsfUaEsfBt5NqGdPo1lGW_LH4D2_yd8DvXV1SJxEQHc-hqy4fbvWjUm469byzMFsmt-X09mkLVndV3l7gr4hAgNw2yflDSCvGRWZVWOYldGQD3FdKFVDIwsU-1oDTNy7bfkNadYPQXs6g6aeGsUi_AjHDzbwzXKxq8B-sR2t_Sb1udt4qfzwmNdUrDj-aoeEl3sWkUcTk5fDPhnXeMarOgghz70mysgBdMMvgw4JKXLJ1D8-p54GfCKyU08fhjWavi4ho38UKg2dKe4t0LL8JJAK84OY2NwBg6Tntj1Khm17PrqcXoOL3YyVAXkU35px7G2oYqDkR98nvwq9Lx7gSe0BmmfgMHinVinjpH-9PCw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Democrats in Congress want you to believe America is racist. As a black candidate for Congress, I couldn't disagree more. | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Fellow American, If you follow politics even just a little bit, then you’ll probably have heard of Rep. Cori Bush of Missouri. She’s a pretty spiteful person and has a habit of tweeting things about members of the Republican Party that are racist, false, and just plain deplorable. Here is her latest tweet – presumably written in response to Republican to the recent victories in Virginia/New Jersey: As a black man - who also happens to be a first generation American born to Haitian immigrants - this kind of rhetoric makes me seethe. Ask anyone who knows me, and they’ll tell you that I’m a very even-keeled man. But this type of reverse racism cannot and should not be tolerated. My name is Rod Dorilas, REPUBLICAN candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st congressional district, and I’m writing to you today to tell you that white supremacy is NOT the single greatest threat to our democracy. The single greatest threat to OUR democracy is the radical socialist and Marxist ideologies/policies being peddled by the Far Left , of which Ms. Bush is the leader. Frankly, I’m sick and tired of this crap. Ms. Bush believes that African Americans are a monolithic group of people who cannot forge their own path. Yes, slavery existed in this country for a very long time. And as it so happens, it was abolished a very long time ago. To say that the fallout from slavery is still holding people back is a lie promulgated by Democrats who want to keep black voters from switching to the Republican Party. It’s GOT TO STOP. Every time Ms. Bush takes to twitter to spread her vitriol, she is insulting me and my family personally. 1. I JOINED THE MILITARY AT 17 YEARS OLD TO SERVE THE STARS AND STRIPES. 2. I UTILIZED THE GI BILL TO PAY FOR MY LAW SCHOOL. 3. I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. 4. My parents came to this country from Haiti, the poorest country in the Western Hemisphere, and picked crops in South Florida to make sure that my siblings and I could grow up to live OUR AMERICAN DREAM. Please consider a gift to my campaign today so that I can let the folks in my district know that they have a choice between a member of the Democrat left and a Republican who believe the best days of the country are still ahead of us. I don’t care about the color of people’s skin – we are an EQUAL OPPORTUNITY COUNTRY - the only thing that matters is whether or not you’re willing to put in the work to achieve your dreams. I’m running for Congress to challenge the narrative that all African Americans think the way Ms. Bush does; it’s an insult to Americans like me who see America for all of her faults and embrace everything that has made our country the envy of the world for the past 200+ years. For Country, Rod Dorilas Republican Candidate for Congress | ABOUT ROD Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service. At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer. Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China. Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left. | Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

clean_body: Still work to be done | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Tonight at midnight is our Mid-Month fundraising deadline, and we need your help. We are so grateful for all of your support so far, but in order to keep the momentum going, we need your support. John is working hard to ensure that each and every one of your needs is being met, but he needs your support in order to keep fighting for you. A generous donor has reached out to our team and has agreed to 3x match each and every donation we receive today. This is an incredible opportunity to make a huge impact. With all the damage that the Biden Administration has done to our country, now is not the time to sit back and rest on our laurels. We saw what happened when we demanded change right here in the Commonwealth, now let’s bring it to the rest of the country. | | Peter, Our grassroots momentum just scared Republican Madison Cawthorn out of running for re-election in his home district. That’s right -- Cawthorn announced that he’s abandoning his constituents and switching districts to run in NC-13 because the new district lines make NC-14 more favorable for Democrats. He even lamented in an email to his supporters that donations were “flooding in” to his Democratic opponent. While we’re happy to say goodbye to Cawthorn’s representation in this part of Western North Carolina, our fight is far from over. As one of the loudest right-wing insurrectionists in Congress, Cawthorn has caused serious damage that will take time to heal. And it is likely he will handpick a candidate to back in this race, trying to expand his brand of politics.
Jasmine’s message since the very beginning of this campaign has been to restore love, hope, and empathy in WNC. She’s continued to fight back against Cawthorn’s divisiveness, promotion of violence, and fear-mongering -- and just because he’s leaving doesn’t mean his influence and tactics will.
**Let us be clear when we say that Madison Cawthorn remains a large threat and we can’t allow him to carry on his extremism across our state.**
Although Cawthorn isn’t our opponent anymore, we’re still running to replace him, his ideologies, and his lack of leadership for the people of WNC. And even though redistricting has made our district bluer, giving us a stronger opportunity to win, our race will still be highly competitive.
**This is now one of the only competitive Congressional districts in North Carolina and Jasmine wants to create a seat at the table for everyone, but we need your ongoing support in order to make that happen.[Will you donate $13 or more today to bid Cawthorn a farewell as he moves on to NC-13?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38663708/316485236/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211115_FR_ByeCawthorn_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=13&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGQxNWY3MS02ZjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ipK0Iq1YNHqzpBFqs8P0T4e7QGYYyVrMHbr_5N0rAxU=)**

clean_body: | = | | Peter, Our grassroots momentum just scared Republican Madison Cawthorn out of running for re-election in his home district. That’s right -- Cawthorn announced that he’s abandoning his constituents and switching districts to run in NC-13 because the new district lines make NC-14 more favorable for Democrats. He even lamented in an email to his supporters that donations were “flooding in” to his Democratic opponent. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = While we’re happy to say goodbye to Cawthorn’s representation in this part of Western North Carolina, our fight is far from over. As one of the loudest right-wing insurrectionists in Congress, Cawthorn has caused serious damage that will take time to heal. And it is likely he will handpick a candidate to back in this race, trying to expand his brand of politics. Jasmine’s message since the very beginning of this campaign has been to restore love, hope, and empathy in WNC. She’s continued to fight back against Cawthorn’s divisiveness, promotion of violence, and fear-mongering -- and just because he’s leaving doesn’t mean his influence and tactics will. Let us be clear when we say that Madison Cawthorn remains a large threat and we can’t allow him to carry on his extremism across our state. Although Cawthorn isn’t our opponent anymore, we’re still running to replace him, his ideologies, and his lack of leadership for the people of WNC. And even though redistricting has made our district bluer, giving us a stronger opportunity to win, our race will still be highly competitive. This is now one of the only competitive Congressional districts in North Carolina and Jasmine wants to create a seat at the table for everyone, but we need your ongoing support in order to make that happen.= | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = In this together, Team Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

name: Kendall Witmer
subject: Can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
I want to make sure you didn't miss Gov. Lujan Grisham's important message
| | |
---
Hi, Peter – I want to make sure you didn't miss Gov. Lujan Grisham's important message today: **We only have a few weeks until our three-month fundraising blackout, and we're still way behind on our $150,000 goal.**
As a strong Democratic supporter, I know you were just as devastated as I was when the GOP flipped Virginia this month. If there's anything we can learn from this loss, it's that no state – including New Mexico – is safe from the GOP. **It's up to us to keep New Mexico blue, Peter.**
Right now, Gov. Lujan Grisham's GOP challengers are attacking her, and she's heading into a fundraising blackout at the worst possible moment. I know she's counting on you – so will you donate today?
**[Please, Peter, rush $5 right now to help Gov. Lujan Grisham reach her $150,000 end-of-month goal and keep New Mexico blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38663867/316486471/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1096-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjgyYmUyMy03MDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o1kSh80345-YGk9q6VD6nPAVjgsvHkaRbO66Xqsq1NQ=)**
Thanks for your support,

Kendall Witmer
Communications Director
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6596%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=tMtqcw4h5igw2Joko7gjZQ&sysid=1)
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67007%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=phJuEBlCWaMwYSJedV1aSw&sysid=1)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67008%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IeHaXb9A8WUQxMFaiWOzdw&sysid=1)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67009%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qL7AyCrBloY1VoA5v3Em9g&sysid=1)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment - they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67000%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HeBER1r%2b45H%2fCmLHgwk7tA&sysid=1)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67001%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aya1mIdtIw2RyJsP%2fnZdVg&sysid=1)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67002%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b0LaVzyMUW224FSCxwR1Wg&sysid=1)** [**DONATE**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67003%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=feG1h2uX4n2Z8x1Lbar9WA&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67004%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cINo5TrNiUeYt79OADQfzQ&sysid=1) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67015%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JM7H%2fJp1g%2fuuoHM8c2CoeQ&sysid=1) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67016%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WUnUXoQfJ9chqAmFP9giNA&sysid=1)

clean_body: I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts. And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies. You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... ... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos. I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back. I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS. In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases. The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment - they want a ruling against David without a trial at all! And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends. That's why David needs your financial support today. I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? ** The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Time is running out to help Kyle Rittenhouse
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies. And now that trial has
_Sponsored message_
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zihsr055m3306rilmel0boinc5ud65opiru2mlvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h60o72c5h2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjuvi8kg3b343qbt4g0taft0211slc6ql4mrbs5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h60o72c5h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zftachgba53t1faoftc1m20ioeam0duvs553ajb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h60o72c5h2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi0coqjue86o80mp7nttr6s7vfjajhjdjtieasd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h60o72c5h2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|

name: OUT OF OFFICE ALERT
subject: What has Biden done now?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We regret to inform you that your Christmas gifts are not going to make it this year | Fellow patriot

Biden has been in office for nearly 300 days, and we thought it would be important to check in on his administration.

But Peter, **WARNING:** things are looking pretty grim.

In 10 months, Biden has:
* Embarrassed our country on the world stage in Afghanistan
* Fallen asleep at the COP26 Climate Convention
* Created a crisis at our southern border by abandoning Trump era policies
* Promised billions to illegal immigrants
* Driven inflation through the roof: Bidenflation
* And there’s lots more

**[We need your help to make sure that conservatives can take back the Senate.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=44d4539c57c942a8875b10d60e0b37c9&_e=0d8j4fe2COOVqUcizM4gFaxIWMiiSZpmHHrOeirQcmMcXPYA0bEhCXk4t0HesZyEA6yOidh8jnDl4BnV_dn8iajHPQp6gZVfsDwMOVLp4t3QdSzB6v4BdTbQ3x9R_2KmQkiTo-Q2DOYC37M8VuqsTCqrHTtdol4SmOU0T0o6KO6a6_GOHf_FEVQc-trYdVUz-d7wigv25yeM2G4dpYkihsFXeiaFfOxyNADbXQ0UkoKLDFok3NLNN_1mEMwYNVwI3Z-FDUZd2gLbcVLEOwmqkbrVeAH7v3kO9XI7W_UnZssmlxlCIMvrqViOW_ZtNH2YBexXIltIQGaNx61jLncUkJe7fOyHXVQz_zsIwvnZHl2lwJRyRnnv7faoKolxJesxrIcYHSgsh4JqGFsG2o1X9QmPqAWpOm7phopapnvsQTwGhpeFuhfDKPc0VnQZEsFkisDqk4xxZSofyqgLnu26V4x-Qw3n27huXiG9_Tu0Icw%3D)**

[** HELP US OPPOSE BIDEN’S
AMERICA LAST POLICIES->**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=44d4539c57c942a8875b10d60e0b37c9&_e=0d8j4fe2COOVqUcizM4gFaxIWMiiSZpmHHrOeirQcmMcXPYA0bEhCXk4t0HesZyEA6yOidh8jnDl4BnV_dn8iajHPQp6gZVfsDwMOVLp4t3QdSzB6v4BdTbQ3x9R_2KmQkiTo-Q2DOYC37M8VuqsTCqrHTtdol4SmOU0T0o6KO6a6_GOHf_FEVQc-trYdVUz-d7wigv25yeM2G4dpYkihsFXeiaFfOxyNADbXQ0UkoKLDFok3NLNN_1mEMwYNVwI3Z-FDUZd2gLbcVLEOwmqkeeScwRSbNs_i4na1FjoOMY_q2x5NhM_O4hCK4H2-YGlqnad5wq7XYDWMQzykGUr2bGC6pzDiOMMEdzO9Ct-Fj5D09nHi3Ie4FrAzDViZbAaftPP2no2fUR8z2bv8Apb6__Q7CX8UXAGvEDh6IsmbVXyn3ORBLh-OigRispgajSD5HiNtrPetlrqRm-tbNHB4WOvdNtd4UDFJjo57pO2YSI%3D)

This administration is failing at every turn. Whether it’s from an economic standpoint with their Bidenflation or wanting to give illegal immigrants more benefits than we give to our brave veterans, the Biden administration has made it clear: **America LAST.**

Even the people who HATED Trump are now wishing that he was President again and it’s showing in Biden’s approval ratings. **Biden and Pelosi are set on pleasing the most progressive faction of the Democrat party but what they don’t realize, is they’re now in the minority.**

**[We need your help right now to show Biden and his administration that American’s are fed up with them putting Americans LAST. clean_body: We regret to inform you that your Christmas gifts are not going to make it this year | Fellow patriot Biden has been in office for nearly 300 days, and we thought it would be important to check in on his administration. But Peter, WARNING: things are looking pretty grim. In 10 months, Biden has: Embarrassed our country on the world stage in Afghanistan Fallen asleep at the COP26 Climate Convention Created a crisis at our southern border by abandoning Trump era policies Promised billions to illegal immigrants Driven inflation through the roof: Bidenflation And there’s lots more This administration is failing at every turn. Whether it’s from an economic standpoint with their Bidenflation or wanting to give illegal immigrants more benefits than we give to our brave veterans, the Biden administration has made it clear: America LAST. Even the people who HATED Trump are now wishing that he was President again and it’s showing in Biden’s approval ratings. Biden and Pelosi are set on pleasing the most progressive faction of the Democrat party but what they don’t realize, is they’re now in the minority. Our government should put America FIRST, always and forever. If Biden was on board with that, he wouldn’t have repealed dozens of Trump era policies that did just that and now, our country is suffering the consequences. Thank you, Daria NRSC Digital Director If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. ---
| | Dear Peter,

Steve Bannon is an America First hero, and one of the most effective voices in our movement.

_That's why the DOJ is trying so hard to put him behind bars_.

**We live in scary times. **

_The political persecution of America First warriors should be gravely concerning to all of us_.

Remember when Eric Holder and Lois Lerner were held in Contempt of Congress?

_Neither of them were ever prosecuted, because the Justice Department is run by hypocritical leftists_.

[_**Stand with me against this unequal "justice" under the law by contributing to my election campaign today**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=7b94c835f2&e=af4b86f5c6).

Here's what they're not telling you:

Congress has no authority to investigate anything -- especially not the events of January 6.

**_Congress is a lawmaking body, not a law enforcement body_**.

This entire investigation and indictment is a sham, and the Democrats and RINOs like Liz Cheney who are participating in this process should be expelled from Congress immediately.

**Don't let them get away with this farce**.

[_**Contribute to my election campaign right away and stand with me on the side of Steve Bannon, and American Patriots everywhere**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=017cfde40f&e=af4b86f5c6).

All they're doing is trying to distract you from their massive voter fraud scheme in the 2020 election.

The January 6 committee, the arrests, the political imprisonment of Trump supporters -- it's all smoke and mirrors.

**But I'm still battling for the truth about election fraud on November 3rd, and will get to the bottom of it when I'm in Washington.**

[_**Every little bit helps me in my fight to secure equal justice under the law and meaningful election reform**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=a57e4af861&e=af4b86f5c6).

[_**By chipping in $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or more to my election campaign today, you're standing with me, Steve Bannon, and the America First movement against the tyrants in Washington**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=945f50d112&e=af4b86f5c6).

Thank you in advance.
For America,
**** **Chief Jarome Bell**
Republican Candidate
Virginia’s 2nd U.S. House District

**P.S. The prosecution of Steve Bannon is purely political.

The leftists in Congress and the DOJ must be stopped before they throw the rest of us in jail, too -- all for supporting President Trump.**

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: Can you take a 2 minute survey on our accomplishments?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future
body:
I promised that we would take dead aim at the Tale of Two Cities and I meant it.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38664561/316499175/1246564788?refcode=em-logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2U2MDZlNy03NDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80cZS9ujZXczASqbbKaEdr-uMhLuDtIqJ6kewoqwXt8=)
When I launched my campaign for Mayor outside my home in Brooklyn in January 2013, I promised that we would take dead aim at the Tale of Two Cities.
Today, I am writing to ask for your feedback. I’d love to know what you think we did well during my time as mayor, and where you feel we came up short.
**[Please take 2 minutes to complete a short survey sharing your thoughts about my time as mayor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38664563/316499177/-13721203?source=em-211110-reac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2U2MDZlNy03NDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80cZS9ujZXczASqbbKaEdr-uMhLuDtIqJ6kewoqwXt8=&emci=5abd57c7-7446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cce606e7-7446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15397330)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38664564/316499179/-13721203?source=em-211110-reac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2U2MDZlNy03NDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80cZS9ujZXczASqbbKaEdr-uMhLuDtIqJ6kewoqwXt8=&emci=5abd57c7-7446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cce606e7-7446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15397330)
After winning the primary and through my inauguration, we heard over and over that our vision for One New York was not possible.
When I said that we would not wait to offer free, full-day pre-K to all of New York City’s children, the New York Times said it was a noble idea that would never happen and that we were wasting our time.
Today, 70,000 children are enrolled in pre-K and we’ve launched 3-K for All. When I said that we would not wait to reform a broken stop-and-frisk policy in New York City, the editorials and statements from officials of that time basically said the city would fall apart the moment we got rid of the program.
The opposite happened. We started showing respect to our young people and we got safer. Before COVID, New York City was the safest big city in America with the lowest number of major crimes in the modern era.
When I said that we would not wait to require developers to build more affordable housing, people said they were too powerful.
Eight years later, we have delivered affordable housing to 275,000+ New Yorkers through the most ambitious affordable housing plan in our city’s history.
When Donald Trump dropped out of the Paris Agreement and his administration rolled back climate protection after climate protection, there was a lot of disappointment, but little hope about what could be done in response.
We doubled down, cutting greenhouse emissions by 17% below 2005 levels despite significant growth as a city, and committed to divesting $5 billion of NYC’s pension funds from fossil fuels.
When COVID hit, we were the epicenter of the crisis with an incompetent president who denied science and didn’t want to test simply because he didn’t want to see the numebrs. We didn’t have what we needed — the ventilators, the PPE, the testing labs. It was one of the most difficult moments in our city’s history.
But New Yorkers stepped up to protect each other, as we do. We created our own supplies to save lives. And we went from worst to first — from the epicenter to one of the safest places in America. And when the naysayers said it couldn’t be done, when cities all over dared not try, we re-opened our schools.
But we have done more:
We reduced pedestrian fatalities by 45% making our streets the safest since the dawn of the automobile. We achieved the city’s highest ever graduation rate and lowest dropout rate, and we launched ThriveNYC to ensure New Yorkers who need mental health support have access to it where and when they need it.
There is a lot to be proud of during our time, and I hope many of you are. I also understand if you believe there are places we fall short. But either way, I really want to hear from you.
We’ll be gathering replies at this link:
**[Please take 2 minutes to share your thoughts on the last eight years in New York City. We will be reviewing these results at the end of the week.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38664566/316499180/-13721203?source=em-211110-reac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2U2MDZlNy03NDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80cZS9ujZXczASqbbKaEdr-uMhLuDtIqJ6kewoqwXt8=&emci=5abd57c7-7446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cce606e7-7446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15397330)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38664567/316499182/-13721203?source=em-211110-reac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2U2MDZlNy03NDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80cZS9ujZXczASqbbKaEdr-uMhLuDtIqJ6kewoqwXt8=&emci=5abd57c7-7446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cce606e7-7446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15397330)
We still have a few weeks to go before the end of my term, and I will be working hard through the last hour. I am also very excited about what Eric Adams is going to do for our city moving forward. I’ve known Eric for a long time, and he’ll be an exceptional mayor who will take us to the next level.
But today, I look forward to hearing from you.
In solidarity,
Bill de Blasio

Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5abd57c7-7446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/cce606e7-7446-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2U2MDZlNy03NDQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80cZS9ujZXczASqbbKaEdr-uMhLuDtIqJ6kewoqwXt8=&id=116643580), but we'd be very sorry to see you go.
clean_body: I promised that we would take dead aim at the Tale of Two Cities and I meant it. = When I launched my campaign for Mayor outside my home in Brooklyn in January 2013, I promised that we would take dead aim at the Tale of Two Cities. Today, I am writing to ask for your feedback. I’d love to know what you think we did well during my time as mayor, and where you feel we came up short. After winning the primary and through my inauguration, we heard over and over that our vision for One New York was not possible. When I said that we would not wait to offer free, full-day pre-K to all of New York City’s children, the New York Times said it was a noble idea that would never happen and that we were wasting our time. Today, 70,000 children are enrolled in pre-K and we’ve launched 3-K for All. When I said that we would not wait to reform a broken stop-and-frisk policy in New York City, the editorials and statements from officials of that time basically said the city would fall apart the moment we got rid of the program. The opposite happened. We started showing respect to our young people and we got safer. Before COVID, New York City was the safest big city in America with the lowest number of major crimes in the modern era. When I said that we would not wait to require developers to build more affordable housing, people said they were too powerful. Eight years later, we have delivered affordable housing to 275,000+ New Yorkers through the most ambitious affordable housing plan in our city’s history. When Donald Trump dropped out of the Paris Agreement and his administration rolled back climate protection after climate protection, there was a lot of disappointment, but little hope about what could be done in response. We doubled down, cutting greenhouse emissions by 17% below 2005 levels despite significant growth as a city, and committed to divesting $5 billion of NYC’s pension funds from fossil fuels. When COVID hit, we were the epicenter of the crisis with an incompetent president who denied science and didn’t want to test simply because he didn’t want to see the numebrs. We didn’t have what we needed — the ventilators, the PPE, the testing labs. It was one of the most difficult moments in our city’s history. But New Yorkers stepped up to protect each other, as we do. We created our own supplies to save lives. And we went from worst to first — from the epicenter to one of the safest places in America. And when the naysayers said it couldn’t be done, when cities all over dared not try, we re-opened our schools. But we have done more: We reduced pedestrian fatalities by 45% making our streets the safest since the dawn of the automobile. We achieved the city’s highest ever graduation rate and lowest dropout rate, and we launched ThriveNYC to ensure New Yorkers who need mental health support have access to it where and when they need it. There is a lot to be proud of during our time, and I hope many of you are. I also understand if you believe there are places we fall short. But either way, I really want to hear from you. We’ll be gathering replies at this link: We still have a few weeks to go before the end of my term, and I will be working hard through the last hour. I am also very excited about what Eric Adams is going to do for our city moving forward. I’ve known Eric for a long time, and he’ll be an exceptional mayor who will take us to the next level. But today, I look forward to hearing from you. In solidarity, Bill de Blasio Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can , but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

name: Val Demings
subject: just one donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is an absolutely critical moment, and I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back against Rubio and the GOP.
#
Team, Senator Rosen said I should reach out.
**I'm trailing Marco Rubio in the polls -- and now, I'm falling behind my critical mid-month fundraising goal. I cannot afford to miss this goal, but here's where things stand:**
[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38664634/316502583/-571081036?refcode=jr_em_nd_211115_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmQ3OTE1MS03NjQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jg8VD9BPpaxmIDIV2jJ47anPKOtC5dEjXKwrKwD19Lw=)
Polling shows me 2 points down in our race that will decide Senate control. I know that we can overcome this, but missing this goal means making tough decisions like pulling back our efforts to reach Floridians.
Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points -- only 10,033 votes. In a race this tight, every choice we each make is incredibly impactful. **It could be your single donation that lets us knock just enough doors, call just enough voters or run enough ads to push this campaign -- our movement -- to victory.**
The GOP isn't showing any signs of slowing down: Marco Rubio is breaking GOP fundraising records, and Mitch McConnell's special-interest allies are ready to drop hundreds of millions to keep Florida red. National Republicans have already poured in $10 million to keep me and any other Democrat from winning in Florida again.
**This is an absolutely critical moment, and I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back against Rubio and the GOP and take the lead. This is about Florida, defending the Senate and protecting our democracy from the GOP's far-right agenda.**
**[So please, I need you to split a $5 donation to Jacky Rosen and my campaign right now to make up this critical gap before our midnight deadline. clean_body: This is an absolutely critical moment, and I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back against Rubio and the GOP. Team, Senator Rosen said I should reach out. I'm trailing Marco Rubio in the polls -- and now, I'm falling behind my critical mid-month fundraising goal. I cannot afford to miss this goal, but here's where things stand: = Polling shows me 2 points down in our race that will decide Senate control. I know that we can overcome this, but missing this goal means making tough decisions like pulling back our efforts to reach Floridians. Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points -- only 10,033 votes. In a race this tight, every choice we each make is incredibly impactful. It could be your single donation that lets us knock just enough doors, call just enough voters or run enough ads to push this campaign -- our movement -- to victory. The GOP isn't showing any signs of slowing down: Marco Rubio is breaking GOP fundraising records, and Mitch McConnell's special-interest allies are ready to drop hundreds of millions to keep Florida red. National Republicans have already poured in $10 million to keep me and any other Democrat from winning in Florida again. This is an absolutely critical moment, and I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back against Rubio and the GOP and take the lead. This is about Florida, defending the Senate and protecting our democracy from the GOP's far-right agenda. = Thank you, Val Demings =

I don’t expect you to donate “just because.” I’m hoping you’ll donate because, like me, you believe that workers rights are non-negotiable, access to reproductive healthcare -- including abortion -- is imperative, and that your zip code shouldn’t determine the quality of education you receive.

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Me vs. out of touch millionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1427%2E3611125%2EakltXN ][IMG]

I needed to make sure you saw this --

Several of my GOP opponents are multi-millionaires. One even owns a
vacation home in the Bahamas and a private yacht. Another holds multiple
cushy positions on corporate boards.

Me? I’m still paying off my family’s mortgage and student loans.

It’s clear that none of my Republican opponents can relate to the
struggles of Ohio’s working families. We cannot let an out-of-touch
millionaire represent us in the Senate.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5905?amount=5&t=1007&akid=1427%2E3611125%2EakltXN ]So, I’m personally asking you to chip in $5 today to fuel
this people-powered campaign to flip Ohio’s Senate seat blue. I know we
have what it takes to overcome my opponents’ fortunes, but only with your
help.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5905?amount=5&t=1008&akid=1427%2E3611125%2EakltXN ]Donate

Unlike my right-wing opponents, I can’t loan myself a few million dollars
to jumpstart this campaign. And I don’t want to.

I’m proud to run a campaign powered by small-dollar donations from folks
like you. Your $5 here and $10 there is literally the only way we’ll build
enough grassroots power to win a race this competitive.

But Republicans think they can buy this open Senate seat. They’re pumping
millions into this race without doing a damn thing to find out what Ohio’s
workers actually need.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5905?amount=5&t=1009&akid=1427%2E3611125%2EakltXN ]We cannot let Republicans buy this seat. If you’re with me, I’m
counting on you to chip in today to help us overcome the attacks and elect
a Senator who will put workers first.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5905?amount=5&t=1010&akid=1427%2E3611125%2EakltXN ]Donate

-- Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1427%2E3611125%2EakltXN ][IMG]

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
