name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: I'm Doing Something I've Never Done Before | Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
Dear America First Patriots, The establishment is doing EVERYTHING possible to make sure I do not get elected because I represent you. This includes
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=963385.697.1.405c573440722b66bc549b1cb4cfa4e8)
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=963385.698.1.4e54019476ef64b2ba9b391b86862e46) |
---
## Dear America First Patriots,
---
The establishment is doing EVERYTHING possible to make sure I do not get elected because I represent you. This includes pouring millions of dollars into this race because they see the momentum of OUR movement. This campaign has become a national threat to the status quo. Our social media engagement is off the charts, our rallies are packed with thousands of people and the endorsements continue to grow (General Flynn, Mike Lindell, Sebastian Gorka, Roger Stone and etc..). In order to defeat the establishment I NEED YOUR HELP! From the very beginning I have asked for 3 simple things that I believe will put us over the finish line if we will be consistent in doing them: 1\. Pray For Me
2\. Share My Social Media Pages (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram...)
3\. Financially Support The Mission
| 1. | Pray For Me
---|---
2. | Share My Social Media Pages (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram...)
---|---
3. | Financially Support The Mission
---|---
I'm going to do something I have never done before and that is a matching campaign. I will match every dollar raised over the next 24hrs up to $5000. My wife, Kendra, and I believe in this mission and are going to continue to invest our treasure in the America First Agenda.
If a lot of people will give just a little bit it will add up to a whole lot.
I'm challenging all America First Patriots to join me in this FIGHT!
Please consider giving $5, $10, $25 or $100 and I will personally match it over the next 24hrs up to $5000.
You can donate at www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/donate
These dollars are bullets in the war for the heart and soul of the country. We are in the position to start purchasing ads to spread the message and vision of this campaign all over Oklahoma. Please join me.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
| | [ Click Here To Help Elect Jackson Lahmeyer ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=963385.699.1.d6e4e7a7e7cc1e5d82fec1e1cf8ec77a)
---

---

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Trump just told Gov. DeSantis not to underestimate me
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
But Gov. DeSantis just sees this election as a stepping stone to the White House |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38664746/316504165/1034092589?refcode=20211115_f_2_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5YTUxYy03NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vhlzvkGv7PaN2cFpVeWcWt2qkaHAU8o8bWfX9__Znc=)
---
**Trump to Gov. DeSantis: "Don’t underestimate Charlie Crist"**
Friend,

When I look at Florida, I see a state of hardworking people. A state of innovators and entrepreneurs. A state of limitless potential.

But when Gov. DeSantis looks at Florida, all he sees is a stepping stone to the White House.

And Floridians don’t deserve to be stepped on.

**That’s why I’m running for governor: to lift people up. But I’ll be blunt: beating Gov. DeSantis won’t be easy. To compete with his millions from far-right national donors, my team needs to hit _all_ of our fundraising goals.**

My finance team tells me we need to hit our $15,000 mid-month goal tonight. Team, we’re still short of what we need.

There’s very little that Donald Trump and I see eye-to-eye on. But it turns out that he’s seeing the same polls that I am, and we both came to the same conclusion: I’m the only candidate who can defeat Gov. DeSantis.

**[Please contribute what you can to my campaign to help us meet tonight’s goal and defeat Gov. DeSantis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38664747/316504166/1034092589?refcode=20211115_f_2_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5YTUxYy03NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vhlzvkGv7PaN2cFpVeWcWt2qkaHAU8o8bWfX9__Znc=)**

If I know one thing, it’s that -- united -- we _can_ build a Florida for All. That means:
* Better schools
* Better jobs
* A stronger, fairer economy
* And a cleaner environment

All of that adds up to a _better life for every Floridian,_ and isn’t that what a governor should be striving for?

I believe so -- but Gov. DeSantis seems to disagree.

**[So, if you can, donate whatever amount you can to my campaign, to help us reach our goal and lay the groundwork this year to defeat Gov. DeSantis next year. It’s time for a governor who’ll put Florida first.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38664748/316504167/1034092589?refcode=20211115_f_2_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5YTUxYy03NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vhlzvkGv7PaN2cFpVeWcWt2qkaHAU8o8bWfX9__Znc=)**

Thanks so much and God bless,
Charlie

** ** **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38664749/316504168/1034092589?refcode=20211115_f_2_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5YTUxYy03NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vhlzvkGv7PaN2cFpVeWcWt2qkaHAU8o8bWfX9__Znc=)**

My finance team tells me we need to hit our $15,000 mid-month goal tonight. Team, we’re still short of what we need. There’s very little that Donald Trump and I see eye-to-eye on. But it turns out that he’s seeing the same polls that I am, and we both came to the same conclusion: I’m the only candidate who can defeat Gov. DeSantis. = If I know one thing, it’s that -- united -- we can build a Florida for All. That means: Better schools Better jobs A stronger, fairer economy And a cleaner environment All of that adds up to a better life for every Floridian, and isn’t that what a governor should be striving for? I believe so -- but Gov. DeSantis seems to disagree. = Thanks so much and God bless, Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

| Hi Patriot, my name is Philip Foster. I work on Congressman Mo Brooks’ campaign for US Senate. As we approach the 2022 election cycle, we are gearing up for and setting up distribution points across the state of Alabama where supporters can pick up a Mo Brooks for US Senate yard sign. We need supporters willing to offer a place of business to be a point of distribution. If you have or know someone who has a private business, retail store, or office open to the public who is willing to be a point of distribution, please reply to this email. Examples of locations include a doctor's office, law office, auto repair shop, clothing store, jewelry store, accountant office, restaurant, gas station, insurance agent office, or any other place of business open to the public. Supporters would come to this place of business during regular operating hours to pick up campaign yard signs or other campaign materials. If you can help us, reply to this email or please email me at philip@mobrooks.com, and I will provide you with additional details. I appreciate your support of Mo Brooks and look forward to hearing from you soon. Philip Foster P.S. if you haven’t already seen the Mo Brooks yard signs, here is a picture of them below!
---

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer_email&n=2).
---

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z06v1cdf57j29o93jainklogqfpeeci8hnplr4q8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrj6o75m5i78p3lcoon0p9lc2q66t9jedpmcstiedi74dtlcko63cj0cap76or7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imtj38o5jc9jr4cr662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpjm0oj1c5j68oh5u)

| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhr3vuf584fr4co2dvnpsb8f5863d27fchtc7gj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h62ob6chh2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp7o5lt40qrtlhcgpds3jn2hnhjhs71vj5o1hdeo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h62ob6chh2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs77am1objaqhguehotom2mp16p7oahcqnjn2v7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h62ob6chh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk79s93ro2lu0ohuln6oo27qfdd6mmvp6e0ro000_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h62ob6chh2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv9gbpci8bk2i6h0c8vvehlsak5k2slm23i7jemo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h62ob6chh2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcfd7p4pcl5k7rkgqecqa3eqb1hq70h4bla41qqo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h62ob6chh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zns7c64o5vrj2i09j37ag7aba49d2v8uj10hpqg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h62ob6chh2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu2e6mro0qt1vk7qif061biceu4p0nmac1f8u8i8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h62ob6chh2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmbvrdfmr69u5uu56d5n9fc4vjjl9guik9sobjhg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7c1h62ob6chh2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS

**_“Congressman Pat Fallon has proven himself to be a strong Conservative voice for the people of Texas. Pat Fallon has my Complete and Total Endorsement!”_**
– President Donald J. Trump

subject: Do NOT get comfortable

body:
You’ve been chosen to represent Alabama. Peter, Our campaign has had an INCREDIBLE week, topping TWO polls and becoming the FRONTRUNNER in this race, but we CANNOT get comfortable now. _I may be surging ahead in the polls, but I’m up against a_** _40-year_** __**_career politician with_**** _Washington, D.C. donors_**** _ready to POUR money_** _into
his pockets. _
We NEED to fight harder than ALL of them if we want to **STOP Biden’s out-of-control inflation** , **secure the border** , and **make sure OUR voices are HEARD.** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=58a37218b5b1468c8dd6f116e534c095&_e=SaMq5_OlgKG3ctY90wgVa0qJedlrATetiUW0CM6OYg_5rxJRizKXKGf_QUkCt0nB9FqRMiVk7DAjgAUJLqWomzWiNt2WFJPnobf9tDWdkMnMI-q7USVV5MRODwJh8JAE5elRLzyZJJx1yw6JhxaLwPdSmMgM4ttGJLbUZ9YwF8HmIW_9_ocWlohamy5-yzKgtotYXfxEp6evjge1hY49wM7AbncmfCZQwPmFjh0ejevbGS8teK8aXVB7U3G5W1hZVDwUMcnBIqO1PBpT8G-4HBWl_39ML9SA1ctnPsgdoKde7fl1ZwDtLR32S2HMVVXKw5ogFUcFsCgDzSqz4M1IyQFFqAogUxyvfhPC2vUItsKa-W1_UZUypK9cSylsp-qIcafm6f3MLJG1wVCaTv8DxZbxOyUBVGLnJ_jUjgwyrvdvwYgkUnnvOcG457c_U2P4jviA8VNvzwDvN8RJLW8Dog%3D%3D) **We only have until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to raise $5k, and ** **I’m counting on YOUR grassroots support to get us there. **
**Visit our donation page BEFORE 11:59pm and

clean_body: You’ve been chosen to represent Alabama. Peter, Our campaign has had an INCREDIBLE week, topping TWO polls and becoming the FRONTRUNNER in this race, but we CANNOT get comfortable now. I may be surging ahead in the polls, but I’m up against a 40-year _career politician with Washington, D.C. donors ready to POUR money into his pockets. We NEED to fight harder than ALL of them if we want to STOP Biden’s out-of-control inflation , secure the border , and make sure OUR voices are HEARD. We only have until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to raise $5k, and I’m counting on YOUR grassroots support to get us there. Visit our donation page BEFORE 11:59pm and help us Let me be frank, Peter: what we raise TODAY will set the tone for the rest of this Senate race. ALL of Alabama is looking at these fundraising numbers,Peter ,and we have less than 12 HOURS beat our goal: Thank you, Katie Britt Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

clean_body: Hitting budget by tonight’s deadline is absolutely critical. | Friend, With the fate of the entire House majority resting on this 1 race, we simply can’t afford to fall short on our monthly budgets. Pelosi admitted to her donors that Texas’ brand-new seat will cost her the House, but if we can’t raise the $19,590 we need to hit budget by tonight’s mid-month deadline, it’ll all be for nothing. These monthly budgets aren’t just some arbitrary numbers to throw on a report. Our finance team carefully crafts our goals to ensure we’re keeping pace with the Left’s fundraising machine. And now that Pelosi’s DCCC has raked in more than $106.5 MILLION, falling short at tonight’s deadline would be exactly the sign the Democrats are looking for. We can’t signal any weakness. We MUST keep up the momentum and ensure we have the resources to go toe-to-toe with Pelosi’s millions. name: Primary Sinema Project
subject: An undeserved victory lap
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
The process to get here was anything but successful — and that's largely in part due to Senator Sinema's actions. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPFgqSTcNXXAW9HKH35IY26WVh95wcoEh2Bg6p2TeXUoQzzHAzU-K3cgmg5gN9Uv7l4Egco9aTGY4YDh6X_d11H51T8CKEh-vJ67VRnDbrkjtk0EYmojfYow9BblMrokIkzRutcC4DUfKXw3Gn-l6LjHxnLBDvywz3218h5euoPKqBPw3pQ69afcSypWCGpoQLJF5neDfXW_rCQRKOoXmbnjCWrOiaPrxzFTfn3KSmoif/3h1/s9MS-J-0RuqL2L6lySYrEw/h0/-LEj1RKlzG7Og18VNwPtCE_weBEi7k8iUUxNfqoSQsY)
Peter, Today, Senator Kyrsten Sinema is at the White House to attend President Biden's signing of the bipartisan infrastructure bill, a part of her "victory lap" celebration in what she considers to be a successful passage of legislation. But the truth is that while Democrats and Republicans were able to negotiate an infrastructure bill, the process to get here was anything but successful — and that's largely in part due to Senator Sinema. **This all could have been done months ago and without some of the President's most popular proposals stripped out of it, if not for Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin's delay tactics and in-fighting.** There's just no good reason for us to keep a Senator in office who refuses to cooperate with President Biden, ignores what her constituents want, and holds votes hostage and delays things if they don't go her way, Peter. **[We believe Arizona deserves _better_ than Kyrsten Sinema — so that's why we're laying the groundwork to oust her, in tandem with grassroots organizations on the ground. Will you please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today towards our work?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS70YK_fHFgbNaEYD22Zs7lizR4l3dEU1iTVBF04D55ZVGE6OnfUSIgOIbSwUaCNTxp3p26Tdd4gXgy5EKgczV9RuUOc0owgkDAi3Xp2gu3zbxXWwPQoo_olPB6swmXq35A4eDEqExko1svNOIUV059hWRC5rK0Ngz8PQcSbWwDpz8CNPmlKO1cMrav6XMYLGhRkJm0jlZMOqVIGnTayU7GEW4r_8vvB8d2lsHUmvCy8dsbAioYwbDvssx140lrSazPny37z6rILQVJnytvY6zWXPbSiPgw0tcHOR_FrN2hpdiIrgruIhcmw8_QA9-94ol/3h1/s9MS-J-0RuqL2L6lySYrEw/h1/NiSjN8YqPy68MN-bM7GFi0xjdwO-tNv8ureFmowrLmg)** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS70YK_fHFgbNaEYD22Zs7lizR4l3dEU1iTVBF04D55ZXYjTNawYqSuaBcQDqthsbQ6l_OES0ccb2_c5Qpuzb5WCCH53eAH7uu7DN9wHCdD3eb5UVLb_7HQOhFBH4LLP9psiLwWbQ-rNTHj_5uhrCGeRr7Qn19IW3Ho3JJ3Nn5dhC7O1qm6e1uEb_k3355JQ3uEhtdANV4nsupYXLYCP2CULPd6bXdLGJdS-B3JEnhFXTlotV_HImywY7J4vUXAKm5rUFOnnRjK3bj5AsYi43hj1gd41PGggsGj42AduaHyltbLG3woHSdyuj6rkLglnHW/3h1/s9MS-J-0RuqL2L6lySYrEw/h2/Tu_GW5un26s_jdTFnLfw6AHzbp3cXlWb0Zg0GfBhfRs) We're relieved that Washington finally came to an agreement on the bipartisan infrastructure bill. The items in this bill will be life-changing for many of our communities. But what we _are_ concerned about is the process it took us to get here — and all that got left out because of Sinema's obstruction, like larger prescription drug reform, 12 weeks of paid family leave, and an extended child tax credit. We're also concerned by Senator Sinema's lack of cooperation to deliver for the people. Her actions have already hurt the Democratic Party, and will continue to hurt the party in the long run if unchecked. If Democrats want to keep their House and Senate majorities in the midterms in 2022 — which are less than a year away — we must deliver for the people. That's why we must band together to hold her accountable, which is why we're asking one more time: **[Please chip in $5 or whatever you're able to afford to the Primary Sinema Project today. 100% of your donation today will go towards grassroots groups based in Arizona that are laying the foundation for a successful primary challenge. Thank you!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS70YK_fHFgbNaEYD22Zs7lizR4l3dEU1iTVBF04D55ZVX3VJk_UdLRtcfDzI3AXL34B51Kto354aQfypf4FYTPGUQ92NEtvnK3yayFa9R8qFyoyBuqoGfV32EsWbF9Fk3AR2qVWdFEbXUqvvRGCZzlINqRkVHsmQj8zRKziWIuEM91yQbLyUMYAvKjGu8qBARrBzr9kVyHE9W-ATXVWWZF6aOlJBiUtXua8w_FGAM8xmF8441ihom7hVhwENzodBu4MHJuB_Orw72Mj8Vl3IrqRjrLxj-4mBIjXtstv5U_kByBopSj1RUeXNDMJVsvOTb/3h1/s9MS-J-0RuqL2L6lySYrEw/h3/RJkGeY5P3GwWFLXn7KAhHYgZeqOGzfDVn8xOkH-f-CE)** — Primary Sinema Project

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I hope you’ll be part of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We need your support to help kick off this campaign the right way.
This morning, we launched our campaign to serve Texas as this state’s next governor. Then we hit the road.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162810&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=162810%2E444211%2EWhRxTj)
I’m driving across the state to meet with and listen to Texans about the issues that matter most to our state’s prosperity — like creating the next generation of high-pay, high-quality jobs, ensuring Texas has world class schools that prepare our children for economic success, and expanding healthcare access to guarantee that every Texan is well enough to pursue the career of their dreams.
I want to thank each of you who have already signed up to join this campaign, because the only way we’re going to achieve a bolder vision for Texas is if each of us comes together to make it happen.
[That’s why I’m asking you to join us by making a donation today. Your support will help us kick this campaign off the right way, fueling us with the resources needed to reach each and every Texan in every corner of the state.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162810&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=162810%2E444211%2EWhRxTj)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162810&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=162810%2E444211%2EWhRxTj)**
By going everywhere, listening to everyone, and bringing as many people as possible into this fight for the future of Texas, I’m confident that we can push past the mean, extreme, and divisive policies that we see in Texas today.
It isn’t going to be easy, but I can’t imagine anything more important for us to be working towards — together — in this moment.
[Will you pitch in $3 or more right now to help power our campaign along the long, challenging path ahead? We can win this thing, but we have to work together — and there’s no better day to chip in. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48926?refcode=ema20211115-162810&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=162810%2E444211%2EWhRxTj)
I’m grateful to everyone who has shown support today, and excited for what we’re going to get done together.
More soon,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211115-162810-footer&t=23&refcode2=162810_444211_WhRxTj&akid=162810%2E444211%2EWhRxTj)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=24&akid=162810%2E444211%2EWhRxTj)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=162810%2E444211%2EWhRxTj)

name: Eric Greitens
subject: Soros’ next move
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
If he’s paying a liberal watchdog to attack us, we’re doing something right...
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5a433dbcfc2543dc8d17fbfec19dae9f&_m=55fc705b6dd24d69868d394cef20d673&_e=Ifb0RMwcuHZofdUcBTC8dkIJv70d2fueaq3kQ-NvTYv2c12dtf-mqGWPwh05HPoq1Nl8EgVyqiXhQ4qCt_7geXpfV4pAtoR2X__TvFzE2v9grk3HfdAeMrj-lWRH3wOPqqCXJg7cTK0VALMWQSp-JA8I2zyAAQ0vHBKYwk5WerAYQ_ogRAehxSGDFD0qfcXtZ711xqHFxwUIowwPArzZkUWTYh22Yh2wehH-O65WpSXQLo3doLGU6TEYPa0nSPkaRKzUlHK35CBu2iJXqkyN5s9OqScUaOucZyN1mN2eAjMMCpNZC_ERaNpCHvst5Wr2jjOgvA-sBGciDJoMoTmRG0v3AijnlOS33nTqjYDNK-EEzO8cOdLELCuwLoC38HHsQLFeZzt5kXvVfLJBwlmUbccefWiCcrw91teNBpXr7kdtbR1o_g0DKM7luo_bZKF80JN6e1eO3QyW7ebu_6BZgQ_Vx6_99z6WofzatMHtV1hAyIzwlbvyMbOK61OxRGHfFmv40Et1V8NKpxAcRH3lMezvQEu9DGBl_iYuYYJ60JY%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Shadowy liberal billionaire George Soros is dead set on trying to bring us down.
---
**_First, he funded a radicalized prosecutor to make false allegations against me. And now, he’s pouring cash into a liberal watchdog to file endless complaints against us._**
---

name: Shawn Collins
subject: Taliban tried to kill me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA**
body:
A black, conservative, Navy veteran with Afghanistan combat experience who is focused on real solutions... | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ffddfe36ddce43d3ac025505d815dc6d&_e=HiZp3181o8QTYgSZZa6YIxfto849OC5zGbxvBbyTiYYgD5fZ759uhArxCZXYx7G0vXhNPozzyzd7d1e4y4aiddJfcw9SP6yuMs7MhFHvCQJVm8cAZh2YRgP5PESjDDxqngHcmVnspWRpZdWmhZbk_10g-2FFyN91u-lPkvCm-A97vo0Z353JqtN0GCyTwzvyPhMoStfGXHCyt_3GF63LD8qu7MVxqnt4biTSyjcY-r2ENFLQjqJDEULDK1epj01Dzv7IrvXGSH-OoZ5i9ttn8n1OKMqsUvvZ-1ARB-va5PBZAqCJB1FgQ3Y209Vd-6k_EY1wk-zTtKRLw5HBWJ0bSphNHzoiknf_OIXLjRPQCnXrXv2eijIMVBGgUWemwj3Iyz6TkbnNWQc4hSkQfA7TunCrAi56t8pa4p75LY1gt931KVYVOb1LgwTPGHNyazqep48AS-HzAKQEFcKifXfqDQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow patriot,

I’m Shawn Collins – **a proud black conservative Republican, Navy combat veteran, and active Navy reservist running for Congress in California’s 45th District.**

I’m running against liberal Congresswoman Katie Porter – a self-proclaimed socialist who hangs out with the squad and co-chaired Elizabeth Warren’s presidential campaign.

[**I need help from grassroots conservatives like you to flip this top-target House seat and win back a Republican House majority so we can put a stop to the Biden agenda.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ffddfe36ddce43d3ac025505d815dc6d&_e=HiZp3181o8QTYgSZZa6YIxfto849OC5zGbxvBbyTiYYgD5fZ759uhArxCZXYx7G0vXhNPozzyzd7d1e4y4aiddJfcw9SP6yuMs7MhFHvCQJVm8cAZh2YRgP5PESjDDxqngHcmVnspWRpZdWmhZbk_10g-2FFyN91u-lPkvCm-A97vo0Z353JqtN0GCyTwzvyPhMoStfGXHCyt_3GF63LD8qu7MVxqnt4biTSyjcY-r2ENFLQjqJDEULDK1epj01DTpT_Z07hd6NP_QiuaeldHrn_E5ayzw-NY3Qq-edbgT3kuVPpfPbC8Pkx_8DY6ZeZAfuD0aTNTj3XNYXlEZt3Isfm0rcjVBOpLu9PYbQ6B5tOIyXANDXWOp4KZMLsFv2vFPcL5kc1zh-0neP_NIxTPXFUb4bBYR3mp_3eLv7O_Uqvl5G0vWtLqX8KjtdPSyWPsNKCj4WFIWNI0rHHL2kgIQ%3D%3D)

But first, I want to tell you about my service in the Navy...

After I graduated from law school, I answered the call to serve my country and joined the United States Navy.

Just one year after my wife Zeina and I got married, I volunteered for a combat deployment to Afghanistan.

While stationed near Kandahar City, Afghanistan – the birthplace of the Taliban – I coordinated with Special Forces units to help them track down and arrest suspected terrorist suicide bombers. Our work saved countless lives.

But wearing the American flag on my sleeve made me a target, **and I was fortunate to survive two suicide bombing attacks.**

Now, everything I and thousands of other soldiers fought for – and even died for – in Afghanistan has been undone by Biden’s failed military withdrawal.

This failure has left Americans and our allies stranded, left our weaponry and supplies in the hands of the Taliban, and resulted in more deaths of innocent civilians – including woman and children – along with American troops.

Yet Biden, my opponent Katie Porter, and the Democrats have moved on and are seemingly ignoring what happened and what is still happening.

**This failure, combined with the lack of security at our southern border which would permit even terrorists to cross unnoticed, means America is less safe than it was a year ago.**

There’s absolutely no doubt – [**American needs new leadership, and I’m running for Congress to give it to us.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ffddfe36ddce43d3ac025505d815dc6d&_e=HiZp3181o8QTYgSZZa6YIxfto849OC5zGbxvBbyTiYYgD5fZ759uhArxCZXYx7G0vXhNPozzyzd7d1e4y4aiddJfcw9SP6yuMs7MhFHvCQJVm8cAZh2YRgP5PESjDDxqngHcmVnspWRpZdWmhZbk_10g-2FFyN91u-lPkvCm-A97vo0Z353JqtN0GCyTwzvyPhMoStfGXHCyt_3GF63LD8qu7MVxqnt4biTSyjcY-r2ENFLQjqJDEULDK1epj01D42QNjvGpDuRzDM0CdbDG62kkh4HwpreYOkqIuFPakYVFX31jD35EjVOShGwZV5dY728qgvCUvPegZTZPtNhVB4sCFJd7hfZZDp389uE3_w-Tv3eD7hqMg-mRqipet5OpArMki0-AdLNUJ2-lp3EPMLXwljguWb_rG8WDz8_PfSI7CFaZ8wJxtvdXwEsJ7HTVzOZu55dtdhjeUaMTa77VtQ%3D%3D)

But I need your help. The Left knows that a **black, conservative, Navy veteran with Afghanistan combat experience who is focused on real solutions** is exactly the kind of candidate who can defeat them in this current climate, _which is why they’re already targeting me._

I’m running for Congress to keep America safe by securing our border and supporting our military and law enforcement.

clean_body: A black, conservative, Navy veteran with Afghanistan combat experience who is focused on real solutions... | Fellow patriot, I’m Shawn Collins – a proud black conservative Republican, Navy combat veteran, and active Navy reservist running for Congress in California’s 45th District. I’m running against liberal Congresswoman Katie Porter – a self-proclaimed socialist who hangs out with the squad and co-chaired Elizabeth Warren’s presidential campaign. But first, I want to tell you about my service in the Navy... After I graduated from law school, I answered the call to serve my country and joined the United States Navy. Just one year after my wife Zeina and I got married, I volunteered for a combat deployment to Afghanistan. While stationed near Kandahar City, Afghanistan – the birthplace of the Taliban – I coordinated with Special Forces units to help them track down and arrest suspected terrorist suicide bombers. Our work saved countless lives. But wearing the American flag on my sleeve made me a target, and I was fortunate to survive two suicide bombing attacks. Now, everything I and thousands of other soldiers fought for – and even died for – in Afghanistan has been undone by Biden’s failed military withdrawal. This failure has left Americans and our allies stranded, left our weaponry and supplies in the hands of the Taliban, and resulted in more deaths of innocent civilians – including woman and children – along with American troops. Yet Biden, my opponent Katie Porter, and the Democrats have moved on and are seemingly ignoring what happened and what is still happening. This failure, combined with the lack of security at our southern border which would permit even terrorists to cross unnoticed, means America is less safe than it was a year ago. There’s absolutely no doubt – But I need your help. The Left knows that a black, conservative, Navy veteran with Afghanistan combat experience who is focused on real solutions is exactly the kind of candidate who can defeat them in this current climate, which is why they’re already targeting me. I’m running for Congress to keep America safe by securing our border and supporting our military and law enforcement. Thanks, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. He will take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress. ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Shawn Collins is a former member of the US Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy. | PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA Don't want to receive any more of our emails:

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Good news bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mid_qtr_nov_2021&n=1&v=38)
---
Friend -- It's a part of life. You take the good with the bad.
* The good: our fundraising amounts are up compared to this time last quarter.
* The bad: we still don't have as much campaign money as our wealthy, self-funding competitors.
* The good: we have a tremendous Lieutenant Governor running mate locked in.
* The bad: we won't be announcing that individual's identity until after the holidays (so we can't use that announcement for fundraising this quarter).
* The good: our track record, message, and vision for Illinois are unmatched by any of the other candidates (it isn't even close).
* The bad: it will not matter unless we can get that information in front of the voters.

What's the hardest part of this campaign? It is spending so much time away from home and my boys who are at the age where they need a father present. But constantly having to ask you--my friends--who have already been extremely generous for financial help is a close second. The last quarter of the year is always the most difficult for fundraising. People are focused on the holidays. But a holiday focus doesn't mean that you can't support me. The $25 or $50 dollar donations still add up. A $25 donation from everyone opening this email would result in us having our strongest fundraising quarter to date! And we do need your support to pay for advertising and staff salaries. Our one-of-a-kind campaign baseball caps can make a great Christmas gift. Each of our caps has our logo, embroidered in purple, on a desert digital camouflage pattern. That's the camouflage pattern I wore when I deployed to Iraq. Because the desert digital patterns vary, no two caps are alike. When you order a campaign cap between now and the end of 2021, we will throw in a bumper sticker, as well. Purchasing a campaign baseball cap is a "WIN-WIN." You can give a friend a unique stocking-stuffer and help spread our message of "Commonsense Conservative Leadership We Can Trust." You can buy a cap or donate [here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mid_qtr_nov_2021&n=2&v=38). As always, thank you for reading this, considering a donation, and working to improve our state and country. Semper Fidelis, Paul Paul Schimpf
[http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mid_qtr_nov_2021&n=3&v=38)
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mid_qtr_nov_2021&n=4&v=38).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mid_qtr_nov_2021&n=5&v=38) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mid_qtr_nov_2021&n=6&v=38).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mid_qtr_nov_2021&n=7&v=38), software for leaders.

name: Erik Aadland
subject: The Taliban haven’t changed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for Senate
body:
Social media has banned Trump from their platforms, but why not the Taliban? |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e83dca199984b188870d48f2b9fcb30&_e=gsLsiwRgWqS8t8qRbhpE1F0yR_z6A2rVR-m2dNiiMFXh8wl0GmkpzaP1rYt1MyJoyIk77QlXzJFoMtsCiM9WI-dVgp1Ox8LWDDdOB332-492w2q1b3eXoXidci58F0weP9aCtDX-oGkzNdcStXFFoe-TUIk9fQrA7Kt2TXyPgLhJgsQ046egz-9ygJEeRy2ODocTmaH3bmbiqVQk2JMFDuwl6JhGH9vrQ2I63hxZd7YDa8eVjAat3iMRm2CqiXnXVqxVzTUaUOgTs4MG7m-mGQ1mimBCw2Ec0n3Adnkqv-M8CVSYtgeqyWFXpZ9E-Kst8HGlhwVePc0ZpNfv8aWM04GI61He9CfC2otBU4jf61w5iM19laqqPUuF7gjeyYK6yNvqnHmQw8Jjrwivxd7UrhYa28HR7qcv7mSf5l08Omg%3D)

---
Fellow American,

The Taliban that Joe Biden handed Afghanistan to, are the same people who harbored and fought alongside Al-Qaida. Two of their leaders are wanted Terrorists with multi-million-dollar bounties on their heads. Four of their leaders were in prison at Guantanamo Bay before Biden and Obama traded them for Bowe Bergdahl.

The Taliban supporters of September 11th, 2001, are the same Taliban I was trading bullets with in Southern Kandahar when I was fighting them in Afghanistan. **The only difference between the Taliban of yesterday and now, is that** _**social media allows them to be on twitter, while Donald Trump is banned from the platform.**_

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e83dca199984b188870d48f2b9fcb30&_e=gsLsiwRgWqS8t8qRbhpE1F0yR_z6A2rVR-m2dNiiMFXh8wl0GmkpzaP1rYt1MyJoyIk77QlXzJFoMtsCiM9WI-dVgp1Ox8LWDDdOB332-492w2q1b3eXoXidci58F0weP9aCtDX-oGkzNdcStXFFoe-TUIk9fQrA7Kt2TXyPgLhJgsQ046egz-9ygJEeRy2ODocTmaH3bmbiqVQk2JMFDlh4_4QY3i4UL8vrEiZ51LSrOzD2Roez3CavQRG5xXkFxb73Pk2Sl5ZLRUD74RFwllfipplH2i0qZntHkSq0kEkVLj1AhJ76Z6BvBqevVV3YU3NRwy68ftCI9PfaqDkUVRemqdXKT0bTnzBbl1W2D85oEZ4r4yGywQERJhbD99VMRkqJZeAFMjoCO4dAAgAnleSmXAxWY-39hOTx2RLkEIo%3D)
**How can social media claim to be for “tolerance and equality” when the Taliban are still the very people you’ve seen on the news persecuting, murdering, and destroying the lives of Christians, women, and anyone else their terrorist ideology deems to be inferior.**

[**HELP US FIGHT TO END SOCIAL MEDIA CENSORSHIP OF CONSERVATIVES**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e83dca199984b188870d48f2b9fcb30&_e=gsLsiwRgWqS8t8qRbhpE1F0yR_z6A2rVR-m2dNiiMFXh8wl0GmkpzaP1rYt1MyJoyIk77QlXzJFoMtsCiM9WI-dVgp1Ox8LWDDdOB332-492w2q1b3eXoXidci58F0weP9aCtDX-oGkzNdcStXFFoe-TUIk9fQrA7Kt2TXyPgLhJgsQ046egz-9ygJEeRy2ODocTmaH3bmbiqVQk2JMFDiIs1-XBMYMM52vG7DX_tObIJvioel73JcNVU0LaWQP99LScCewyYxCg5eZDqndwuTwdsrOCUvWJW3ZwJRG3MMrYpdeZL5lFJAmJYElsoNe97YD2xqxObh-UTSZ-0YgCi2EH4Stici3nVvaDUB0LM6-PVefg0P3ZjOOqFOVgehzM9SN3eHye2LD1wOsn0LniXSdga85viUoVFXz4YbWDg2Y%3D)
If social media allows terrorists on their platforms, but not the 45th President of the United States, then Congress must act. I’m running to be the next Senator from Colorado because hypocrisy and censorship like this cannot be allowed in our society.

**I know for a fact that I didn’t get shot at by terrorists in Afghanistan, just to come home and see American companies steal Donald Trump’s Freedom of Speech, and then give it to the Taliban. If this sickens you like it does for me,** [**then please help me take back Colorado and win us back the Senate Majority.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e83dca199984b188870d48f2b9fcb30&_e=gsLsiwRgWqS8t8qRbhpE1F0yR_z6A2rVR-m2dNiiMFXh8wl0GmkpzaP1rYt1MyJoyIk77QlXzJFoMtsCiM9WI-dVgp1Ox8LWDDdOB332-492w2q1b3eXoXidci58F0weP9aCtDX-oGkzNdcStXFFoe-TUIk9fQrA7Kt2TXyPgLhJgsQ046egz-9ygJEeRy2ODocTmaH3bmbiqVQk2JMFDpfi6zWLS58B4ONKnIOWLO2Grwm8bnIRuhkVcpbvLDXPWrSqCfk2peU_PrBGpNP55zvXRNxMzhuZo3KTOEDZF7zckMawApBm7t8wWKxIE1l2xAoL5CK5UirlX1XMdeMUkbkhvc7KM_HaJxEdfHh8nHbcoGWVfotYKpNvmZhqOu0fnawfa3P7YEBbZO--xOMUW_KgvUkOoJ44sCvZu0tiB3M%3D)

How can social media claim to be for “tolerance and equality” when the Taliban are still the very people you’ve seen on the news persecuting, murdering, and destroying the lives of Christians, women, and anyone else their terrorist ideology deems to be inferior. name: Patrick Leahy
subject: A personal note from Senator Leahy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Green Mountain PAC,
body:
I am humbled and gratified.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) Dear Friend, When I first announced my candidacy for the United States Senate, I chose to do so in the Vermont State House right across the street from where I grew up in Montpelier. It was an improbable race for a 34-year-old prosecutor from a state that had never elected a Democrat to the United States Senate. Today, Marcelle and I returned to that same room to announce I will not seek reelection next year. I am humbled by the faith my fellow Vermonters have placed in me and gratified by the work I have done on their behalf. From conserving lands and cleaning up our waterways to creating the national organic standards and farm to school lunch programs, I have always sought to bring Vermont's voice to the Senate. I fulfilled my obligation to preserve and protect the Constitution. I have been a staunch defender of civil liberties, the First Amendment, and the free flow of information from the government to its citizens. I brought Vermont values to the fight to ban landmines, which led to the Leahy War Victims Fund to aid those harmed by these indiscriminate killers; to the Leahy Law that bans aid to foreign governments that engage in human rights abuses; and to diplomatic efforts in Vietnam and Cuba. I have been blessed to share this journey with my children and grandchildren and the love of my life, Marcelle. And I have been blessed to have supporters like you to help me along the way. I am forever grateful for your support. I look forward to the work ahead, starting today with the signing of the infrastructure bill by President Biden. We will pass the Build Back Better Act and appropriations bills. And until my final day in office, I will continue to work with President Biden and any willing Republicans to help our nation grow stronger in the aftermath of this pandemic. I will also continue to work tirelessly in support of Democratic candidates. **[To that end, you can help me by making a contribution here to support Democratic candidates in 2022.](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)** _If you 've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ | | [**$10 »**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/D_zeSGNqqEM2/blZuMUYwbytYRHVaL3FESmhrdS9zQ1YwVUlieEFrQk5XTFpaUWJXaGl3UXpIQXFoU08reUw1QUN1OVI1cVg2ai96S1ZWa1E5aGxxdFlTN0JyOEp0QWI0ZTcwN3NpZTNOZEw3YzkrdmtSNVE9S0/SXFtVUtzeERtcy9uUnFWVEViS1NlS2FKZTRLNk4raXRpenFDT0xuV1MzMEczSFhEZHQwaHBxWDEwZzh0K01kZnA3VjFRc1JHK01jQU9WWHBaaGJhN2xBMWtPSmNBL3BLS0)

is just one of Biden’s transgressions against America | Fellow patriot

Biden has been in office for nearly 300 days, and we thought it would be important to check in on his administration.

But Friend, **WARNING:** things are looking pretty grim.

In 10 months, Biden has:
* Embarrassed our country on the world stage in Afghanistan
* Fallen asleep at the COP26 Climate Convention
* Created a crisis at our southern border by abandoning Trump era policies
* Promised billions to illegal immigrants
* Driven inflation through the roof: Bidenflation
* And there’s lots more

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: On the verge of a historic vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, what we’re building is really incredible.
As I’ve led the charge in Congress to deliver for working people, families, and our communities, you’ve been right there with me every step of the way. We’ve only been able to mount our fight against corporate America because of grassroots support.
This is the week that we will pass popular progressive policies for the people — like universal pre-K, paid family and medical leave, Medicare expansion, action to address climate change, affordable housing, childcare, and much more. All because we’ve been in this together, Peter.
**[**Right now, our team is working hard to reach our 2,000 contribution goal by midnight tonight. We only need 112 more contributions in the next few hours to hit our fundraising goal and stay on track for our progressive fight. Can you chip in $3 right now to help us deliver the Build Back Better Act for the people?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8673?refcode=em20211115-805&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=805%2E420207%2EHZ0mup)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8673?refcode=em20211115-805&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=805%2E420207%2EHZ0mup)**
We must step back and acknowledge how hard we fought to be on the verge of a historic vote for the Build Back Better this week — which includes Medicare expansion, action on climate change, lower prescription drug costs, paid leave, child care, universal pre-K, and much more. We’ve been up against powerful interests — from Wall Street and Big Oil to Big Pharma — yet we’re still so close to raising corporate taxes, lowering costs for families, and delivering for the people.
Thousands of you have stepped up during this fight to chip in $10, $27, or whatever you could afford to help fuel our work for progressive change. Today, I’m hoping you’ll step up one more time during a big week.
**[Can you make your first $3 donation to support my continued fight for progressive policies in the Build Back Better Act? We’re just 112 contributions shy of our midnight goal.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8673?refcode=em20211115-805&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=805%2E420207%2EHZ0mup)**
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8673?refcode=em20211115-805&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=805%2E420207%2EHZ0mup)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211115-805-footer&t=23&refcode2=805_420207_HZ0mup&akid=805%2E420207%2EHZ0mup)**

name: Inflation Update
subject: What the Biden administration’s been up to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Who is running the country? Biden, Kamala, Mayor Pete? No one seems to be at their office. | Fellow patriot

Biden has been in office for nearly 300 days, and we thought it would be important to check in on his administration.

But Friend, **WARNING:** things are looking pretty grim.

In 10 months, Biden has:
* Embarrassed our country on the world stage in Afghanistan
* Fallen asleep at the COP26 Climate Convention
* Created a crisis at our southern border by abandoning Trump era policies
* Promised billions to illegal immigrants
* Driven inflation through the roof: Bidenflation
* And there’s lots more

clean_body: Who is running the country? Biden, Kamala, Mayor Pete? No one seems to be at their office. | Fellow patriot Biden has been in office for nearly 300 days, and we thought it would be important to check in on his administration. But Friend, WARNING: things are looking pretty grim. In 10 months, Biden has: Embarrassed our country on the world stage in Afghanistan Fallen asleep at the COP26 Climate Convention Created a crisis at our southern border by abandoning Trump era policies Promised billions to illegal immigrants Driven inflation through the roof: Bidenflation And there’s lots more This administration is failing at every turn. Whether it’s from an economic standpoint with their Bidenflation or wanting to give illegal immigrants more benefits than we give to our brave veterans, the Biden administration has made it clear: America LAST. Even the people who HATED Trump are now wishing that he was President again and it’s showing in Biden’s approval ratings. Biden and Pelosi are set on pleasing the most progressive faction of the Democrat party but what they don’t realize, is they’re now in the minority. Our government should put America FIRST, always and forever. If Biden was on board with that, he wouldn’t have repealed dozens of Trump era policies that did just that and now, our country is suffering the consequences. RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points. The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties. whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years. name: Nina Turner
subject: TAKE ACTION: Sign now to help The Squad hold the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
URGENT: Build Back Better vote expected this week
#

Friends,

People do not realize that the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill (BIF), which passed early this month, was negotiated by moderate-leaning senators of both parties.

In other words, “bipartisan” means that it is a watered down version — not inline with the bold agenda that the progressive movement is hoping to achieve.

That’s why progressive lawmakers agreed that they would only vote to pass BIF if it was included as part of a farther-reaching, more ambitious bill — the Build Back Better Act (BBB).

BBB is paid for with a minimum tax on all corporations and increased taxes on ultra-wealthy Americans. It includes efforts that directly benefit working-class families like lowering of drug costs, universal preschool, four weeks of paid and family medical leave, over $550 billion in climate action, and more.

The Squad knows how impactful the BBB is to lifting up the poor, working poor, and barely middle class. They stood true to their word and voted against BIF when it was passed without BBB. They held the line against mediocrity. They understood that we have the capacity to give our best. The American people deserve no less.

But now that BIF has successfully passed by itself, progressives are relying on the word of five moderate Democrats who pledged in a letter that they would commit to voting for Build Back Better **_no later than this week, the week of November 15._**

Now is a time to take urgent action together and hold the line with The Squad and other like-minded individuals. **We need 6,000 signatures on our petition in the next 48 hours to show Congress the strong public demand to pass Build Back Better immediately. [Add your name to the petition now to show your support >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38665929/316516902/599830049?ms=211115_PT_squadbbbvote-email&refcode=211115_PT_squadbbbvote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzY2NDkwZC04NzQ2LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZoX1FD9CY8lj_gAZR07D9CY_QPGsaol6-oMrvYZmMCY=&emci=487e647b-4146-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d766490d-8746-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12102799)**

subject: Wouldn't be reaching out if it weren't important

body:
I'm sorry to email you so late, Peter, but I wouldn't be sending this message if it weren't important.

Right now, I'm fighting for key investments that will make health care and child care more affordable, protect our environment, and support our local economies. **I won 't stop until Congress has secured the investments hardworking Americans deserve, but I'm counting on grassroots support from donors like you to keep this campaign going.**

My finance team just let me know that we are only 36 donations away from our 300 grassroots donor goal. This is huge, and I'm hoping I can count on you to help us cross the finish line.

**[Will you rush a donation of $5, or whatever you're able, before midnight? Help us meet our mid-month fundraising goal to help me keep fighting for progress in the House.](https://act.myngp.com/el/80R8OdBsD8Rtv0Ik62vWwGKy7HY-QMr9PcL5qN5efaI=/yJMr3luvgRmIC0fb2SqGAcDNMYSt8bOSqhrp5gvBgTY=?refcode=em21_211115_mm2_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211115_mm2_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

name: Team AOC
subject: We need one more person from your community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Whether or not we hit this goal will impact our campaign’s budget moving forward, and we can’t afford to fall short.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211115-2647-header&t=1&akid=2647%2E2526796%2E5lRimt)
**Almost all of our campaign’s fundraising comes from small-dollar contributions to online ads and emails just like this one.**
And every month we set fundraising targets to ensure we have the resources to not only keep Alexandria in Congress, but to run national and on-the-ground organizing programs like our Green New Deal Deep Canvases, census outreach, organizing against fossil fuel plants in our communities, and much more.
**But in order to ensure we’re on track to hit our November targets, we need to hit 12,000 contributions by midnight tonight. And we’re still 941 contributions short. That’s why we’re emailing you today:**
We’ve done the math. If we can get one more contribution from the your area before midnight tonight, we’ll hit our 12,000 contributions goal before our mid-month deadline, and ensure we’re on track to hit our November targets.
[With just hours left before our midnight deadline, will you be the person from your area we need to chip in $3 — or anything you can — to help us get to the 941 contributions we need to hit our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211115?refcode=em20211115-2647-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2647_2526796_5lRimt&akid=2647%2E2526796%2E5lRimt)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211115?refcode=em20211115-2647-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2647_2526796_5lRimt&akid=2647%2E2526796%2E5lRimt)**
Alexandria is using her voice in Congress to fight for solutions that are big enough to match the crises we face, reshape our economy, minimize inequality, and reverse the effects of climate change.
However, that work has made her a frequent target of attacks from the right, including from her own colleagues in Congress. Just last week, a Republican Congressman incited violence against her through a Twitter post. They’ve stooped this low, because they know the power behind this movement — the power each of us wields together — has and will continue to reshape politics in Washington for real, progressive change.
Our campaign is 100% people-funded, and every contribution to emails like this one — $5, $10, and $20 at a time — truly adds up to compete against the powerful and corrupting influence of big money in our politics.
Whether or not we hit this goal will impact our campaign’s budget moving forward, and we can’t afford to fall short — [Will you be one of the people we need from your community to help close our 941 contributions gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211115?refcode=em20211115-2647-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2647_2526796_5lRimt&akid=2647%2E2526796%2E5lRimt)
**Every donation helps us reach our mid-month goal and keep Alexandria in Congress fighting for the better future our communities deserve.**
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211115?refcode=em20211115-2647-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=23&refcode2=2647_2526796_5lRimt&akid=2647%2E2526796%2E5lRimt)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211115-2647-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=24&akid=2647%2E2526796%2E5lRimt)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2647%2E2526796%2E5lRimt) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2647%2E2526796%2E5lRimt) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2647%2E2526796%2E5lRimt)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2647%2E2526796%2E5lRimt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2647%2E2526796%2E5lRimt)

| | | **BREAKING:** Joe Biden just OFFICIALLY signed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act into law! This is a HUGE accomplishment, and he got this landmark legislation passed _in his very first year in office!_

**This infrastructure law** dedicates hundreds of billions of dollars to repair our roads, bridges, and highways; revitalizes America’s rail system; promotes clean energy and clean water; and so much more -- all while it **_creates millions of jobs all over America._**

body:
It's definitely not being taught in schools. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=16c3f7dea26846d79a12b686ad9ef8b9&_e=cYqXD1k7EXoqpt03WzGj6bQ8-JoUhouJv9Mm7b75TYISBC_Lqk-7mmv03ne_jt-onaIQ9om2TnJloQJX3xqVr_ir0R19ruqR4jrYSfdu3sPAmGS-r0Vt7G7LOfC627Q55asl1wd8o-LXDDbroQixb9_eaj4HeMGyN-VKlm0Ac6I6Z5UtEc1TGw1ayHfbLjwXO5MnQzzwhHlzjR-6mLOj4YD2_C2QuSMCxq4atFhLCLYK5zsfUevmCgJXoyIdf7Xv8txnAqrqvLKwJeAKqG-oN_i5WxqS9keajewroAeOGp5LMtq-jMyWcoK4fRQUOg9yhhhyY0n3IThUdC7fbuJDXZSk-_584joVZEjbkKLQNuEtUpgokbu6DlGwY49eSvqssbfqlr6a7PrkKeFgA1QtlwEzXiAv7mX0vEhP2DWUXoC76HGwELOmC97CaKzmmZGq)

Peter,

The Left lost their minds last Tuesday. After months of gaslighting Virginians about what is going on in their schools and telling them that they shouldn't have any input into what their children are learning, **they lost the Virginia governors race.**

CNN and MSNBC can't stop; they keep saying a Republican only won in Virginia because the voters are racist.

Glenn Youngkin won because of Democrats' insane rhetoric. Parents don't want that radical race ideology in their schools. [**They made that clear in Virginia, and we'll make it clear in Arizona in 2022.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=16c3f7dea26846d79a12b686ad9ef8b9&_e=cYqXD1k7EXoqpt03WzGj6bQ8-JoUhouJv9Mm7b75TYISBC_Lqk-7mmv03ne_jt-onaIQ9om2TnJloQJX3xqVr_ir0R19ruqR4jrYSfdu3sPAmGS-r0Vt7G7LOfC627Q55asl1wd8o-LXDDbroQixb9_eaj4HeMGyN-VKlm0Ac6I6Z5UtEc1TGw1ayHfbLjwXO5MnQzzwhHlzjR-6mLOj4YD2_C2QuSMCxq4atFhLCLY-OcARZw9mvEng7p2vgEhNQ4zheR0VhHsY-aEVTYn6demba7REvqfIc_xAlLj7oGvQ2a-pmPovmOcsZSfB50pRl5LS7lZb1hGqo_T5wX91YYvUy7jyNZUI9OBHtAhU71hc1QPkwbybmNOKc2XUTKOGIEjgOMHQKHnK--hB4SRreEzXzYQovx-RWXAgtKrgaIbi127LH-XCjvVif-J9F7Fd)

**Peter - you should have anxiety about what schools are teaching kids.** We know that their curriculum is full of lesson plans teaching kids that some races or genders are morally superior to others. _Parents saw it firsthand in 2020 when their kids were locked out of their classrooms and forced to do Zoom school._

With you by our side Peter - [**we're going to take back our country. We're going to stop woke teachers and schools from turning our kids into losers.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=16c3f7dea26846d79a12b686ad9ef8b9&_e=cYqXD1k7EXoqpt03WzGj6bQ8-JoUhouJv9Mm7b75TYISBC_Lqk-7mmv03ne_jt-onaIQ9om2TnJloQJX3xqVr_ir0R19ruqR4jrYSfdu3sPAmGS-r0Vt7G7LOfC627Q55asl1wd8o-LXDDbroQixb9_eaj4HeMGyN-VKlm0Ac6I6Z5UtEc1TGw1ayHfbLjwXO5MnQzzwhHlzjR-6mLOj4YD2_C2QuSMCxq4atFhLCLaHxpiMM3gfz0vX7wRe8SxmB1d8mu7YhEe33-AlBRf1iqCktJCevcLu8LoQehtyCOQBTzSctFMxHJNtcaZgxq-d0CoAZwr9rPCJxNOX2au9TSIahwAzuxb48C3vh2oeNWt78rpAZjT8KOjQQV_qjlZN1B2pxDLhH_ESXYMf61Hbhhj1-sZpxkZbHVREHK6mlI_2iSUzIaOoxo9Wb4DhHL-O)

[**Will you join my fight against critical race theory by making a $5, $10, or $25 contribution today?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=16c3f7dea26846d79a12b686ad9ef8b9&_e=cYqXD1k7EXoqpt03WzGj6bQ8-JoUhouJv9Mm7b75TYISBC_Lqk-7mmv03ne_jt-onaIQ9om2TnJloQJX3xqVr_ir0R19ruqR4jrYSfdu3sPAmGS-r0Vt7G7LOfC627Q55asl1wd8o-LXDDbroQixb9_eaj4HeMGyN-VKlm0Ac6I6Z5UtEc1TGw1ayHfbLjwXO5MnQzzwhHlzjR-6mLOj4YD2_C2QuSMCxq4atFhLCLZLaX0jCgaXvSD18gynRwYHVxgWuLjz0hYlIVmVI85zpqpLhd99J1u09A6V8esRpG86qhL0NOlQ9lTalVI6gVobYCSag5KaW3WroxZx4WX5TlWK93HiWtc_YFt52May-AVJWhBP8NMLFaq2mNnIvz02OMtJDDHiszCARl_g9IgSlShAgXRsXF89e4gOQqTFVbAtWrVv3rYtudGK9UPLiBeO)

body:
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e677ab95dd344e2906c25ce863806aa&_e=rx2prl5D-z5VVcoKfVAVKaNtct9fSoJYXRWV4bN1Ft9KeZP4DxFB0LdD0fC89lbFhlpFN9yiqx1ZqTSqSMVOJJQR_WEXFzIIwR2e9z3RA0Ew_yTlYi-Zt3cH5s6ILRtdePzv9pkglMxsbkhJu2_zS3h7xVzX6491FmL48w0tpg-xzDGyNQsVS-Pwp59jjihQ3_NQj2d8h0nbekBXkBXepU7TWt9vIBKDFsLODIsuf7VoUzBcaupdj3WAHjOpHJ4IA2sk0zkTityj1GD6IQrtasYb8FFEaYzKq1w_cod3EsOez6r_1L7Xn0gBcm_YxnsaK0h3z3FQkO1cPF8WDyeX4uEbokBBMss_OlR04ALm5NffLSA23xgt7H73-iKMRFkmtpD-KJumzygRdkd4P4CTGg%3D%3D)
Friend --
With an all-out assault on our liberties taking place daily, Florida needs someone on the front lines who is willing to get in the fight. That's why I need your help to win re-election as Governor of Florida.
We cannot rest a single day, or we risk yielding our freedom to Democrats who seek to impose government mandates far beyond anything we've seen before. COVID was only the beginning. Without strong fighters in the ring, the left will push the envelope even further.
**[JOIN ME IN MY FIGHT TO SECURE FLORIDA'S FUTURE](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e677ab95dd344e2906c25ce863806aa&_e=rx2prl5D-z5VVcoKfVAVKaNtct9fSoJYXRWV4bN1Ft9KeZP4DxFB0LdD0fC89lbFhlpFN9yiqx1ZqTSqSMVOJJQR_WEXFzIIwR2e9z3RA0Ew_yTlYi-Zt3cH5s6ILRtdePzv9pkglMxsbkhJu2_zS3h7xVzX6491FmL48w0tpg-xzDGyNQsVS-Pwp59jjihQkNK1TovBY1CSVMsHUORvtIY1Im33saIREJCMjU1apqFGMBU61FnBJv_Uzedy_BWhWEZB6BAcX3ShC1OxMzMzpZYA3PVpqU8tGepnKkPniKiiIlvQAJEvBPqa9KkZsu3oyXjdJn2mmDSkWaQUzFOUuvlxKNIMbf1mpdDPNZNcxefUuVNgAC5qsqWKIwKxHvmA68oYFQAGGlJq6JHYp64f_g%3D%3D "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/the-battle-isnt-over-ren")**
It's been my honor to stand up for Floridians in my time as Governor. I wake up every single day knowing what's on the line. My mission is to keep Florida free, and I'm proud to say we've done that. But Democrats never take a day off. They are constantly looking for ways to inject the government into our lives to gain more control over us.
I can guarantee you this: their attempts at government overreach will run into a brick wall as long as I'm Governor.
**[EXPRESS DONATE $36.50 NOW>>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e677ab95dd344e2906c25ce863806aa&_e=rx2prl5D-z5VVcoKfVAVKaNtct9fSoJYXRWV4bN1Ft9KeZP4DxFB0LdD0fC89lbFhlpFN9yiqx1ZqTSqSMVOJJQR_WEXFzIIwR2e9z3RA0Ew_yTlYi-Zt3cH5s6ILRtdePzv9pkglMxsbkhJu2_zS3h7xVzX6491FmL48w0tpg-xzDGyNQsVS-Pwp59jjihQ-QDpE4bkZbc47BnVNmaPtrKmW-WNZn9Cmd2hxpDhW_M4XCFh0T6tlcNVZt8mODc9kW4tpeIQhfE3mmnSysxG9gjUttJb9LQrKeiF4Fe7dX7RrFVNssel3BVDxSMQbtF7RkRMX3Leq83yLzTK8znuNX1MnPUSB2Z1OLIQUJKx8Wwmy0Ej-AMty-zX9_MMEJst2sqKERtQyI4TjzopE-dNkg%3D%3D "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/the-battle-isnt-over-ren")**
[**EXPRESS DONATE $365 NOW >>>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e677ab95dd344e2906c25ce863806aa&_e=rx2prl5D-z5VVcoKfVAVKaNtct9fSoJYXRWV4bN1Ft9KeZP4DxFB0LdD0fC89lbFhlpFN9yiqx1ZqTSqSMVOJJQR_WEXFzIIwR2e9z3RA0Ew_yTlYi-Zt3cH5s6ILRtdePzv9pkglMxsbkhJu2_zS3h7xVzX6491FmL48w0tpg-xzDGyNQsVS-Pwp59jjihQ0NxgZ_1v6KhrXFImzEtXmhHyrmFl4d44BZuBVmr7MdbsPixoJ2v5OOGldqMfhPn7NL4YBFmhrFxuMf-Hxvlgr2DA7O_KdnzVpdgXyK1lrEB3FPqNyv-uLPrrLnvsPynewfYc9BvkiRbqPD09Zmy5zDdZikm3RZpGCYFnfz5kILo_NvjFYyAPV418j6OaMj6igxq7m6zAv_dom73jFlst3A%3D%3D)
We have 365 days until we hold an election that will define the trajectory of our state. Do we want Florida to continue serving as the envy of America, or do we want to fall into the hands of Democrats injecting government into every aspect of our lives?
Now is not the time to get comfortable and rest on our laurels. Floridians deserve a fighter who will have their back and take on Democrats, corporate media, Big Tech, and everyone else who wants to strip away their rights. I have proven that I have the courage to lead.
**[If you want to be on the side of freedom, would you consider chipping in $36.50, or $365 to help me in this ensuing fight?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e677ab95dd344e2906c25ce863806aa&_e=rx2prl5D-z5VVcoKfVAVKaNtct9fSoJYXRWV4bN1Ft9KeZP4DxFB0LdD0fC89lbFhlpFN9yiqx1ZqTSqSMVOJJQR_WEXFzIIwR2e9z3RA0Ew_yTlYi-Zt3cH5s6ILRtdePzv9pkglMxsbkhJu2_zS3h7xVzX6491FmL48w0tpg-xzDGyNQsVS-Pwp59jjihQIlXFPooxdacyZNz7v_5-iZPxo4id4S7-u9Pp5VTy4qQYoQEyHTqmwHdRhKvwcPgAKn6bmmvGrhue_09Fz05huEr8xNN8mj96JCb-thdiW6utb-zK04_roLbDHJryitCPRRf59D46bpsX7inF6YY26dHRBRkaUkYNCw3GgEWC9w50SsISohOR_cS5XfzdrfjGYYr0txTp5yq5EgKXrQWGew%3D%3D)**
Together, we will continue to make Florida THE best state in the nation.
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

clean_body: This is how we win back America. | Peter, Last year, we proved that a dedicated network of grassroots conservatives can defeat a well-entrenched incumbent with the full backing of the D.C. Democrat establishment. And earlier this month, Republican Glenn Youngkin followed the same playbook to win a stunning upset in Virginia. When conservatives are engaged, we’re unstoppable. But the key to defeating the radical Left is staying vigilant. We have to hit every single one of our fundraising benchmarks so we have the resources we need to defend this MUST-WIN seat from Nancy Pelosi. Our path to victory in this critical race relies on your continued support, Peter. Unlike Pelosi and her DCCC, I don’t have a $106.5 million war chest at my disposal. I don’t have special interest groups pouring millions into my campaign. I’m powered by Americans like YOU who believe in me and the conservative values I stand for. Nancy Pelosi thinks we can’t sustain our enthusiasm after our huge win. Let’s prove her wrong by CRUSHING the first deadline since we FLIPPED Virginia. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

body:
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1caf2052ed34cf2a05b36a011290474&_e=24IAPGhISr5UQSDwjaUFc3nrIPvEKJGG6Mf8oaNhIKTDD-v7ARTu55bbVNvL4EafkxSvv4rquVpNSlvAgWPhh-YbhFWXzrBlE71o0caOZCHPLEM5APy6nXdhyyTPcM0x6hJQeHS_9nsTVLO3tncnUWeGNhV-e2oiDDaFF2orso58DSsAreZTHAZhlXwX7ffKvAdKY1J0PE7-4NukWvK3hXUPZk6y13Bq3sFsuosu5pmeFpSUQariF2BNhC9Zmnzy2X8NyPHT88seeDgKJ-H3fqls79KMJrSKVxdLcxKlrs017I8bgvCxX4RrTizPY1VdYsv4kCbwWnE35ZEEAJ9rhe4gQvYGzF_mSJilzkFlUlMNOk1-w3oiqGfei0soUwOaUjKMuF0Ym5puZuR1s88N7A%3D%3D)
Peter --
With an all-out assault on our liberties taking place daily, Florida needs someone on the front lines who is willing to get in the fight. That's why I need your help to win re-election as Governor of Florida.
We cannot rest a single day, or we risk yielding our freedom to Democrats who seek to impose government mandates far beyond anything we've seen before. COVID was only the beginning. Without strong fighters in the ring, the left will push the envelope even further.
**[JOIN ME IN MY FIGHT TO SECURE FLORIDA'S FUTURE](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1caf2052ed34cf2a05b36a011290474&_e=24IAPGhISr5UQSDwjaUFc3nrIPvEKJGG6Mf8oaNhIKTDD-v7ARTu55bbVNvL4EafkxSvv4rquVpNSlvAgWPhh-YbhFWXzrBlE71o0caOZCHPLEM5APy6nXdhyyTPcM0x6hJQeHS_9nsTVLO3tncnUWeGNhV-e2oiDDaFF2orso58DSsAreZTHAZhlXwX7ffKwrG3y5auq52Yvj02XCt9EWQk4Yb3MqV7OtT-FOuEI_l3dKYRCyg7KOaVwt6Rv03jodxpaRvvd3C3C1Yt1oyjDipZiDX60QiTvxRbf8nwmNiebQRruZok0RbYoqRBYrLv_SmF_MLKRJElqZL1d1rF2kFqYl8OG44aCb_909dqAiowiAJOvdgGUrhVVkwwPESaU4EVIoC3m8coY8fLAa03Zw%3D%3D "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/the-battle-isnt-over-ren")**
It's been my honor to stand up for Floridians in my time as Governor. I wake up every single day knowing what's on the line. My mission is to keep Florida free, and I'm proud to say we've done that. But Democrats never take a day off. They are constantly looking for ways to inject the government into our lives to gain more control over us.
I can guarantee you this: their attempts at government overreach will run into a brick wall as long as I'm Governor.
**[EXPRESS DONATE $36.50 NOW>>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1caf2052ed34cf2a05b36a011290474&_e=24IAPGhISr5UQSDwjaUFc3nrIPvEKJGG6Mf8oaNhIKTDD-v7ARTu55bbVNvL4EafkxSvv4rquVpNSlvAgWPhh-YbhFWXzrBlE71o0caOZCHPLEM5APy6nXdhyyTPcM0x6hJQeHS_9nsTVLO3tncnUWeGNhV-e2oiDDaFF2orso58DSsAreZTHAZhlXwX7ffKMIX4TV02ncGbd0NxCSY19xY2pJ1OzADklw-_zClFeFFrdGAvDBEpxiBL8AWayO9XqjkcIS8TyszbaeHkyVTw5ZnPat_H-Rpe_d48OS5e2-vZhWhh50B8Jyd2upLDzA3DIXF0yuL4_icvgtbQQkKjZzfK9E_mxRjZ1Q-Xkj72BZ8RAtClKzu8xxbshKwluGGxioEn8kx96yS9LucBrW_0AA%3D%3D "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/the-battle-isnt-over-ren")**
[**EXPRESS DONATE $365 NOW >>>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1caf2052ed34cf2a05b36a011290474&_e=24IAPGhISr5UQSDwjaUFc3nrIPvEKJGG6Mf8oaNhIKTDD-v7ARTu55bbVNvL4EafkxSvv4rquVpNSlvAgWPhh-YbhFWXzrBlE71o0caOZCHPLEM5APy6nXdhyyTPcM0x6hJQeHS_9nsTVLO3tncnUWeGNhV-e2oiDDaFF2orso58DSsAreZTHAZhlXwX7ffKmp7iqJxK81xr68wUGEVR7wu5IZRp8uJ4tOzjVtv7bgP790k1El_9EjXtN0zH4ot0axDkJb79ArEUhmMxPRtP36_D22QDy1Y1tlGAeqoe4O6HgU9hi4LAUrz2kY1C8P3c6I2hgV_dRqPrRgS0GWbymLxvH2iqblrJvd3N25y1aXN0vjVunkI_qTFjXkXDwjU5w9xv3RPKcjw7wURca5bENQ%3D%3D)
We have 365 days until we hold an election that will define the trajectory of our state. Do we want Florida to continue serving as the envy of America, or do we want to fall into the hands of Democrats injecting government into every aspect of our lives?
Now is not the time to get comfortable and rest on our laurels. Floridians deserve a fighter who will have their back and take on Democrats, corporate media, Big Tech, and everyone else who wants to strip away their rights. I have proven that I have the courage to lead.
**[If you want to be on the side of freedom, would you consider chipping in $36.50, or $365 to help me in this ensuing fight?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1caf2052ed34cf2a05b36a011290474&_e=24IAPGhISr5UQSDwjaUFc3nrIPvEKJGG6Mf8oaNhIKTDD-v7ARTu55bbVNvL4EafkxSvv4rquVpNSlvAgWPhh-YbhFWXzrBlE71o0caOZCHPLEM5APy6nXdhyyTPcM0x6hJQeHS_9nsTVLO3tncnUWeGNhV-e2oiDDaFF2orso58DSsAreZTHAZhlXwX7ffK2GafGJq6lpMUzqLMoLMZhTv0CVww6xq_hIXXn_FOdgbOLpRd6qvL8gmyFsdLxQLMLomWLqNhwilwtGwhwrHgOk_IrX2yC5Jk3qRb0gbEiG3DFvIHenYJFrLzV65Bke4f_G89-0gsv8NG2Xj5BCIVLeBeon8aXQHl2JNvV3yGbXwD4_7Nq7lUs0_Nzm6jm14xrGLsBfDH-5y-S-lMSFTYNQ%3D%3D)**
Together, we will continue to make Florida THE best state in the nation.
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

clean_body: Peter -- With an all-out assault on our liberties taking place daily, Florida needs someone on the front lines who is willing to get in the fight. That's why I need your help to win re-election as Governor of Florida. We cannot rest a single day, or we risk yielding our freedom to Democrats who seek to impose government mandates far beyond anything we've seen before. COVID was only the beginning. Without strong fighters in the ring, the left will push the envelope even further. "" It's been my honor to stand up for Floridians in my time as Governor. I wake up every single day knowing what's on the line. My mission is to keep Florida free, and I'm proud to say we've done that. But Democrats never take a day off. They are constantly looking for ways to inject the government into our lives to gain more control over us. I can guarantee you this: their attempts at government overreach will run into a brick wall as long as I'm Governor. "" We have 365 days until we hold an election that will define the trajectory of our state. Do we want Florida to continue serving as the envy of America, or do we want to fall into the hands of Democrats injecting government into every aspect of our lives? Now is not the time to get comfortable and rest on our laurels. Floridians deserve a fighter who will have their back and take on Democrats, corporate media, Big Tech, and everyone else who wants to strip away their rights. I have proven that I have the courage to lead. Together, we will continue to make Florida THE best state in the nation. Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "DONATE NOW" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 610 S. Boulevard, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .
