Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump November 15th, 2021 Endorsement of Congressman Matt Rosendale Congressman Matt Rosendale is an America First Patriot who loves our Country and the beautiful State of Montana. He won big in 2020, after my Endorsement, and he will do it again in 2022 with this even stronger Endorsement. Matt has strongly defended the Second Amendment, fought for Election Integrity, believes in strong Borders, Law Enforcement, a strong Military, and supports our great Veterans. He has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump November 15th, 2021 Endorsement of Congressman Alex Mooney Representative Alex Mooney has done an outstanding job as Congressman in West Virginia. In fact, he recently opposed the horrendous Biden Administration’s “Non-Infrastructure” plan, and he opposed the January 6th Committee, also known as the Unselect Committee of partisan hacks and degenerates. Alex has been strong on Crime, Borders, our great Military, and a champion for our Veterans. He will always protect our Second Amendment, and of particular importance is the fact that Alex fights for energy and beautiful clean coal—and he will never stop. Congressman Alex Mooney has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump November 15th, 2021 ICYMI: “Rep. Adam Schiff: ‘I don’t regret’ hyping discredited Steele dossier” Schiff now admits that he knew the Dossier was fake. He should be admonished or impeached along with the other scoundrels that also knew! Read the full article by Jessica Chasmar with Fox News . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump November 15th, 2021 Heard that Alyssa Farah was terrible on The View —they could have asked the people who know her and saved a lot of time. She was a “backbencher” in the White House, and is now a nobody again. We put her out there to face the public as little as possible. It’s amazing how these people leave with respect and adoration for me and others in the White House, but as soon as CNN or other cameras get shoved in their face, or the losers from the The View ask a question, or money gets thrown at them, or someone writes a fake book, inglorious lightweights like Farah change so quickly. I watched this clown on television saying exactly what they wanted her to say and I watched the lies. Was she paid by low-ratings CNN? By the way, as soon as the Crime of the Century happened on November 3rd, I knew the Election was Rigged and Stolen, and never changed my view on that one bit. I did not go soft on the “Real” Big Lie, the Election Scam, and never will. Backbencher said I told her I lost the Election—never did. I virtually never even spoke to Farah (it’s like she didn’t even exist in the White House). Anybody who ever says that I thought the Election was legit, even for a moment, is wrong. All you have to do is look at the thousands of pages of documents and evidence—which continues to mount. When we told Alyssa to “hit the road,” she wrote a very nice letter stating that working for “Trump” was “the honor of a lifetime” and she was “deeply proud of the incredible things we were able to accomplish to make our country stronger, safer, and more secure.” Show the rest of the letter Alyssa, and explain why you wrote it! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump November 15th, 2021 Endorsement of Mike Detmer Michigan State Senators sold out the PEOPLE by refusing a Forensic Audit, and by praising losers like Ed McBroom. McBroom “investigated” voter fraud, and the only people he wanted to do harm to were the whistleblowers. A thousand affidavits were filed witnessing voter fraud, Secretary of State Benson clearly sent out illegal mailings, Zuckerberg spent millions of dollars setting up vote fraud boxes in Detroit, but these RINOs only got angry at the people telling the truth. Senator Lana Theis was McBroom’s deputy for his trash report and agreed with everything McBroom did. Lana Theis refuses to support a Forensic Audit and refuses to admit there was pervasive Voter Fraud in the 2020 Election. Think of it, nothing was found wrong in Detroit, one of the most corrupt cities in the U.S., whose elections over the years have been a joke. Theis is being challenged by an America First Patriot, Mike Detmer. Mike ran a tough campaign in 2020 for Congress, and performed very well. He’s running for the Michigan Senate, where he is sorely needed. Lana Theis forgot she’s a Republican, but Mike Detmer is an America First fighter who will do great things for Michigan. I completely Endorse Mike Detmer for the Michigan Senate. Help Mike win! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump November 15th, 2021 Endorsement of Rachelle Smit Michigan needs a new legislature. The cowards there now are too spineless to investigate Election Fraud. They refuse to conduct a Forensic Audit but now, thankfully, an amazing woman is running for State Representative. Rachelle Smit is a twice-elected clerk who knows our Elections are not secure, and that there was rampant Voter Fraud in the 2020 Presidential Election. She and her husband beat cancer twice, and she’s about to go beat the Deep State swamp in Lansing. Rachelle is a success, she’s a winner, and I wholeheartedly Endorse her for Michigan State Representative! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump November 15th, 2021 From Election Day, November 3rd, the day I realized that the 2020 Presidential Election was rigged, I would never have agreed to go to Joe Biden’s Inauguration. This decision was mine, and mine alone. The old broken-down Crow, Mitch McConnell, had nothing to do with it. According to third-rate reporter Jonathan Karl of ABC Fake News, McConnell unsuccessfully tried getting a letter signed by others for me not to go. This was nothing I ever heard of and actually, if he ever did get it signed, I probably would have held my nose and gone. The Election was rigged, the facts are clear, and Mitch McConnell did nothing. He was probably too busy working on deals with China for his wife and family! | ---|--- Donald J. With a law degree and a background in advanced analytics from my private sector career prior to joining the Trump Administration, I served as the conduit between the lawyers drafting the complaint and the data scientists crunching the numbers. clean_body: Dear Peter, I recently had the pleasure of sitting down with Revolver for an interview to talk about my race for Congress, election integrity, and the future of the Republican Party. "My role on Trump's legal team was to conduct the analysis of the millions of voter records cast in Georgia in the November 3rd election. With a law degree and a background in advanced analytics from my private sector career prior to joining the Trump Administration, I served as the conduit between the lawyers drafting the complaint and the data scientists crunching the numbers. What we found from relatively straightforward data analysis was shocking, and our findings ultimately underpinned the President’s official lawsuit in Georgia." Obviously, there are a lot of people in the Republican and Democratic establishments who don't want an outspoken conservative like me to win. Stories like this one only make them more determined oppose me. I'm relying on conservatives like you to help my campaign. If you are able, even $10, $25, or $50 goes a long way. Thank you, Patrick | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2021 Patrick Witt for Congress, All rights reserved.

Folks,

Just minutes ago, President Biden signed a historic infrastructure bill into law, and we know that Kevin McCarthy is already planning on how he would throw a wrench into that progress if he becomes Speaker of the House.

**We won’t let that happen.** We want this country to move forward into a bigger and brighter future, and we need leaders who are willing to put in the work and passion to make that happen, not political hacks like Kevin McCarthy. **[Help us defeat McCarthy by chipping in any amount now →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoJUmEIvv2tpr47ZCn3v2NNoNy8HyY-TYOLbzNuGHw-IlmOJa8NKZG5A4gQ3m0vcFyvUpnry0QVkU3Jp0Ir_g1XXXtv3Dt_5gvKSTt6yxGlXvM4Lr9-RQLG26B2aOVonQq38R5_bio_Xn8Wd2ycnICLvb6TeSVYZPV3YcUWpZc7uXRwuh02U23pYRFl7S-qLRfcsfGWc_NvGJEBsgRD_Bp6UJ74tVrsppEmurRB2PcdfNh4nOAOEW4oyBLhLRPttcnFHiRgUEESZ25e4vG_1ug59D9Ju-31tare6robvdLAs1dpflmIuGkqdXiR7rYZGuQ/3h1/PwEhV1NcSmGRntXyjC2KlA/h1/Wu9KI3J9Q8J19n9p3MkFwZhyJ-JVja9HK3XQeGw3IoE)**

clean_body: We cannot let Kevin McCarthy stop it. | | | Folks, Just minutes ago, President Biden signed a historic infrastructure bill into law, and we know that Kevin McCarthy is already planning on how he would throw a wrench into that progress if he becomes Speaker of the House. We won’t let that happen. We want this country to move forward into a bigger and brighter future, and we need leaders who are willing to put in the work and passion to make that happen, not political hacks like Kevin McCarthy. Bruno is willing to fight for CA-23. He’s working hard to make healthcare accessible to everyone, not just the wealthy, and fight for the protection of unions. Unlike Kevin McCarthy, Bruno is interested in the needs of the people. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. Thank you! Bruno Amato for Congress | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

clean_body: | | Hi friends, November has been packed full of events, forums, interviews, and so much more - and we're only halfway through the month! With so much going on, we want to make sure you don't miss a beat. So make sure to follow Doug on , , and and if you're able, consider making a to support our campaign. If you're not up-to-date, check out our ICYMI recap below! Thank you, Jay Satterfield In Case You Missed It Doug was proud to support the Invisible Hand Foundation at a recent event. They're an incredible organization that anonymously helps financially distressed and underprivileged Marylanders with basic needs like housing, medical care, transportation, and clothing. | Then, he was interviewed on Fox45 about his record of fighting crime and delivering on criminal justice, stating: "crime disproportionately affects people of color and underserved communities," and, "we need to give people a pathway to be productive citizens." | Just before Veterans Day, Doug took a small break from the campaign trail to pay respects at the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier and participate in some of the commemorations for the Tomb's Centennial. | Doug also joined a candidate's forum hosted by the Maryland Latino Caucus of the General Assembly. Maryland Matters covered his comments on addressing lower vaccination rates within the Latino community, ensuring language access in schools, and achieving at least 12% Latino representation in his office as Governor. | On Veterans Day, Doug attended a parade and memorial services in St. Mary's County to honor our brave veterans. | | | | | | That same day, Doug's "Green Maryland" plan to protect our state's precious environment was covered by Josh Kurtz of Maryland Matters. | Finally, Doug and Mayor Nathan Brown started a great day with coffee at Beans in the Belfry in Brunswick, Maryland, where they discussed the limitless potential of Brunswick as a haven for cyclists and outdoor activity aficionados. | By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. From: Sarah
Subject: quick question for you_
Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: We have to fight back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again... Joe Biden’s COVID mandates are illegal and unconstitutional. That’s why I’m taking him to court over his fe Friend, I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again... Joe Biden’s COVID mandates are illegal and unconstitutional. That’s why I’m taking him to court over his federal contractor mandate, the OSHA mandate for private employers, and the CMS mandate for health care providers. No worker should be fired from their job for declining to follow the Biden administration’s ILLEGAL mandate to take the vaccine. It’s gross federal overreach that will cost tens of thousands of Kansans their livelihoods if we don’t fight back. [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=d14920aaa1f74f76b9390bd887401529&_e=kh2WxrzdeKAsAqqTsxZkqoOvtvJm8LfsQeHHQJe_LgpYhAt57COTafHEBvQ-TqjZ2gvP1DbYeaWL-epPamKAxJC790cNb9VPPXe2pzjyzqk4PeWYA23-77JUsZme9QWfNARnhc88-sNtpUSvy_kiQwFkcI_e-iNLiqWZbzUllhVHU3kmPli6IbhPIEmwIb0meeX2YxmI_HgYBs3TMpOKfSIHGFs1FBep7so98nDKwmthqJyrC3UyvXyFlvfpBeeKocwoCkR61uwRRlzI8sI4hd1ApPHsOEo0J2D-5s1Gp8ce993tmmZJvfk5xevWpmdt75NxaG5FiWf02mLtGfSNhh5gGi4xA-XfZprk6lM-Kkjh-eLazwy-B34RAcNy2Q1w8KuR6zUxZJmxlCJJNiBySNtHUVz6qN8bs1Mlpa65pgm1l85n5dM1Pe3OYzWMbb_bkjuCtBT8B_wUxbwKGaT2O-HWoBQf5EGro5ZqJe95cBZv8TCW9IKoDb4EFmLpL4eT) [**CHIP IN $25**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=d14920aaa1f74f76b9390bd887401529&_e=kh2WxrzdeKAsAqqTsxZkqoOvtvJm8LfsQeHHQJe_LgpYhAt57COTafHEBvQ-TqjZ2gvP1DbYeaWL-epPamKAxJC790cNb9VPPXe2pzjyzqk4PeWYA23-77JUsZme9QWfNARnhc88-sNtpUSvy_kiQwFkcI_e-iNLiqWZbzUllhVHU3kmPli6IbhPIEmwIb0meeX2YxmI_HgYBs3TMpOKfSIHGFs1FBep7so98nDKwmthqJyrC3UyvXyFlvfpBeeKocwoCkR61uwRRlzI8sI4hd1ApPHsOEo0J2D-5s1Gp8dD6eusbi1uD8gbFYz0_k0Z8pJtksupjiAPqS2YsF9kZqfWZ3VbFxE_BnztePs-dgmfSZil_nRSHDWcea27FF499-N0aAIy8A-46yPOMDquuUbCjUY6m5rQIeSESkYVIeym3u03gXdrXDArrBgKI0SaXP4uRnGPdWULsf8lC5pfVrMW89AhyAM9AiAgviMbpCPBqvHfbDu7Rrmk0FnFgRvB) I’ve been fighting these mandates ever since they were announced. Less than two days after Republicans won a massive upset victory in Virginia, Laura Kelly weakly announced she is now skeptical of the mandates. 🤔 Kansans are smart, and can tell that the Governor's half-hearted words are nothing but a political ploy to save her job. I’m actually in court leading the fight to STOP the Biden mandates and protect individual liberty. **[Join my team if you agree we need actions, not just empty words.](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=d14920aaa1f74f76b9390bd887401529&_e=kh2WxrzdeKAsAqqTsxZkqoOvtvJm8LfsQeHHQJe_LgpYhAt57COTafHEBvQ-TqjZ2gvP1DbYeaWL-epPamKAxJC790cNb9VPPXe2pzjyzqk4PeWYA23-77JUsZme9QWfNARnhc88-sNtpUSvy_kiQwFkcI_e-iNLiqWZbzUllhVHU3kmPli6IbhPIEmwIb0meeX2YxmI_HgYBs3TMpOKfSIHGFs1FBep7so98nDKwmthqJyrC3UyvXyFlvfpBeeKocwoCkR61uwRRlzI8sI4hd1ApPHsOEo0J2D-5s1Gp8cnC7swtwdu1YFfjC43uExv1V772Jc4aNvzSadId3B4GpIy3yKhYdB7uZgyFrO8ezu5PLx9xRaMJ7rdFkicdTUuRK3RCff8AVgaQNLeJfuITnUubzl7WdhE0xz36TViXkqKOHvndCx4KJKYRzz8QZaErnKTlSz6FJur61_D8xXSJxq-5MY2n1dbPIHYNrG-3WGx96koWQlLpTTd_5QzTer6)** Kansans need our help. They’re about to be faced with losing their livelihood because they disagree with Joe Biden on a medical decision. And if Laura Kelly has her way, they’re going to be DENIED unemployment benefits. It’s plain wrong. [**Will you help me fight back?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=d14920aaa1f74f76b9390bd887401529&_e=kh2WxrzdeKAsAqqTsxZkqoOvtvJm8LfsQeHHQJe_LgpYhAt57COTafHEBvQ-TqjZ2gvP1DbYeaWL-epPamKAxJC790cNb9VPPXe2pzjyzqk4PeWYA23-77JUsZme9QWfNARnhc88-sNtpUSvy_kiQwFkcI_e-iNLiqWZbzUllhVHU3kmPli6IbhPIEmwIb0meeX2YxmI_HgYBs3TMpOKfSIHGFs1FBep7so98nDKwmthqJyrC3UyvXyFlvfpBeeKocwoCkR61uwRRlzI8sI4hd1ApPHsOEo0J2D-5s1Gp8cduzGdrCJWVbH6W0ux6KELIQrBNV1DlesFNUFgFRH4F1Cci4MyhL6-O2F_vgg0H7NqiTSU_XHk6_nxIdX6Xh-azXpgqCn5hCYGzXo3l0YvNSY_Zb5nI7x1cQ4977eGZNYHyvP9-YUHZGjf4DVdthsDhgsjRVyhNngJR6DDNRp9U_omJEBhbTW_OJ6Eo9ZuYH6HLYr1rF2TzeQSLgjb647Y) –Derek Schmidt | |

body:
#

Friends -
Do you remember the day you made your first political campaign contribution?
Did you do it because you believed in the candidate?
Did you do it because control of the House, Senate, or White House was on the line?
Or did you do it for some other reason?
Today, we’re asking you to make your first contribution to Cheri Beasley’s Senate campaign. She is a proven leader who has spent her life fighting for North Carolina families. Control of the Senate is at stake. And with the quarter about halfway over ahead of the FEC fundraising deadline, Cheri needs you. So we’re asking:
**[Can you please make a contribution — $3 or whatever you can afford — to Cheri Beasley’s campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina? We would not ask if it were not so important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-nov21?refcode=em211115-1-full&refcode2=19.357359.od0OLN&t=1&akid=19%2E357359%2Eod0OLN)**

name: Morgan Harper
subject: Even in a blizzard!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
The only way we flip Ohio blue is to put in the work.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211115-395-footer-ak&t=2&akid=395%2E90090%2ExBm2z_)
The only way we flip Ohio blue is to put in the work, door by door, block by block. Because they may have money, but we have people.
This weekend we held our volunteer kickoff in Franklin County, and turnout was great — **even in a blizzard, Team Morganize is ready to show up and get out there into the community!**
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14407?t=3&akid=395%2E90090%2ExBm2z_)
**[Can you help fuel our efforts to organize volunteers across our state by chipping in $5 today?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14407?t=4&akid=395%2E90090%2ExBm2z_)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14413?refcode=em20211115-395&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=395%2E90090%2ExBm2z_)**
Our strategy is pretty straightforward: We’re going door by door, block by block, engaging people who for too long have been left behind.
**No matter the weather, this team is ready to do that work.** Other people say Ohio is a “red state,” but that couldn’t be farther from the truth. Our state is full of people who are tired of political corruption, and they see career politicians as only in it to enrich themselves and protect their friends.
That’s why I’m the only candidate who can flip Ohio blue — and with the amazing folks on Team Morganize on my side, I know we have a real shot.
**[If it makes sense for you right now, chip in $5 to help us expand our statewide organizing efforts.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14407?t=24&akid=395%2E90090%2ExBm2z_)**
Thank you for being on this team!
Morgan Harper
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14407?t=25&akid=395%2E90090%2ExBm2z_)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211115-395-footer&t=26&refcode2=395_90090_xBm2z_&akid=395%2E90090%2ExBm2z_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=395%2E90090%2ExBm2z_)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: President Trump Turns up Heat on AG Brnovich
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Catch the perps |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8554e5ff61&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Trump-endorsed Election Integrity Patriot running for Secretary of State in Arizona. I have been leading the Vanguard in America’s audit and [now it is time to take the next step.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9bb9032a9f&e=44b8c466b0)

**We found the fraud. Time to Act on it. It’s your turn to do YOUR job, Mark Brnovich.**

_And this is exactly the message which President Trump told America this week:_
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9575b0a9f3&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| In President Trump’s statement, he says:

_The great Patriots of Arizona are anxiously awaiting the Attorney General’s review of the large-scale Election Fraud that took place during the 2020 Presidential Election. The findings of the Forensic Audit Report were clear and conclusive. The results from the Congressional Election Integrity hearing that just took place in Washington, D.C., upon cross examination, were devastating to the other side. The Arizona Legislature (and other States!) should, at a minimum, decertify the Election. The American people deserve an answer, now!_

President Trump couldn’t be more right: We need an answer, now!

**The pressure which we have put on Brnovich thus far has caused him to take a crucial first step.**

_Just recently, he formally opened up an inquiry into the fraud that happened in the 2020 election._

**_But I stand by President Trump when I say this: If the perpetrators behind Arizona’s fraud do not end up in jail, then Mark Brnovich is as guilty as they are._**

_Help me and President Trump keep up the pressure on Arizona’s AG by a donation today! We need the warchest at this critical moment to go on the offense and make sure that Mark Brnovich doesn’t forget where he comes from!_
_“The Findings of the Forensic Audit Report were clear and conclusive.” – President Trump_
The audit showed fraud, and now it is Mark Brnovich’s job to prosecute. And the work will not be done until big names end up behind bars.

**This is the punishment for undermining America’s elections. Period.**

[And this is why I need your help. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=32bcf361af&e=44b8c466b0) For America to heal and for election integrity to be restored, exactly two things need to happen.

**For the first, we need punishment of past crimes. Otherwise, the Leftist thieves are INCENTIVIZED to keep stealing. **

_Second, we need a clear path forward. And to have this clear path forward, we need Secretary of States, especially in key states such as Arizona, that support Election Integrity and will stand up to fraud._

[This is where you come in. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9f3cec2eaf&e=44b8c466b0) We have ran a tremendous grassroots campaign bringing together patriots around the country. And the more attention on Election Integrity, the more the media, Big Tech, and the Leftist Establishment wants to stop us.

**_I need your help to bring Election Integrity to Arizona and to defend our elections. [Can you help me today so that I can help Republicans and President Trump in 2024?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=929bf6b04d&e=44b8c466b0)_**

My name is Mark Finchem. I am proud to be the Election Integrity, Trump endorsed candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona. We are all in this together. If you have already joined the Election Integrity movement, thank you and [please continue to support us, we need all the help we can get.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=60b6be63be&e=44b8c466b0)

**If you have been wondering about how to support the cause of Election Integrity, follow President Trump. He has supported our campaign and our fight for Election Integrity in Arizona. [Help us now so that I can fight for secure elections going forward – especially in 2024 – in Arizona!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1fd15a4903&e=44b8c466b0)**
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=69edca76a6&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=47cee7a789&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=627ed93d9b&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=7e86055cf0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=7e86055cf0).

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

One more thing: Devin Nunes is terrified of losing to us. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: Devin Nunes is vulnerable, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him.

Peter,

The Biden administration’s gross federal overreach has reached new heights.

With the latest OSHA vaccine mandate, the Democrats prove they will do ANYTHING to give the government more power.

This isn’t about public health; this is about personal power. If President Biden was serious about ending this pandemic, he would have instituted these mandates on day one of his presidency.

Instead, he has been grasping at straws for any way to control Americans.

When I’m Governor of Nevada, I won’t allow the federal government to dictate to Nevadans.

But I need to get there to do that.

**[Can you make a gift of any amount today to help fuel my campaign?](http://links.donatetodean.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=9c18222230824192ba6ff46d63c92e39&_e=cxg477YaN54rO_M-AIJTZ8o0tqE9sZA7e9jxHUYaXDu7760TwNwz2Iko-RgsV96vZ-xSnPt22p0MLwoumBouRCE0TXKYPwCCiTPgWV5o7pwwBVzSMlARjALHp0l1l7tSTu07yYQpXCVSO_R2kv-UQs4i3B1a_ZoYvA0lAWI_xmQx5jTocssdx1ztSPdbNlkf6rzPjWbKU-mF8NlyS_qbIhJXCgaNShXc3pmtUYJ73g00sHf1OzzEdbUtgCwjnBBNIA846kUvBUyLysOtTTDxedy1uQNHrm5_iwQMlHhPUa8TP1NUO2rTFtQ3V7hF9XN3dPVdJjIhyXa-rgUDm0givuG9JF9g0YbJPIrFe3kHp6WRQqj-FI1yRUoESxLjHAADpOOjl_-u2EHPGLZJULmk8kL6wqzPVDj2K_tuB0NCmcAaILUyfP7PcfdLlXfF9LvoRk56EQFarWKr60nafXEpt00YUVea2GTW9wKWMvoScAg%3D)**

The Left believes you should be dependent on the government.

I believe that the government should work for you. And as your Governor, you can consider me your #1 employee.

I’ll work hard for Nevadans, not try to control them.

I could use your help to get the job.

Make a quick donation to my campaign to keep us on the right track. **[https://secure.winred.com/heller-for-nevada/action-3205079/](http://links.donatetodean.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=9c18222230824192ba6ff46d63c92e39&_e=cxg477YaN54rO_M-AIJTZ8o0tqE9sZA7e9jxHUYaXDu7760TwNwz2Iko-RgsV96vZ-xSnPt22p0MLwoumBouRCE0TXKYPwCCiTPgWV5o7pwwBVzSMlARjALHp0l1l7tSTu07yYQpXCVSO_R2kv-UQs4i3B1a_ZoYvA0lAWI_xmQx5jTocssdx1ztSPdbNlkf6rzPjWbKU-mF8NlyS_qbIhJXCgaNShXc3pmtUYJ73g00sHf1OzzEdbUtgCwjnBBNIA846kUvBUyLysOtTTDxeWxjWjvs6zkVJr8DbUWzsZs7pbYDZuZHK3cuX5MZQRVegCNTdlQjn9ELZVJikGPg1Jo_7uwO8zQ3H_LXV3roTpdeNh1PBghwqDFnAesaRziwzSE2pNIGd8UIXZpTrx-gnN1UD7XnPJHTh49WoQ_haGAkokEz7_IAuxmK6_g7D99Yn3iW91SjdnqqVam8FwZ12RSyoZiMAuRZQM2iF8COs00%3D)**

Dean Heller

Hello,
Fundraising is the worst part of running for elected office. But if we’re going to go up against Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs and actually win, I need grassroots donors like you in this fight with me.
There are just 7 hours until the first mid-month deadline of our campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. **But with time running out, my team just let me know that we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**
I’m emailing to personally ask: [**Can I count on you to give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1kXvT_Q9tki0_GCcDtiDHFCiKFP7igMykCvahsh6EtHONv_9xAIqwE2UCr-omviwuv3a7DxRKyTwLkC-3Du4AIZb-ux9lE770tYUPB_PXTWYYg8yk3ZDxVCLAYCEJkd-6OWeXQ4OwRnEwbbGvJAok6UPnOV9NWY2H-p8k6kfOQ_9uaSkJgmJazhAezD3KKzxbf31-64po9xloOKkTwiE9qfIWtDzwgHqCXrFp8Dq1G3Oe9I4C-SQURiDNYQMocw63s6dwuyDtr-nVJ-s-bIaiMlba5DAOitjWlntXaJzKdi6l-7Vkif3gcknr9Q8Y7OPLvWCVTh3fmOvrp6qv6QdprxEcrLUkdWEmqXL9Kj4kP2g/3h1/VCf418drRJW57uv0bO-m2g/h1/hzwY_WbUSvL1lfkbrvvWkK46GQs9f-5XZQcWUj0T4FQ)
**The stakes could not be higher. Our campaign in Iowa will likely determine who controls the Senate for the next two years.** That means combatting the assault on democracy and voting rights, addressing the climate crisis, reining in Wall Street, and taking on Big Pharma... it’s all on the line.
The only way we’ll win, though, is if we hit every fundraising goal. **I’m not taking Corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you giving now.**
[**Please, will you make a donation to my campaign now – before our mid-month deadline at midnight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1kXvT_Q9tki0_GCcDtiDHFCiKFP7igMykCvahsh6EtHONv_9xAIqwE2UCr-omviwuv3a7DxRKyTwLkC-3Du4AIZb-ux9lE770tYUPB_PXTWZF1TGXYuXzs-rHM-6RJtwBwhxgyEr3hRxMZDz2Quz5iyaIXtzdnbgw9Jf93vdQ4syKKlMSnwFcSib7HKZeDgkttkOmS4jafu6RYfoZ5m7T1g1vabsdWK4Srr23cPLlMCTc6eaxGHG2J4cZ2c-eQHk1-gHILN2Le9L-vPV0ne5H_7Bs-L-QQO91C8LuvQ5k0OXAEqtdnySb5upaZs-a4nRNtyF1thiPNGmtjbSmSXcGop66hJP0BsEXfxJBNk3g5QQ/3h1/VCf418drRJW57uv0bO-m2g/h2/Tm6bxQbxbGYQLtzSxrb90HjpEN6ILyHm23HkLvRkWtk)
When we win next November, it’ll be because of donors like you chipping in what they can, when they can.
I’m so grateful for your support,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

clean_body: | | | | Hello, Fundraising is the worst part of running for elected office. But if we’re going to go up against Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs and actually win, I need grassroots donors like you in this fight with me. There are just 7 hours until the first mid-month deadline of our campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. But with time running out, my team just let me know that we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win and protect our Democratic Senate majority. I’m emailing to personally ask: The stakes could not be higher. Our campaign in Iowa will likely determine who controls the Senate for the next two years. That means combatting the assault on democracy and voting rights, addressing the climate crisis, reining in Wall Street, and taking on Big Pharma... it’s all on the line. The only way we’ll win, though, is if we hit every fundraising goal. I’m not taking Corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you giving now. When we win next November, it’ll be because of donors like you chipping in what they can, when they can. I’m so grateful for your support, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) | PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC. Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=644098e8b34e44b4851f435f024272b3&_e=GcBafjQnusEvwBhFaHh9ZumPgkUMTSWr76c9H1CgOfTy0m8oB0FLjVBRaz_Th0lKgRANue2nWQYpoZ_I2jaGFiI9Ew3DQfmuIf34MuzcSOIKTwxR7dzHoA-PC6FENSLpaSmhOIWoB27G4xP-eb5_xNx3jbAYxCWEknifGHzQpx9xCtxMqMx62RCTqt-TKNklg_4AFdGpR_kqpxVSZhsdzdeWAlHLipTtTSP0MHVROsMq56BZto2Pe4o4QuIRvROnabzCKHOfYN8qs1FB9O5CFAwwt1sAXqqoCRG9647x-1n9iclfM9m4oBtZGybZO92cfbxqlWre-f2FCtLcUU_fK422qzMEw_Awn5dmeTWKfM3-Njy0Xw1RZzMHb5k1K0m-)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=644098e8b34e44b4851f435f024272b3&_e=GcBafjQnusEvwBhFaHh9ZumPgkUMTSWr76c9H1CgOfTy0m8oB0FLjVBRaz_Th0lKgRANue2nWQYpoZ_I2jaGFiI9Ew3DQfmuIf34MuzcSOIKTwxR7dzHoA-PC6FENSLpaSmhOIWoB27G4xP-eb5_xFcfwi6vgw5a2I0mul3TT29OeDQHknFm5XFAaAB3WjOlCkR0ddGPyPJF0hIbeoco_0i0u1DppCdQDSfN3lUKTpqB0tsQImD05xi3NcL6wiFlNpyq8O4fJh3vtq9YWVqMOzogZEExwVxUTdmkzx9VBR0OZG1KmYk_g1-77PefXww0HBb0T_QNsLqZqgBj3bO41JX-Hnvo96LgKQbYPe2iwhEyf1dGLI8NO8TliuEzSgOA)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=644098e8b34e44b4851f435f024272b3&_e=GcBafjQnusEvwBhFaHh9ZumPgkUMTSWr76c9H1CgOfTy0m8oB0FLjVBRaz_Th0lKgRANue2nWQYpoZ_I2jaGFiI9Ew3DQfmuIf34MuzcSOIKTwxR7dzHoA-PC6FENSLpaSmhOIWoB27G4xP-eb5_xGpqqa2TE73ZDA4KesE3DdYBXXyoCbFgd2nQEmRR_hJLdkpFz0Lrsh4-F2ruiPu-mtWYvzH3vLJJKCuIH7aDkO4xgW8cnJLyELnyjItR8TVed4L5t2wkT-MFOYKaXL8uzgo5a19n5uPhOE6AOVegjIsYydRAzBk35Ps4roZBuMAwYi_3O2RMtp2cBRIp_2-c5sqAY1jQPyRNfVvShVy0Q8ZT8bcdqHy9rCzpwK32x3nT)

**[Your donation,](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=644098e8b34e44b4851f435f024272b3&_e=GcBafjQnusEvwBhFaHh9ZumPgkUMTSWr76c9H1CgOfTy0m8oB0FLjVBRaz_Th0lKgRANue2nWQYpoZ_I2jaGFiI9Ew3DQfmuIf34MuzcSOIKTwxR7dzHoA-PC6FENSLpaSmhOIWoB27G4xP-eb5_xMaiYEQhEas5mNGTaQ_Gk0Q6oEY7Or8YMBK77F5Eizt2DoRdiJuMkC7nGKc6HeMDcncARPSbP9nv9NUmmGtVYoQBFlEUTf78w_rQaBZkmc-7VNQGgzaCYwF58XNkzYFch3H7Vyy9Bi8CgpLREUdsshMNzXom3pQJCfD1nEg2w0aaUMem78lUE59_WW7SLeNaBuid5I6xW7UHlTUW96dEPiYgiwVgSOE2UiY3q1I5jKiH)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=644098e8b34e44b4851f435f024272b3&_e=GcBafjQnusEvwBhFaHh9ZumPgkUMTSWr76c9H1CgOfTy0m8oB0FLjVBRaz_Th0lKgRANue2nWQYpoZ_I2jaGFiI9Ew3DQfmuIf34MuzcSOIKTwxR7dzHoA-PC6FENSLpaSmhOIWoB27G4xP-eb5_xF7Q4Kz6wlZ7-CITzK2foxHcPceqBkP3VDcLIB8wMXQphtIgolH347Anh4HU8LNVkYHepsFwQlMBhL_B7RkuBWjbqdtv8zGhQwgtcg7yLPEwBxvx9dSbcPErjn4d1pLyTr8uVxe84y7pxWMX4z2Kp1eyjQsPHigE5pY0GYjDnIzLuZSxm422VLGy1nugZP7U2Efb8LxZd27hn307l8cK8Np3pM6tZyga5rSnv21PaPcS)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=644098e8b34e44b4851f435f024272b3&_e=GcBafjQnusEvwBhFaHh9ZumPgkUMTSWr76c9H1CgOfTy0m8oB0FLjVBRaz_Th0lKgRANue2nWQYpoZ_I2jaGFiI9Ew3DQfmuIf34MuzcSOIKTwxR7dzHoA-PC6FENSLpaSmhOIWoB27G4xP-eb5_xGBcAafDOOpVdOJgvL91jQ0XzhtpBQdePbD-LQlEQNUYMzDQln0NkzUFfbRhWUUxYxwKzqX9_KH7bkYTYpJYyzfIlty10H8ZSrsfnHycXnfNV649l_AxT1UonNOnQ_JwizJ7m6f9r0pSuX-r4jMrBOyG-vVn5NVusIi9zzogtqKgza1P2vwupwjjxdDkH6lqqQ8CVeN3xlLroqX6_yiLloe0DVB2lkQHVUUkI7wHaK0t)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=644098e8b34e44b4851f435f024272b3&_e=GcBafjQnusEvwBhFaHh9ZumPgkUMTSWr76c9H1CgOfTy0m8oB0FLjVBRaz_Th0lKgRANue2nWQYpoZ_I2jaGFiI9Ew3DQfmuIf34MuzcSOIKTwxR7dzHoA-PC6FENSLpaSmhOIWoB27G4xP-eb5_xIxU-4z7V1Csg39PFd1bB-kFPWA7Lnfcro96LIya6icNNSo6Fh1IWoU54i95kGdWbqiWt30f5pHwaY9MplHDaSxdYQHtH6Qgp1S9MncWducKv9OXCdn-IMZEwr4ywbrIufx3G1yDVLIzvR_eNUrPyf1BOkC4beSZmtHYDL5jjdHtuOg-U-Mvlm0FD_-rnNi8wUtq_IrZbR-MJsyW7xmkPShh5OVjk13VWxeY1SDJ-Oz4)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points. - The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties. whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years. My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic. Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down. No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built. Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by: Forcing critical race theory into our schools. Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts. Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY. That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that ** You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country. I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people! For Liberty, Jim | | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We just took a look at our ActBlue and realized we’re just $4,467 away
from hitting our mid-month fundraising goal. Take a look:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83994?refcode=em20211115-20512&t=1002&akid=20512%2E1203867%2EBv6AeP ]Screenshot from our ActBlue showing $4,533 raised so far this month
with an average donation of $17.23

We need to hit our goals in order to fund our slate of progressive primary
challengers — that means giving them the organizing, communications,
staff, and strategy support they need to defeat the Democratic
establishment. And our first 2022 primary is less than 100 days away from
early voting (Jessica Cisneros for TX-28 against corporate Democrat Henry
Cuellar).

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83994?refcode=em20211115-20512&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=20512%2E1203867%2EBv6AeP ]Now is the time to help us grow our strength so we can help grow the
Squad. Can you chip in before midnight to help us hit our $75,000
mid-month fundraising goal? If just 1 out of every 20 people reading this
email chips in, we’ll blow past our goal and show our grassroots strength.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83994?refcode=em20211115-20512&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20512%2E1203867%2EBv6AeP ]Contribute

If just 250 people donated our average contribution this month — $17.23 —
we’d hit our goal. Your
first contribution of $3 would be a huge
help too.

Thank you so much for your support,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=20512%2E1203867%2EBv6AeP ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, We just took a look at our ActBlue and realized we’re just $4,467 away from hitting our mid-month fundraising goal. Take a look: [ ]Screenshot from our ActBlue showing $4,533 raised so far this month with an average donation of $17.23 We need to hit our goals in order to fund our slate of progressive primary challengers — that means giving them the organizing, communications, staff, and strategy support they need to defeat the Democratic establishment. And our first 2022 primary is less than 100 days away from early voting (Jessica Cisneros for TX-28 against corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar). [ ]Now is the time to help us grow our strength so we can help grow the Squad. Can you chip in before midnight to help us hit our $75,000 mid-month fundraising goal? If just 1 out of every 20 people reading this email chips in, we’ll blow past our goal and show our grassroots strength. [ ]Contribute If just 250 people donated our average contribution this month — $17.23 — we’d hit our goal. Your first contribution of $3 would be a huge help too. Thank you so much for your support, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: John Fetterman
subject: You’re invited
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our team is hosting an exclusive viewing of PBS's new documentary series, "The Power of a Pardon."
#
I *can’t wait* for this, Derek.
**On Thursday, November 18 at 7:00 p.m. ET, our team is hosting an exclusive viewing of PBS's new documentary series,_The Power of a Pardon_ , followed by a panel discussion on the power of a 2nd chance.**
[**_Can you join us? After you RSVP, we’ll send you the link to join the event on Thursday._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211115-3473&t=1&akid=3473%2E434096%2E8moISv)__
**[RSVP Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211115-3473&t=2&akid=3473%2E434096%2E8moISv)**
[**__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211115-3473&t=3&akid=3473%2E434096%2E8moISv)
While most states allow those serving life sentences access to parole, that's not the case here in PA. Brothers Dennis and Lee Horton spent 28 years in prison for a crime they did not commit.
As told in PBS's new documentary series, _The Power of a Pardon_ , the story of the Horton brothers' path to freedom could only run through the Pennsylvania Board of Pardons.
This Thursday, we’ll be joined by Dennis and Lee Horton, documentary series producer Jamila Paxima, and our Team Fetterman Political Director, Celeste Trusty.
This live virtual event is free to attend and open to the public. It’s important that we get a head count, though, [**_so please RSVP now if you can so the team can count on your attendance this Thursday, November 18 at 7:00 p.m. ET._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211115-3473&t=4&akid=3473%2E434096%2E8moISv)__
**[RSVP Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37383?source=em20211115-3473&t=5&akid=3473%2E434096%2E8moISv)**
And remember: **After you RSVP, we’ll send you the link you’ll need to tune in to the event.**
Thanks and see you soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211115-3473-footer&t=6&refcode2=3473_434096_8moISv&akid=3473%2E434096%2E8moISv)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

clean_body: Our team is hosting an exclusive viewing of PBS's new documentary series, "The Power of a Pardon." I can’t wait for this, Derek. On Thursday, November 18 at 7:00 p.m. ET, our team is hosting an exclusive viewing of PBS's new documentary series,The Power of a Pardon , followed by a panel discussion on the power of a 2nd chance. While most states allow those serving life sentences access to parole, that's not the case here in PA. Brothers Dennis and Lee Horton spent 28 years in prison for a crime they did not commit. As told in PBS's new documentary series, The Power of a Pardon , the story of the Horton brothers' path to freedom could only run through the Pennsylvania Board of Pardons. This Thursday, we’ll be joined by Dennis and Lee Horton, documentary series producer Jamila Paxima, and our Team Fetterman Political Director, Celeste Trusty. This live virtual event is free to attend and open to the public. It’s important that we get a head count, though, And remember: After you RSVP, we’ll send you the link you’ll need to tune in to the event. Thanks and see you soon, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: In less than one year, we’re going to change the course of history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, earlier
this month, Charles signed the official paperwork to be on the ballot next
November.

In less than one year, on Election Day, we’re going to change the course
of history, right here in our Commonwealth.

This moment is an inflection point for our movement. The D.C. talking
heads will tell you that a campaign like ours can’t win. To pack it all up
and go home. But these are the same people that election after election
tell us that we must subscribe to the same conventional playbook that we
know doesn’t work.

If we listen to them, we will lose,
Peter. But we’re not going down
that road.

The workers on the picket line cannot afford for us to quit fighting. The
single mothers working three jobs do not have time for us to concede to
the cynicism. This is the moment when we change how campaigns are run and
who they work for, especially in disenfranchised states like Kentucky.

We not only deserve new leadership; we need new leadership that actually
cares about regular people. Elected officials who have lived the struggle,
who know what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck, to choose between
affording rent or medication.

Our election is now less than one year away — and if we want to win, we
need to start mobilizing now. There’s lots coming down the pike, but we
need your support to make sure that as many Kentuckians as possible join
our movement.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12896?refcode=em20211115-1232&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1232%2E346206%2E_Wp-Vy ]So Peter, can you chip in
$5 or whatever you can afford today? Your contribution will
support our plans to grow our grassroots movement and build the biggest
voter outreach program in the history of Kentucky.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12904?refcode=em20211115-1232&t=1021&akid=1232%2E346206%2E_Wp-Vy ]Contribute $5

We can’t do any of this without you or your support. Let’s go out there
and make history.

More soon,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211115-1232-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1232_346206__Wp-Vy&akid=1232%2E346206%2E_Wp-Vy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1232%2E346206%2E_Wp-Vy

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:

name: Team WisGOP
subject: ICYMI: Tony Evers' maps go down in flames
body:
We wanted to share this must-read op-ed with you on Tony Evers’ abysmal failure with his proposed maps last week.

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=handrick_icymi_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- We wanted to share this must-read [**op-ed**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=2-3jd5nLMwji5ivpZLIClSU0hcxQgoGOKeiAJ9D8RqcPbpOABDr7rq6Et2mt-dwqxh50e4f5Cl9QAZ2zbOGOwyQb4M--Bo_uoWmiN7ZDT01vpo32pZhJyh81NsBaj1Pdml37P-_s39eReJBWBJ-11v7ypt8UF_8LSxJU4GxdntIguO8ynLVRzGAdplsid7cUKzUkpwatdoGt6Bvr5wLSiQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=handrick_icymi_v3&n=2) with you on Tony Evers’ abysmal failure with his proposed maps last week. [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=2-3jd5nLMwji5ivpZLIClSU0hcxQgoGOKeiAJ9D8RqcPbpOABDr7rq6Et2mt-dwqxh50e4f5Cl9QAZ2zbOGOwyQb4M--Bo_uoWmiN7ZDT01vpo32pZhJyh81NsBaj1Pdml37P-_s39eReJBWBJ-11v7ypt8UF_8LSxJU4GxdntIguO8ynLVRzGAdplsid7cUKzUkpwatdoGt6Bvr5wLSiQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=handrick_icymi_v3&n=3) While Tony Evers has been promoting his “People’s (AKA Liberal) Maps Commission” for months, he didn’t get the response he hoped for on the final product. In fact, before 17 Democrats including Assembly Minority Leader Gordon Hintz voted against the maps — which Senate Republicans were forced to introduce because no Democrats were interested — Democrats blasted the maps as “a perversion of justice,” a “con,” and “stealing minority representation rights.” According to former State Representative and redistricting expert Joe Handrick:
> _The Evers maps are a disaster in nearly every way and by nearly every measure. Fittingly, they were soundly rejected recently by a bipartisan super-majority in the state Assembly. Democrats in the Senate would not even take it up, opting to propose their own plan._ _Wisconsin has made great gains in minority representation in the Legislature since the 1980s. In 1992 the federal court selected a map for Milwaukee County legislative seats I drew on behalf of legislative Republicans._ _That map increased the number of predominantly Black Assembly districts in Milwaukee from four to five and, for the first time in history, created a second Black Senate district. This implementation of the Voting Rights Act continued in both 2002 and 2012. Today Wisconsin has six Black Assembly districts, two Black Senate districts, and two Latino districts._ _Along came Gov. Evers and his commission. They picked up the ball and ran the wrong way._ _His commission presented a map that, by my calculations, would reduce the number of Black Assembly districts from six to two and eliminate one of the two Black Senate districts. Furthermore, the commissioners drew the Latino district that was the center of the 2012 trial at a lower Latino level than the judges rejected at that trial._ _[...]_ _Finally, the governor’s commission went the wrong direction on disenfranchisement. Due to population shifts, some Wisconsin residents are always temporarily disenfranchised in state Senate elections because they don’t get to vote for a state senator for six years. The commission decided to set a record on disenfranchisement._
In one of the most embarrassing and resounding defeats for Tony Evers in his nearly three years as governor, Evers’ maps were so bad that he couldn’t even get Democrats to support them. If Tony Evers can’t even unite Democrats, how can he claim to be able to unite Wisconsin? You can read more about Evers’ maps disaster from Handrick’s op-ed **[here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=2-3jd5nLMwji5ivpZLIClSU0hcxQgoGOKeiAJ9D8RqcPbpOABDr7rq6Et2mt-dwqxh50e4f5Cl9QAZ2zbOGOwyQb4M--Bo_uoWmiN7ZDT01vpo32pZhJyh81NsBaj1Pdml37P-_s39eReJBWBJ-11v7ypt8UF_8LSxJU4GxdntIguO8ynLVRzGAdplsid7cUKzUkpwatdoGt6Bvr5wLSiQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=handrick_icymi_v3&n=4)** , or read our press release about the issue **[here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=2-3jd5nLMwji5ivpZLIClSU0hcxQgoGOKeiAJ9D8RqcPbpOABDr7rq6Et2mt-dwqxh50e4f5Cl9QAZ2zbOGOwyQb4M--Bo_uoWmiN7ZDT01vpo32pZhJyh81NsBaj1Pdml37P-_s39eReJBWBJ-11v7ypt8UF_8LSxJU4GxdntIguO8ynLVRzGAdplsid7cUKzUkpwatdoGt6Bvr5wLSiQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=handrick_icymi_v3&n=5)**. Thanks, Team WisGOP
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=handrick_icymi_v3&n=6).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=handrick_icymi_v3&n=7) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=handrick_icymi_v3&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=handrick_icymi_v3&n=9), software for leaders.

In one of the most embarrassing and resounding defeats for Tony Evers in his nearly three years as governor, Evers’ maps were so bad that he couldn’t even get Democrats to support them. If Tony Evers can’t even unite Democrats, how can he claim to be able to unite Wisconsin? You can read more about Evers’ maps disaster from Handrick’s op-ed , or read our press release about the issue . Thanks, Team WisGOP | Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
